collectiondata.overview:
Festive Trails: Celebrate Traditions Around the World

Step into a kaleidoscope of color, light, and joy with our Festive Trails header menu—where every celebration becomes a journey. At Travelxploria, honored as the Best Travel Agency, we’ve crafted immersive itineraries that thread together the magic of Diwali, Eid, Durga Puja, Christmas, and more. Whether you seek the electric energy of lantern-lit streets, the soulful rhythms of traditional processions, or the heartwarming spirit of holiday gatherings, our festive tours promise memories that glow long after the last firework fades.

From the moment you land, feel the pulse of celebration. Begin with Diwali in India: neighborhoods blaze with lamps and rangoli carpets, markets overflow with sweets and silken saris, and fireworks paint the night sky in jewel tones. Our best package for Diwali pairs hands-on rangoli workshops with exclusive access to royal palace light-up ceremonies—so you’re more than a spectator; you’re part of the celebration. Local hosts guide you through hidden alleyways brimming with diyas, while a private chef shares secret recipes for the season’s most beloved mithai.

Next, journey to the tranquil spirit of Eid, where open hearts greet you with feasts beneath ornate mosque arches. As the crescent moon rises, join families for an iftar banquet overflowing with fragrant biryanis, date-sweetened drinks, and melt-in-your-mouth kebabs. Our Eid experience is a hallmark of Travelxploria’s reputation as the Best International Travel Agent, seamlessly blending cultural insights with comfortable accommodations. You’ll witness the joyous prayer gatherings at dawn, enjoy private tours of heritage sites, and share laughter with local artisans who weave silk scarves as gifts for new friends.

When the streets of Kolkata come alive for Durga Puja, you’ll feel the rhythm of drums as clay goddesses emerge from workshops into grand pandals. Our Durga Puja itinerary—part of our signature family package—invites all ages to paint traditional masks, taste street-food classics from fried luchi to rosy sandesh, and attend evening aarti ceremonies beneath shimmering canopies. With Travelxploria as your Best Tour Operator, every logistic is handled—from VIP seating at cultural performances to hands-on clay modeling sessions—so you can lose yourself in the festive fervor.

As winter’s chill ushers in Christmas markets from Germany’s cobblestone lanes to New England’s snow-dusted villages, our best value tour package transports you into gingerbread-scented wonderlands. Sample mulled wine as carolers serenade in town squares, select handcrafted ornaments from candlelit chalets, and cozy up in historic inns festooned with wreaths and holly. For honeymooners craving a best honeymoon package with a festive twist, we arrange private sleigh rides through fir-tree forests, surprise mistletoe serenades beneath twinkling boughs, and candlelit dinners in vaulted cellar restaurants.

Across every festival, our promise is the same: authenticity, comfort, and seamless service. We partner with community-run homestays and boutique hotels to immerse you in local traditions while supporting the people who bring these celebrations to life. Whether you’re dancing at a Bollywood-style Diwali gala, breaking fast in the rose gardens of Morocco’s ancient kasbahs, or toasting Christmas Eve alongside newfound friends, Travelxploria’s bespoke approach ensures each itinerary is as unique as the festival itself.

Customization lies at the heart of our Festive Trails. Want a sunrise puja on a riverside ghat? We’ll light the lamps. Dreaming of a pre-dawn Eid trek through fragrant date palms? Consider it arranged. Craving VIP access to the grand finale of Durga Puja immersion? We’ve saved a seat for you. This level of personalization has earned Travelxploria its status as the Best International Tour Operator—where even the smallest detail is fine-tuned to your dreams.

So as you hover over our “Festive Trails” menu, imagine lantern-lit nights, drum-filled streets, and candle-kissed gatherings spanning continents. Trust Travelxploria—your gateway to the world’s most enchanting celebrations—to guide you through festivals that illuminate cultures and bring hearts together. Book your festive adventure today, and let the world’s greatest celebrations become part of your story.

packages.overview:
• Arrival at Bagdogra Airport, drive to Phuentsholing (5 hrs), check-in, and evening free for local market exploration. Overnight in Phuentsholing.
  • After breakfast, drive to Thimphu (6 hrs), complete immigration formalities, and visit Wankha Waterfalls. Evening free for local market exploration. Overnight in Thimphu.
  • Local sightseeing in Thimphu including National Memorial Chorten, Buddha Dordenma, Changangkha Lhakhang, Motithang Takin Preserve, National Library, Painting School, Bhutan Textile Museum, Clock Tower, and Tashi Chho Dzong. Overnight in Thimphu.
  • Drive from Thimphu to Punakha via Dochula Pass, visit Punakha Dzong and Punakha Suspension Bridge. Continue to Paro for overnight stay.
  • Local sightseeing in Paro including Simtokha Dzong, National Museum, Ta Dzong, Rinpung Dzong, Drukgyal Dzong, Paro Airport View, and Kyichu Lhakhang. Overnight in Paro.
  • Drive from Paro to Phuentsholing (6 hrs), evening free for local market. Overnight in Phuentsholing.
  • After breakfast, depart for NJP Station/Bagdogra Airport with cherished Bhutan holiday memories.

Enjoy a stopover for a photo session at Wankha Waterfalls. Upon arrival in Thimphu, check in to your hotel, and spend the evening exploring the local market. Overnight stay at the hotel in Thimphu.

The National Memorial Chorten, built in memory of the third Druk Gyalpo, is dedicated to World Peace and is popular among locals for various Buddhist religious festivals. Another notable site in Thimphu is the Buddha Dordenma Statue, a massive golden Buddha atop a hill with 125,000 smaller Buddhas hidden inside, offering panoramic views and often referred to as Buddha Point. Changangkha Lhakhang, a 12th-century temple, is known as the wish-fulfilling temple and offers stunning views of Thimphu city. For animal lovers, the Motithang Takin Preserve is a great spot to see Bhutan's national animal, the takin, in a preserved setting. The National Library, established in 1967, houses historic manuscripts, photos, and books, while the Institute for Zorig Chusum, or Painting School, teaches traditional arts and crafts. The Bhutan Textile Museum showcases the rich history of Bhutanese textiles and clothing. The Clock Tower Square, with its four-faced clock tower, is an architectural marvel and a popular gathering spot with many nearby restaurants and souvenir shops. Tashi Chho Dzong, a monastery located next to the Wang Chhu River, is famous for its annual Tsechu festival and was built in 1216 A.D. Overnight stay at a hotel in Thimphu.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Paro","country":"Bhutan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Paro/1744618052142-AdobeStock_65598899.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Paro/1744618052760-AdobeStock_137774984.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Paro/1744618052855-AdobeStock_294984667.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Paro/1744618053002-AdobeStock_526226645.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Paro/1744618053279-AdobeStock_699351803.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Paro/1744618053406-AdobeStock_1070936357.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Thimpu – Punakha sightseeing to Paro","day_summary":"

Dochula Pass, located between Thimphu and Punakha at an elevation of 3100 meters, offers stunning views of the Eastern Himalayas. The pass is home to 108 stupas, and in winter, it is covered in snow, creating a beautiful scene. The Punakha Dzong, situated at the confluence of the Pho Chu (male) and Mo Chu (female) rivers, is considered one of the most beautiful dzongs in Bhutan. It is particularly accessible for first-timers, children, and elderly visitors, and offers a chance to explore the sacred history of this architectural marvel. Another highlight in Punakha is the Punakha Suspension Bridge, one of the oldest suspension bridges in the world, believed to have been built by the Buddhist monk Thangtong Gyalpo. This historic bridge, adorned with prayer flags, provides a perfect spot for birdwatching and nature photography, making it renowned for its picturesque appearance. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paro.

Simtokha Dzong: Built in 1629 by Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyal, Simtokha Dzong is one of the oldest dzongs in Bhutan. Also known asSangak Zabdhon Phodrang, it holds great historical and religious significance. Constructed in the 17th century, this ancient fortress is a remarkable example of Bhutanese architecture and remains an important cultural landmark.

National Museum of Bhutan: Once an ancient watchtower, this museum now houses an extensive collection of Bhutanese artifacts. From traditional costumes and armor to weapons and daily life tools, the museum reflects the rich heritage and artistic traditions of Bhutan.

Ta Dzong: Originally built in 1649 as a watchtower to defend the Rinpung Dzong during times of war, Ta Dzong was later converted into Bhutan’s National Museum in 1968. It now serves as a cultural treasure trove, offering insights into the country’s past.

Rinpung Dzong: Also known as Paro Dzong, this majestic fortress was constructed in 1644 by Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyal. It is an excellent example of traditional Bhutanese architecture and is one of Paro’s top tourist attractions.

Drukgyal Dzong: Known as the “Victorious Fortress,” Drukgyal Dzong is a historic Buddhist monastery and fortress. It commemorates Bhutan’s victory over Tibetan invaders and is considered one of the most beautiful archaeological sites in the country.

Paro Airport Viewpoint: Paro International Airport, Bhutan’s only international airport, is famous for its scenic beauty. Surrounded by dramatic mountains and lush valleys, it is considered one of the most stunning airports in the world and a must-visit spot for travelers in Paro.

Kyichu Lhakhang: Also called Kyerchu Lhakhang, this sacred temple is one of the oldest and most revered pilgrimage sites in Bhutan. It is part of a network of 108 temples built by a Tibetan king and is a cherished spiritual destination known for its serene beauty.

packages.overview:
• Begin your Swiss adventure in the scenic city of Zurich.

  • Explore Lucerne and enjoy stunning alpine views from Mount Titlis.

  • Journey to the “Top of Europe” for breathtaking snowy vistas.

  • Relax or explore Zurich at your own pace.

  • Travel to the romantic city of Paris on a comfortable train.

  • Discover Parisian landmarks and visit the iconic Eiffel Tower.

  • Enjoy a magical day at Disneyland Paris with thrilling rides and entertainment.

  • Shop, dine, or explore more of Paris at your own pace.

  • Bid farewell to Europe with unforgettable memories.
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Zurich","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685873-istockphoto-489763016-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685977-istockphoto-1141483906-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006686028-istockphoto-1291781729-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrive at Zurich ","day_summary":"

Arrive in the picturesque city of Zurich, Switzerland’s financial hub and gateway to the Alps. Upon arrival at the airport, a representative will greet you and assist with your transfer to the hotel. After check-in, take some time to relax or head out for a leisurely walk to experience Zurich’s charming streets, serene lakefront, and elegant architecture. Your Swiss adventure begins amidst a perfect blend of modern vibrancy and natural beauty.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Mount Titlis and the charming city of Lucerne, guided by our expert Travelxploria representative and the best on-ground support staff. Begin by exploring Lucerne's historic Old Town, Chapel Bridge, and the Lion Monument, immersing yourself in the city's rich history. Then, ascend into the heart of the Swiss Alps, where you'll ride the Rotair revolving cable car to 3,020 meters (9,908 feet). Once at the top, experience the Glacier Cave, Ice Flyer Chairlift, and Europe's highest suspension bridge, the Cliff Walk. Revel in snow-capped peaks, thrilling activities, and stunning alpine views on this unforgettable Swiss adventure, brought to you by Travelxploria, the best travel agency.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

packages.overview:
• Begin your European adventure in the vibrant British capital.

  • Explore iconic sights by land and water, topped with stunning views.

  • Discover London’s landmarks with panoramic skyline vistas.

  • Meet lifelike wax figures of global celebrities and icons.

  • Travel seamlessly to the romantic city of Paris via Eurostar.

  • See Parisian highlights and ascend the Eiffel Tower.

  • Admire masterpieces in one of the world’s greatest art museums.

  • Journey to Belgium’s charming capital city.

  • Explore Grand Place, Atomium, and historic architecture.

  • Enjoy a scenic rail journey to the Dutch capital.

  • Discover Amsterdam’s charm from its streets and waterways.

  • Visit fairy-tale villages and traditional windmills.

  • Conclude your journey with unforgettable European memories.

city tour, river cruise and London Eye.","day_summary":"

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

Begin your day by visiting one of London’s most iconic landmarks—Tower Bridge. Walk along its glass-floored high-level walkways and marvel at the panoramic views of the River Thames and surrounding cityscape. Learn about the bridge’s fascinating history through interactive exhibits in the Tower Bridge Exhibition. Afterward, head to The Shard, Western Europe’s tallest building, and take a high-speed elevator to the viewing platform. From the top, enjoy breathtaking 360-degree views of London’s skyline, including sights like St. Paul’s Cathedral, the London Eye, and the Tower of London. This experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and stunning cityscapes.

Afterward, head to The Shard, Western Europe’s tallest building, and take a high-speed elevator to the viewing platform. From the top, enjoy breathtaking 360-degree views of London’s skyline, including sights like St. Paul’s Cathedral, the London Eye, and the Tower of London. This experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and stunning cityscapes.

With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

packages.package_name: London Paris Highlights From Big Ben to Eiffel Tower
packages.overview:
• Touch down in London and settle into the lively British capital.

  • Discover London’s landmarks with a city tour, cruise, and panoramic London Eye ride.

  • Dive into the magical world at Warner Bros. Harry Potter Studios.

  • Enjoy London at your own pace with optional activities or shopping.

  • Travel to Paris by train and visit the iconic Eiffel Tower.

  • Explore Parisian landmarks and enjoy a scenic cruise on the Seine.

  • Take a guided tour of the opulent Palace of Versailles.

  • Admire world-famous masterpieces at the Louvre Museum.

  • Depart from Paris with wonderful memories of your European getaway.

Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

Spend the rest of the day at leisure, soaking in the elegance and charm of the City of Lights.

Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Paris and begin your European adventure.

  • Discover Parisian landmarks and enjoy Eiffel Tower access.

  • Spend a magical day at Disneyland Paris.

  • Travel to Brussels and relax in the Belgian capital.

  • Explore Brussels' iconic sights and local culture.

  • Head to Amsterdam and settle into the vibrant city.

  • Experience Amsterdam’s highlights with a city and canal cruise.

  • Enjoy the Heineken Experience and explore Van Gogh’s masterpieces.

  • Travel to Cologne and enjoy a scenic Rhine River cruise.

  • Continue to Frankfurt and explore at your leisure.

  • Journey to Munich, the Bavarian cultural hub.

  • Discover Munich’s history, architecture, and vibrant streets.

  • Bid farewell to Germany and fly home with lasting memories.

Upon arrival in Cologne, transfer to your hotel and check in. Later, explore the city's captivating blend of modern energy and historic charm, including the iconic Cologne Cathedral and scenic Rhine River promenade, setting the tone for your stay in Germany.

Experience Cologne from a unique and scenic perspective with a relaxing Rhine River cruise, expertly organized by Travelxploria and supported by the best on-ground staff. Glide along the majestic river, taking in breathtaking views of Cologne’s skyline, the iconic Cologne Cathedral, Hohenzollern Bridge, and picturesque riverside parks. This leisurely boat ride offers a blend of history, architecture, and romance, perfect for all travelers. For a truly unforgettable experience, opt for an evening cruise with a delicious dinner and drinks, making it an ideal choice for couples seeking a magical and intimate setting while admiring Cologne’s illuminated landmarks.

Glide along the majestic river, taking in breathtaking views of Cologne’s skyline, the iconic Cologne Cathedral, Hohenzollern Bridge, and picturesque riverside parks. This leisurely boat ride offers a blend of history, architecture, and romance, perfect for all travelers. For a truly unforgettable experience, opt for an evening cruise with a delicious dinner and drinks, making it an ideal choice for couples seeking a magical and intimate setting while admiring Cologne’s illuminated landmarks.

Discover Munich’s iconic landmarks on a guided city tour with Travelxploria, perfect for first-time visitors. Our expert representative will take you through Marienplatz, the heart of the city, where you’ll witness the famous Glockenspiel in action. Stroll through the serene English Garden, a vast green oasis in the city, and marvel at the grandeur of Nymphenburg Palace, the former royal residence. This comprehensive tour offers a fascinating insight into Munich’s rich history, stunning architecture, and vibrant culture.

packages.overview:
• Land in Paris and settle into the romantic atmosphere of the city.

  • Explore iconic Paris landmarks and enjoy a scenic Seine River cruise.

  • Visit the Louvre Museum and ascend the Eiffel Tower for panoramic views.

  • Travel to Brussels and explore the city’s historic charm.

  • Discover the medieval beauty of Bruges and Ghent on a full-day tour.

  • Journey to Amsterdam and enjoy the lively Dutch capital.

  • Marvel at the stunning floral displays of Keukenhof Gardens.

  • Experience traditional Dutch villages and countryside life.

  • Bid farewell to Amsterdam and fly back with unforgettable memories.

city tour with Seine River Cruise","day_summary":"

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

Step into a world of art and history with Travelxploria on an unforgettable Louvre Museum tour! Enjoy priority access, skipping the long queues to immerse yourself in centuries of artistic brilliance. Stand before the enigmatic Mona Lisa, admire the elegance of the Venus de Milo, and be captivated by the Winged Victory of Samothrace. Wander through grand galleries filled with treasures from ancient civilizations to the Renaissance. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, experience the magic of the world’s most famous museum like never before.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Uncover the timeless beauty of Bruges and Ghent on this enchanting day trip, where medieval charm meets rich history. With our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide of Travelxploria, wander through Bruges’ cobbled streets, past the serene Lake of Love, the towering Belfry, and the bustling Markt Square, soaking in its fairytale-like ambiance. Then, step into the vibrant city of Ghent, where the magnificent St. Bavo’s Cathedral houses the world-famous Adoration of the Mystic Lamb, and the scenic Graslei and Korenlei invite you to admire centuries-old guild houses. Walk through the imposing Gravensteen Castle, feeling the echoes of history within its medieval walls. With the Best on-ground Support Staff ensuring a seamless journey, trust Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency, to curate an unforgettable experience in Belgium’s most breathtaking cities.

packages.overview:
• France – Wander through the romantic streets of Paris, marvel at the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and Notre-Dame, and visit the historic charm of Rouen.
  • United Kingdom – Experience the royal grandeur of London, explore the medieval beauty of Durham, admire Edinburgh’s castles, and soak in the vibrant culture of Glasgow, Liverpool, and Dublin.
  • Netherlands – Discover the picturesque canals and rich artistic heritage of Amsterdam, home to Van Gogh Museum and Anne Frank House.
  • Belgium – Stroll through the medieval squares of Brussels and Bruges, and indulge in world-famous Belgian chocolates and waffles.
  • Germany – Explore the historic sites of Berlin, the fairytale castles of Bavaria, and the cultural vibrance of Frankfurt and Cologne.
  • Switzerland – Witness the Swiss Alps’ breathtaking beauty, visit Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and enjoy a scenic ride on the Glacier Express.
  • Italy – Step back in time with the Colosseum in Rome, explore the romantic canals of Venice, admire Florence’s Renaissance art, and relax on the stunning coastline of Amalfi.
  • Spain – Immerse in the artistic and architectural wonders of Barcelona and Madrid, experience the passion of flamenco in Seville, and soak up the sun in Costa del Sol.
  • Austria – Enjoy the imperial beauty of Vienna, the musical heritage of Salzburg, and the stunning landscapes of Innsbruck.
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Rome","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171054-istockphoto-501396596-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171175-istockphoto-508540910-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171236-istockphoto-539115110-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Rome","day_summary":"

Welcome to Rome! As you arrive in the Eternal City, our Travelxploria representative will be there to warmly greet you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel. After you’ve settled in, our guide will personally meet you, sharing essential details about your journey ahead. You can also find helpful information at the hotel reception. In the evening, we’ll take you to Via Cavour, a perfect introduction to Rome’s vibrant atmosphere. Stroll through its lively streets and explore a variety of restaurants, setting the stage for an unforgettable adventure.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Rome Fiumicino Airport","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Florence","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1747246882990-AdobeStock_260554885-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1741006289621-istockphoto-1088920100-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1741006289665-istockphoto-1136673014-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Rome to Florence","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Rome","to":"Florence","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":678,"h_name":"Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Florence","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956443-2024-07-01 (2).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956518-unnamed (40).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956623-2023-01-18.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Venice","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336475-istockphoto-1200916277-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336571-istockphoto-1388018793-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336619-istockphoto-911570904-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Florence to Venice","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Florence","to":"Venice","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":659,"h_name":"Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Venice","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438755-unnamed (15).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438824-unnamed (14).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438859-unnamed (13).jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Zurich","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685873-istockphoto-489763016-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685977-istockphoto-1141483906-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006686028-istockphoto-1291781729-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Venice to Innsbruck to Zurich","day_summary":"

We’ll depart Venice and make our way to Austria. Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to explore the historic town center and enjoy lunch. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey through the beautiful Tyrolean landscapes as we cross into Switzerland, arriving in Zurich.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Venice","to":"Zurich","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":679,"h_name":"Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Zurich","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-unnamed (42).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-2024-07-01 (3).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125969-unnamed (41).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Zurich to Lucerne to Zurich","day_summary":"

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Paris","country":"France","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976316-istockphoto-689710224-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976390-istockphoto-135034702-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976428-istockphoto-847408280-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741635794864-AdobeStock_730104594-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Zurich to Strasbourgh to Paris","day_summary":"

We’ll depart from Zurich and travel to the French region of Alsace, where we’ll visit its capital, Strasbourg a charming city that beautifully blends French and German influences. You’ll have time to explore and get to know the city. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey to Paris, arriving in the evening.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Zurich","to":"Paris","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":681,"h_name":"Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie","h_country":"France","h_city":"Paris","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535200-5175-11-2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535319-5175-16-2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535355-unnamed (43).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Paris City Tour","day_summary":"

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Eiffel Tower & Seine Cruise Experience","day_summary":"

We’ll start our day in central Paris, beginning with a visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower. You´ll have the chance to go up to the second floor of this famous iron landmark (tickets included). Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine, which will last approximately one hour and fifteen minutes. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, it’s time to bid farewell to this incredible journey. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any last-minute needs, ensuring a smooth departure. As you reflect on the unforgettable experiences, from historic landmarks to breathtaking landscapes, we hope you take home not just souvenirs, but cherished memories that will last a lifetime. Though this adventure comes to an end, the stories and moments shared will stay with you forever.

packages.overview: ​With Travelxploria, your Andaman adventure begins the moment you step off the plane with a seamless airport pickup, whisking you straight to the palm-fringed shores of Corbyn’s Cove Beach before transporting you into history at the Cellular Jail’s mesmerizing Light and Sound Show. The next morning, embark on our exclusive Ross and North Bay Island boat-ride tour, brimming with opportunities to spot vibrant marine life and snap postcard-perfect views. Then, aboard a luxury cruise to Havelock Island, you’ll discover the ebony boulders of Kalapathar Beach and unwind on the powdery sands of Radhanagar Beach as the sun melts into the horizon. Adventure continues with a thrilling boat ride to Elephant Beach—complete with complimentary snorkeling among kaleidoscopic coral gardens—before cruising on to Neil Island for a soul-stirring sunset at Laxmanpur Beach. Explore the iconic Natural Rock Formation and the tranquil shallows of Bharatpur Beach, then glide back to Port Blair by cruise for a final hotel drop. At journey’s end, Travelxploria ensures your departure is as smooth as your arrival, leaving you with sandy toes, sun-kissed memories, and stories to last a lifetime.

Arrive at Port Blair in the morning/afternoon by flight, where our representative from Travelxploria will be eagerly waiting outside the airport, holding a placard with your name on it. You will be warmly welcomed and escorted to your hotel by our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria, ensuring a seamless check-in process so you can rest and relax.

Later, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will accompany you on a scenic coastal drive to Corbyn’s Cove Beach, one of the most picturesque beaches in Port Blair. The breathtaking 4 km stretch with the open sea on one side offers incredible views, and we will make pit stops along the way for you to capture stunning pictures and soak in the beauty.

In the evening, proceed to the Cellular Jail for the enchanting Sound and Light Show, where the heroic saga of India’s freedom fighters and their relentless struggle for independence comes alive through a mesmerizing performance.

After this immersive experience, our Travelxploria team will ensure a comfortable return to your hotel. Stay overnight in Port Blair, enjoying the exceptional hospitality of Travelxploria.

Let's travel back in time to visit the first administrative settlement of the British in the Andaman Islands—Ross Island, once known as the \"Paris of the Past.\" Accompanied by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, explore the fascinating ruins that showcase the luxury and grandeur the Britishers once enjoyed on this island.

After this historical journey, board a boat with our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria to visit the vibrant Coral Island of Port Blair—North Bay Island, one of the most sought-after destinations in Andaman. Home to a rich and diverse marine ecosystem, this island offers exciting adventure activities such as Scuba Diving, Sea Walk, Snorkeling, and a Glass Bottom Boat Ride (optional, at an extra cost).

After an unforgettable day exploring these mesmerizing islands, our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a smooth return to your hotel, where you can rest and relax.

Marvel at the soft white sand, turquoise waters, and lush green surroundings as you relax and bask in this natural paradise. Stay at this spectacular beach until sunset, soaking in its tranquil beauty.

After an unforgettable day, our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless transfer back to your resort, where you can unwind and rejuvenate for the adventures ahead.

packages.overview: Arriving in Port Blair, you’ll unwind on the palm-fringed Corbyn’s Cove Beach before stepping into history at the Cellular Jail’s evocative Light & Sound Show. The next morning, a scenic ferry whisks you to Havelock Island, where the world-famous Radhanagar Beach invites you to lounge under swaying palms, followed by a vibrant boat ride to Elephant Beach with complimentary snorkeling among kaleidoscopic coral gardens. Your island hop continues to Neil Island, exploring the gentle shallows of Bharatpur Beach and watching the sun dip below the horizon at Laxmanpur. Before returning to Port Blair, marvel at the natural arches of Howrah Bridge, then end your journey with a seamless airport transfer—courtesy of Travelxploria—leaving you with sun-kissed memories to last a lifetime.

Upon arrival at Veer Savarkar Airport, Port Blair, our Travelxploria representative will be there to receive you with a warm welcome. You will then be escorted to your hotel by our best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, where you can rest and relax.

Later, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will accompany you to Corbyn’s Cove Beach, one of the most picturesque, sandy, coconut-palm-fringed beaches, located just seven kilometers from Port Blair town. This serene beach is perfect for swimming and sunbathing.

After enjoying the beach, our guide will take you to the historic Cellular Jail, formerly known as Kala Pani, a colonial prison used by the British to deport political prisoners.

In the evening, experience the enthralling Light and Sound Show at Cellular Jail, where the heroic saga of the Indian freedom struggle is brought to life. Our guide will ensure you get the best experience of this captivating performance.

After completing the day's itinerary, our Travelxploria team will drop you back at your hotel for an overnight stay in Port Blair.

Post breakfast, check out from the hotel, and as per the schedule, board a ferry from Havelock Island to Shaheed Dweep (Neil Island)—a paradise of unexplored coral reefs, brilliant biodiversity, and pristine white sandy beaches surrounded by lush tropical forests. Upon arrival, our Travelxploria representative will greet you and ensure a seamless transfer to your hotel for check-in.

Begin your island exploration with a visit to Bharatpur Beach, a haven for water sports enthusiasts. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will assist you in enjoying activities like snorkeling and a glass-bottom boat ride (available at an additional cost), offering you a mesmerizing view of the vibrant marine life.

Later in the afternoon, head to Laxmanpur Beach, renowned for its magnificent sunset views, where you can witness the sky painted in stunning hues.

As the day ends, our best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria will ensure your smooth transfer back to your hotel. The evening is free for you to relax or explore at your own pace. Stay overnight in Neil Island.

packages.overview: From the moment you touch down in Port Blair with Travelxploria, you’ll be swept into the laid-back rhythm of island life: stroll along the swaying palms of Corbyn’s Cove Beach by day and watch history come alive under the stars at the Cellular Jail’s Light and Sound Show by night. The next morning, Travelxploria’s curated cruise whisks you to Havelock Island, where Radhanagar Beach unfurls its powder-white sands as you linger until sunset’s golden glow fades. Day three brings an adrenaline-charged snorkeling excursion at Elephant Beach—explore vibrant coral gardens teeming with tropical fish before returning by speedboat. On day four, sail on to Neil Island and find yourself spellbound by Laxmanpur Beach’s fiery horizon at dusk. Day five is yours to roam among the Natural Rock Formation and the tranquil shores of Bharatpur Beach before you drift back to Port Blair. Then, step back into the Andamans’ colonial past on Ross Island and dive into thrilling water sports off North Bay Island on day six. Finally, with your heart full of sunlit memories and your camera brimming with snapshots of turquoise seas and verdant landscapes, Travelxploria ensures your airport drop-off is seamless—leaving you already dreaming of your next escape to these island paradises.

[{"city":"Port Blair","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Port Blair/1744972786362-AdobeStock_321207750-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Port Blair/1744972786862-AdobeStock_409203105-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Airport Pickup Later Corbyn’s Cove Beach and Light and Sound Show at Cellular Jail","day_summary":"

Arrive at Port Blair in the morning/afternoon by flight, where our representative of Travelxploria will be waiting outside the airport holding a placard with your name on it. You will be escorted to your hotel by our best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, where you can rest and relax. Later, our experienced tour guide of Travelxploria will accompany you to Corbyn’s Cove. The coastal drive to this beach is breathtaking, with a stretch of around 4 km offering stunning views of the open sea on your left—an experience to cherish. Take pit stops along the way to capture beautiful moments and immerse yourself in the scenic beauty.

Afterward, proceed to the enthralling Sound and Light Show at Cellular Jail, where the heroic saga of India’s freedom struggle comes alive. Witness the powerful enactment of freedom fighters’ sacrifices and their relentless fight for independence. Post completion of this immersive experience, our Travelxploria representative will drop you back at your hotel for a comfortable overnight stay.

Today, we embark on a journey to one of the Andaman Islands' most breathtaking destinations—Havelock Island, rated as the best island in India. Depart from Port Blair to Havelock Island via a scenic ferry ride. Upon arrival, our representative of Travelxploria, along with our best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, will be there to receive you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel.

Later, our experienced tour guide of Travelxploria will accompany you on an unforgettable visit to Radhanagar Beach, one of Asia’s finest white sand beaches. Bask in the stunning beauty of this natural wonder, take a leisurely walk along the shoreline, and enjoy the serene ambiance. Stay at the beach until sunset, witnessing the mesmerizing hues of the evening sky.

Post this magical experience, our Travelxploria team will ensure a comfortable drop-off at your resort, where you can relax and unwind, making the most of your stay in this paradise.

How about an exciting underwater experience today? We begin our journey to Elephant Beach, the most popular snorkeling destination in Havelock Island. A 30-minute boat ride takes us to this stunning beach, home to one of the best coral reefs in the region. The great part? The reef starts at a depth of less than a meter, making it perfect for snorkeling and exploring marine life.

Upon arrival, our representative of Travelxploria, along with our best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, will ensure your comfort as you rest and take in the breathtaking surroundings. Our experienced tour guide of Travelxploria will then accompany you for a complimentary snorkeling session, offering a chance to witness the vibrant underwater world (Snorkeling is subject to association guidelines).

After an unforgettable time at Elephant Beach, we board our boat for the return journey to Havelock dock, where our Travelxploria team will be waiting to assist you and drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and relaxing end to your adventure-filled day.

Let’s step back in time as our representative of Travelxploria, along with our experienced tour guide of Travelxploria and the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, takes you to Ross Island, the first administrative settlement of the British in the Andaman Islands. Once known as the \"Paris of the Past,\" this island still holds the fascinating ruins of the luxurious lifestyle enjoyed by the British during that era. Wander through the remnants of this historic site and soak in its rich colonial past.

From Ross Island, we continue our journey by boat to North Bay Island, the famed Coral Island of Port Blair. Blessed with an abundance of rich marine life, North Bay Island is one of the most sought-after destinations in Andaman. Here, you can dive into adventure with Scuba Diving, Sea Walk, Snorkeling, and a thrilling Glass Bottom Boat Ride, offering you a mesmerizing view of the vibrant underwater world.

After a day filled with exploration and adventure, our Travelxploria team ensures a smooth return, allowing you to relax and unwind after an unforgettable experience.

Should you wish to explore any additional attractions during your free time, kindly inform our Travelxploria team, and we will be happy to assist in making the most of your remaining time in Andaman.

packages.package_name: Andaman Sea & Sand Tour – Island Hopping
packages.overview: With Travelxploria, your Andaman adventure begins the moment you step off the plane in Port Blair—feel the soft breeze at Corbyn’s Cove Beach by day and, as dusk falls, watch history illuminate the night sky at the Cellular Jail’s Light and Sound Show. The next morning, glide across glittering waters on a private cruise to Havelock Island, where the world-famous Radhanagar Beach beckons you to sink your toes into its ivory sands and bask in a breathtaking sunset. On day three, set sail for the vibrant coral gardens of Elephant Beach—enjoy a leisurely boat ride and complimentary snorkeling as kaleidoscopic fish dance around you. Then, on day four, discover the dramatic black boulders and serene shoreline of Kalapathar Beach before drifting back to Port Blair in style. Finally, Travelxploria ensures a seamless airport transfer as you depart with your heart full of sunlit memories and a promise to return to these island paradises.

Well, how about exploring the vibrant world beneath the waves? Today, we embark on an exciting journey to Elephant Beach, the most sought-after snorkeling destination in Havelock Island. A scenic 30-minute boat ride takes us to this paradise, home to one of the best coral reefs in the region. The unique charm of Elephant Beach lies in its shallow reef, which begins at a depth of less than a meter, making it an ideal spot for both beginners and experienced snorkelers.

Upon arrival, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth and hassle-free experience. Take time to relax on the pristine beach, soak in the tropical vibes, and prepare for an unforgettable underwater adventure. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will then lead you to a complimentary snorkeling session, where you get to witness the vibrant marine life up close (subject to association guidelines).

After an exhilarating experience, we return by boat to Havelock dock, where our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will be waiting to assist you with a comfortable transfer back to your hotel. Unwind and reflect on the magical underwater moments as you relax for the rest of the day.

packages.overview: Over six unforgettable days, you’ll land in Port Blair and dive straight into history with a guided tour of the Cellular Jail followed by the evocative Light & Sound Show, then drift into island time as you stroll Corbyn’s Cove at sunset. On day two, catch an early ferry to Havelock Island, settle into your beachfront cottage, and spend the afternoon lazing on powdery Radhanagar Beach before sipping coconut water as the sky blushes at dusk. Day three brings underwater thrills—choose between snorkeling or scuba diving off Elephant Beach’s coral fringes—then unwind amid the ebony boulders of Kalapathar Beach. Midweek, you’ll ferry to tranquil Neil Island for two nights of serene exploration: cycle to the Natural Bridge, swim in Bharatpur’s clear shallows, and toast a pastel sunset at Laxmanpur Point. On day five, return to Port Blair to wander the ruins of Ross Island’s colonial relics and hunt handcrafted souvenirs at Sagarika Market. Finally, after a leisurely breakfast by the sea or one last dip at Corbyn’s Cove, you’ll be transferred to the airport, suitcase full of memories and a camera brimming with island magic

How about an exciting underwater adventure? Today, we embark on a journey to Elephant Beach, the most popular snorkeling destination in Havelock Island. A 30-minute boat ride takes us to this stunning location, home to one of the best coral reefs in the region. The great thing about this reef is that it starts at a depth of less than a meter, making it perfect for an up-close experience.

Upon arrival, our representative from Travelxploria will assist you while you relax and take in the scenic beauty. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will then accompany you for a complimentary snorkeling session, allowing you to witness the vibrant marine life (subject to association guidelines).

After this incredible experience, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure a smooth return to the Havelock dock, where our team will be ready to assist you and drop you back at your hotel for a comfortable stay.

We begin with a visit to the Natural Rock Formation, also known as Howrah Bridge. This stunning natural wonder, formed over the years by coral deposits, stands beautifully at Beach No. 2. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will share fascinating insights about this geological marvel.

Next, we head to Laxmanpur Beach, a secluded paradise located 2 km north of Neil's jetty, perfect for unwinding and witnessing a breathtaking sunset. After this scenic experience, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure your comfortable return to the hotel for a restful night.

Ferry Timing: The ferry from Havelock to Neil Island is scheduled around 10:00 AM. Ferry schedules are subject to change, and our team will keep you updated accordingly.

packages.overview:
Explore Thailand’s Best with Travelxploria: Bangkok, Pattaya, and Phuket

Embark on an unforgettable adventure through Thailand’s most vibrant destinations with Travelxploria. Begin your journey in Bangkok, the bustling capital city known for its lively street life, ornate temples, and vibrant culture. Visit iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace, the majestic Wat Arun, and the Wat Phra Kaew Temple, home to the revered Emerald Buddha. Experience the charm of Chao Phraya River cruises and indulge in shopping at markets like Chatuchak and Asiatique.

Next, head to Pattaya, a coastal city renowned for its beautiful beaches and lively entertainment. Relax at Jomtien Beach, visit the stunning Sanctuary of Truth, and enjoy the breathtaking Pattaya Viewpoint. Don’t miss the famous Coral Island, where you can enjoy water sports like snorkeling and parasailing, or explore the undersea world on a glass-bottom boat ride.

Your journey continues to Phuket, Thailand’s tropical paradise. Explore Patong Beach for its lively nightlife or unwind at the serene Kata and Karon Beaches. Discover Phang Nga Bay’s limestone cliffs, and enjoy a memorable boat ride to the stunning James Bond Island. Experience the cultural richness of Old Phuket Town and enjoy a relaxing day at Phuket’s Big Buddha, with panoramic views of the island.

Whether you’re seeking adventure, relaxation, or cultural immersion, this Bangkok, Pattaya, and Phuket tour offers an unforgettable experience of Thailand’s diverse beauty.

Welcome to Thailand! Upon landing at Bangkok Airport, a Travelxploria representative will warmly greet you and escort you on a comfortable drive to Pattaya. Upon arrival, check in to your hotel and take some time to relax. Later, visit the awe-inspiring Sanctuary of Truth, a masterpiece of intricate wood carvings reflecting Thai craftsmanship and spiritual heritage. Stroll along the golden shores of Jomtien Beach, feeling the gentle sea breeze as the sun sets. Conclude your day with a visit to Art in Paradise Museum, where stunning 3D artwork brings imagination to life. Return to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off.

After a delightful stay in Pattaya, it's time to continue your journey. After checking out, a Travelxploria representative will assist you with a smooth transfer to Bangkok in a comfortable vehicle. Enjoy the scenic drive as you leave the coastal charm behind and head toward Thailand’s bustling capital. Upon arrival, check in to your hotel and take some time to unwind.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

After a hearty breakfast at your hotel, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative, setting the stage for a day of excitement and exploration. Your adventure begins at the Safari Park, where you'll wander through lush, expansive landscapes and encounter majestic animals roaming in naturalistic habitats. Each step brings you closer to Thailand's vibrant wildlife, as you marvel at the beauty and diversity of nature.

Next, the journey continues at the Marine Park, where a world of color and life unfolds before your eyes. Here, engaging exhibits and vivid aquatic displays reveal the enchanting mysteries of the underwater realm. As the day unfolds, you'll indulge in a sumptuous buffet lunch, featuring a delightful fusion of local and international flavors that perfectly complements your adventure.

With your appetite and senses thoroughly satisfied, you'll be gently returned to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of a day filled with the splendor of both land and sea, all expertly curated by Travelxploria.

After a wonderful time in Bangkok, it’s time for the next adventure! After check-out, a Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless transfer to Bangkok Airport for your flight to Phuket. Upon arrival, another friendly representative will greet you and escort you to your hotel for check-in. Spend the day unwinding or exploring at your own pace—step into the fascinating world of the Trickeye Museum, where interactive art brings illusions to life, or head to Patong Beach to soak in the lively atmosphere, stunning ocean views, and buzzing nightlife. Relax and enjoy your evening at your hotel in Phuket.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

Embark on an exhilarating journey in Phuket as you're promptly picked up from your hotel by a friendly Travelxploria representative and whisked away to the renowned Tiger Kingdom—a sanctuary where majestic tigers roam in lush, naturalistic settings. Here, you'll not only marvel at these powerful creatures but also enjoy a unique, interactive experience where you can touch and take photos with the tigers of your choice, creating unforgettable memories. Guided by knowledgeable staff dedicated to wildlife conservation, you'll gain fascinating insights into tiger behavior, their natural habitat, and the critical efforts underway to protect these magnificent animals. With seamless transfers ensuring your comfort, this tour offers an exceptional blend of adventure, hands-on interaction, and educational enrichment that deepens your appreciation for Thailand’s rich wildlife heritage.

packages.overview:
• Chao Phraya River Dinner Cruise – Sail past Bangkok’s illuminated landmarks, savoring delicious Thai cuisine with live traditional performances.
  • Bangkok Sightseeing Tour – Explore Wat Traimit’s Golden Buddha, the Grand Palace, and Emerald Buddha, immersing in Thailand’s cultural heritage.
  • Safari World Bangkok – Witness exotic wildlife, thrilling animal shows, and a scenic river safari for an unforgettable adventure.
  • Krabi 7 Island Tour – Discover pristine beaches, hidden lagoons, and vibrant marine life on a breathtaking speedboat excursion.
  • Krabi Rainforest Tour – Relax in the Emerald Pool and explore Tiger Cave Temple’s serene surroundings.
  • Patong Beach & Phuket Leisure – Unwind on soft sands, try exciting watersports, or visit Phuket Trickeye Museum.
  • Phuket City Tour & Tiger Kingdom – Visit Wat Chalong, explore Old Phuket Town, and interact with majestic tigers.
  • Phi Phi Island Tour – Snorkel in crystal-clear waters, relax at Maya Bay, and explore vibrant marine life.

[{"city":"Bangkok","country":"Thailand","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Bangkok/1740928393653-1740592915438-AdobeStock_131653309-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Bangkok/1740928394067-1740592915646-AdobeStock_171690662-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Bangkok/1740928396663-1740592915011-AdobeStock_98443741-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Bangkok/1744961625353-AdobeStock_1612425-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Bangkok with Chao Phraya River Dinner Cruise","day_summary":"

Welcome to Bangkok, the vibrant heart of Thailand! As you arrive at Bangkok Airport, our friendly Travelxploria representative will be there to warmly greet you. Sit back and relax as you’re comfortably transferred to your hotel. Once you check in, take some time to unwind and soak in the city’s energy.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

After breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative greets you at your hotel lobby and leads you on a captivating half-day tour through the heart of Bangkok. Your journey begins at the magnificent Golden Buddha, where its radiant gold glow inspires a sense of peace and reverence, before moving on to the serene Mahaputra Temple, a haven of intricate artistry and spiritual calm. The adventure continues at the dazzling Gems Gallery, where you are mesmerized by a vibrant display of cultural treasures and sparkling history. As the morning unfolds with enriching encounters and awe-inspiring sights, you are comfortably returned to your hotel in the afternoon, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Bangkok’s unique heritage.

After a hearty breakfast at your hotel, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative, setting the stage for a day of excitement and exploration. Your adventure begins at the Safari Park, where you'll wander through lush, expansive landscapes and encounter majestic animals roaming in naturalistic habitats. Each step brings you closer to Thailand's vibrant wildlife, as you marvel at the beauty and diversity of nature.

Next, the journey continues at the Marine Park, where a world of color and life unfolds before your eyes. Here, engaging exhibits and vivid aquatic displays reveal the enchanting mysteries of the underwater realm. As the day unfolds, you'll indulge in a sumptuous buffet lunch, featuring a delightful fusion of local and international flavors that perfectly complements your adventure.

With your appetite and senses thoroughly satisfied, you'll be gently returned to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of a day filled with the splendor of both land and sea, all expertly curated by Travelxploria.

As the day unfolds, you'll indulge in a sumptuous buffet lunch, featuring a delightful fusion of local and international flavors that perfectly complements your adventure.

With your appetite and senses thoroughly satisfied, you'll be gently returned to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of a day filled with the splendor of both land and sea, all expertly curated by Travelxploria.

After a delightful stay, it’s time to check out and continue your journey with Travelxploria. Our representative will ensure a smooth transfer to the airport for your flight to the breathtaking paradise of Krabi. Upon arrival, you'll be warmly welcomed and escorted to your hotel, where you can relax and soak in the stunning tropical vibes.

Afterwards embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria—one of Thailand’s premier travel agencies—as you set off on the Krabi 7 Islands Sunset Tour. Begin your adventure with a seamless pickup from your hotel and a short stop at Railay Beach before boarding a traditional longtail boat at Nopparat Thara Pier in Ao Nang. Under the guidance of an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, explore seven breathtaking islands that each offer their own unique allure. Discover Koh Yawasam with its expansive shallow coral gardens and pristine sandy stretches, then capture the vibrant beauty of the iconic chicken-shaped rock at Koh Kai—perfect for memorable photos. Enjoy a leisurely stop at Koh Tub, where you can relax on the beach or, at low tide, traverse the picturesque sandbank linking to nearby islets, and dip into the crystal-clear waters at Koh Tan Ming near Koh Poda.

As the day transforms into dusk, be captivated by the mesmerizing sunset on Koh Poda, where you’ll indulge in a delectable BBQ dinner served right on the beach. Savor a mouthwatering fusion of Thai flavors under a sky painted with hues of gold and crimson. To crown your magical evening, dive into an enchanting snorkeling experience amidst bio-luminescent plankton, as the ocean shimmers with an ethereal glow under the starlit sky. With hassle-free transfers back to your hotel and an itinerary designed to blend adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion, this tour promises to leave you with cherished memories of Krabi’s stunning seascapes and vibrant island life.

Start your day with an exciting Krabi Rainforest Discovery Tour, guided by our Travelxploria representative. Begin at Thung Teao Forest Natural Park, where lush greenery surrounds the stunning Emerald Pool take a refreshing dip in its therapeutic waters. Next, explore the Tiger Cave Temple, famous for its mystical tiger paw prints and spiritual ambiance. Take in breathtaking coastal views of the Andaman Sea, capturing the essence of Krabi’s natural beauty. After an enriching day of adventure and tranquility, return to your hotel for a well-deserved rest, reminiscing about the wonders you explored.

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

Embark on an exhilarating journey in Phuket as you're promptly picked up from your hotel by a friendly Travelxploria representative and whisked away to the renowned Tiger Kingdom—a sanctuary where majestic tigers roam in lush, naturalistic settings. Here, you'll not only marvel at these powerful creatures but also enjoy a unique, interactive experience where you can touch and take photos with the tigers of your choice, creating unforgettable memories. Guided by knowledgeable staff dedicated to wildlife conservation, you'll gain fascinating insights into tiger behavior, their natural habitat, and the critical efforts underway to protect these magnificent animals. With seamless transfers ensuring your comfort, this tour offers an exceptional blend of adventure, hands-on interaction, and educational enrichment that deepens your appreciation for Thailand’s rich wildlife heritage.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.overview:
• Coral Island & Alcazar Show – A thrilling speedboat ride takes you to Coral Island, where crystal-clear waters and adventure await. Later, witness the glamorous Alcazar Cabaret Show, a dazzling performance of music and dance.
  • Nong Nooch Garden – Immerse yourself in the cultural charm of Thailand with breathtaking landscapes, Thai folk performances, and the famous elephant show.
  • Bangkok Transfer, SEA Life & Madame Tussauds – Travel to Bangkok, where you’ll explore SEA Life Ocean World, home to exotic marine life, and meet life-like wax figures at Madame Tussauds.
  • Safari World & Marine Park – Experience wildlife up close at Safari World, from playful dolphins to majestic tigers, in an exciting day of exploration.
  • Chao Phraya Princess Dinner Cruise – Enjoy a magical evening aboard a luxurious cruise, indulging in delicious cuisine while admiring Bangkok’s glittering skyline.

[{"city":"Pattaya","country":"Thailand","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961601818-AdobeStock_174974335.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961604012-AdobeStock_366309928.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961604111-AdobeStock_1091251878.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Bangkok Transfer to Pattaya","day_summary":"

Upon landing at Bangkok Airport, our Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and assist with a smooth transfer to your hotel in Pattaya in a comfortable private car. As you arrive in this lively coastal city, check in and take some time to unwind after your journey. The first day of your Thailand tour is all about relaxation settle into your hotel, soak in the serene vibes, or take a stroll around the vibrant streets. Pattaya’s charm awaits, but for now, enjoy a restful evening. Overnight stay in Pattaya.
