Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off. 

Experience the magic of Pattaya’s world-famous Alcazar Cabaret Show with seamless hotel pick-up and drop-off by your Travelxploria representative.We ensure an unforgettable evening with the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide. Witness a dazzling spectacle of glamorous performances, extravagant costumes, and mesmerizing choreography in a state-of-the-art theater. This high-energy cabaret show blends Thai culture with global influences, creating a visual masterpiece that will leave you in awe. Sit back, relax, and enjoy a night of entertainment, music, and vibrant performances. After the show, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off at your hotel making your Pattaya experience will be truly unforgettable.

Begin your journey with a convenient hotel pick-up by your Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless and comfortable experience. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, explore the breathtaking Nong Nooch Tropical Botanical Garden, one of Thailand’s most beautiful landscapes. Wander through vibrant themed gardens, from the French Garden to the Orchid Garden, and marvel at the diverse plant species. Witness cultural performances, including traditional Thai dances and an exhilarating elephant show. Take in the serenity of this lush paradise, perfect for nature lovers and photography enthusiasts. After an enchanting experience, enjoy a hassle-free hotel drop-off.

After a delightful stay in Pattaya, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with a smooth transfer to Bangkok in a comfortable private vehicle. Sit back and enjoy the scenic drive as you leave behind Pattaya’s coastal beauty and head toward Thailand’s bustling capital. Upon arrival in Bangkok, check in to your hotel and take some time to relax.

A friendly Travelxploria representative meets you at your hotel lobby and ushers you into an adventure that transports you to the mesmerizing realm of Sea Life Bangkok Ocean World. As you arrive, you're welcomed into an underwater kingdom bursting with vibrant marine life and enchanting exhibits. Wander through a stunning ocean tunnel where every glance reveals a captivating dance of colorful fish and graceful rays. Interactive displays and touch pools invite you to get close and personal with the wonders of the deep, sparking your curiosity and imagination. This immersive journey is more than just a visit—it's a magical voyage into the heart of the ocean's secrets.

Step into the world of fame and glamour with Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, as you embark on a guided tour of Madame Tussauds Bangkok. Begin your experience with a convenient hotel pick-up by our experienced representative and expert tour guide, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable visit. Walk through lifelike wax figures of international celebrities, world leaders, sports legends, and historical icons. Pose for photos with your favorite stars and enjoy interactive exhibits that bring history and pop culture to life. After an unforgettable visit, relax as we provide a hassle-free hotel drop-off.

After a hearty breakfast at your hotel, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative, setting the stage for a day of excitement and exploration. Your adventure begins at the Safari Park, where you'll wander through lush, expansive landscapes and encounter majestic animals roaming in naturalistic habitats. Each step brings you closer to Thailand's vibrant wildlife, as you marvel at the beauty and diversity of nature.

Next, the journey continues at the Marine Park, where a world of color and life unfolds before your eyes. Here, engaging exhibits and vivid aquatic displays reveal the enchanting mysteries of the underwater realm. As the day unfolds, you'll indulge in a sumptuous buffet lunch, featuring a delightful fusion of local and international flavors that perfectly complements your adventure.

With your appetite and senses thoroughly satisfied, you'll be gently returned to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of a day filled with the splendor of both land and sea, all expertly curated by Travelxploria.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

packages.overview: Travelxploria invites you to begin your Thailand adventure with a scenic transfer to the lively coastal city of Pattaya. In the evening, be enchanted by the spectacular Alcazar Show, featuring vibrant costumes, energetic dances, and dazzling stage performances. Cruise across sparkling waters to Coral Island by speedboat, where turquoise seas and golden sands offer the perfect setting for thrilling water activities and a delicious seaside lunch. Next, head to bustling Bangkok for an enriching city tour, exploring its magnificent temples, rich culture, and architectural marvels. Your journey concludes with a thrilling day at Safari World & Marine Park, where exotic wildlife encounters, safari rides, and lively marine shows create unforgettable memories.

packages.overview:
Feel the warm Andaman breeze as you step off the ferry onto Krabi’s sun-kissed shores—your two-night escape begins with Travelxploria in full swing. Day One, we whisk you by private longtail boat to the legendary “Four Islands”: marvel at the emerald pools of Poda Island, stroll along the ivory sands of Chicken Island, snorkel amidst rainbow-fish in Tub Island’s coral gardens, and stand in awe at the karst cliffs framing Tup Island’s heart-shaped lagoon. As the sun dips low, return to your cliff-side boutique bungalow overlooking Railay Beach, where a sunset cocktail awaits and fire-dancers trace flames against a velvet sky.

Dawn of Day Two finds you gliding across limestone-splashed waters to the world-famous Phi Phi archipelago. On Phi Phi Don, we’ve arranged a private beach lunch beneath swaying palms, followed by a guided trek up to the iconic viewpoint—your lens will capture a panorama of turquoise bays and jagged isles. Dive into Maya Bay’s storied shallows or join our onboard marine biologist for a hands-on snorkeling session at Bamboo Island, discovering vibrant anemones and playful parrotfish. That evening, sail back to Krabi for a starlit seafood feast on Ao Nang’s waterfront, before drifting to sleep to the sound of lapping tides.

On Day Three, Travelxploria transfers you to Phuket in effortless comfort. Your three-night stay at a secluded hillside resort comes with cliff-pool vistas and spa treatments infused with local botanicals. Day Four is yours to roam Patong’s lively streets or unwind on Kata’s crescent beach, but at dusk we’ll escort you to the dazzling Phuket FantaSea cultural extravaganza. Watch elephants march in choreographed splendor, gasp at acrobats soaring above the Grand Palace stage, and savor a lavish Thai banquet fit for royalty. Your final full day can be spent kayaking through Phang Nga Bay’s James Bond-worthy limestone caves or simply lounging poolside with a coconut in hand.

Whether you seek pulsating adventure or serene relaxation, Travelxploria’s seamless orchestration—from Krabi’s hidden lagoons and Phi Phi’s cinematic beauty to Phuket’s electric nights—ensures every moment of your 2-night Krabi, 3-night Phuket odyssey becomes a treasured chapter in your travel story.

Our dedicated representative from Travelxploria ensures you have a seamless experience as you soak in the serene coastal vibes. Whether you choose to unwind on the soft, sun-kissed beaches, take a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters, or explore the vibrant marine life through snorkeling and diving, the day is yours to enjoy.

Or choose the optional Krabi 4 Island Tour, discovering its stunning highlights. Hop between pristine islands, soaking in the beauty of crystal-clear waters and white sandy beaches.

End the day with a stunning sunset and return to the hotel for a restful sleep.

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

In the evening, you'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to embark on an unforgettable Phuket FantaSea tour. As one of the best tour operators in the region, we ensure a smooth and memorable journey as you are transported to this dazzling cultural theme park. Upon arrival, you’ll be immersed in a spectacular show that brings Thailand's rich heritage to life through captivating performances, intricate costumes, acrobatics, and breathtaking pyrotechnics. The magical atmosphere of Phuket FantaSea, with its unique blend of tradition and fantasy, promises an evening full of wonder and excitement. After experiencing the enchantment of the night, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, leaving you with lasting memories of Thailand’s vibrant cultural spirit.

The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.overview:
• Louvre Museum: Home to the world-renowned Mona Lisa and other masterpieces.
  • Notre-Dame Cathedral: Gothic cathedral, a masterpiece of architecture.
  • Champs-Élysées & Arc de Triomphe: Iconic avenue and historical monument.
  • The largest ancient amphitheater, known for gladiatorial contests.
  • Visit St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel, home to Michelangelo’s famous ceiling.
  • An ancient temple turned church with stunning architecture.
  • Toss a coin into the famous Baroque fountain for good luck.
  • The museum where Anne Frank and her family hid during WWII.
  •  Explore Amsterdam’s picturesque canals.
  •  Scenic views and boat rides on the lake in Zurich
  • Explore the glittering world of Swarovski crystals.
  • Florence Cathedral Known for its stunning dome designed by Brunelleschi.
  • Piazza della Signoria: A historic square with statues and fountains.

Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, who will introduce you to the city's finest attractions. Marvel at iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, Champs Élysées—one of the most fashionable avenues in the world—Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, Les Invalides, and many more. Next, visit the iconic Eiffel Tower (3rd Level) and enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city from its summit. With its famous tapering cast-iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is not only the symbol of Paris but of France itself. Your adventure continues with a visit to the Palace of Versailles, an internationally acclaimed masterpiece located just 19 km west of Paris. This magnificent palace, once home to French royalty, is now a UNESCO World Heritage site and has been under the stewardship of the Public Establishment of the Palace, Museum, and National Estate of Versailles, overseen by the French Ministry of Culture since 1995. Let Travelxploria’s expert guide take you on a journey through its grand halls, opulent gardens, and fascinating history. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"ENJOY YOUR FUN FILLED DAY AT DISNEYLAND® PARIS - CHOICE OF DISNEY® PARK OR WALT DISNEY STUDIOS® PARK","day_summary":"

Get ready for an unforgettable day of excitement at Disneyland Paris, one of the most popular amusement parks in the world. With the best on ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy seamless access to thrilling rides, enchanting attractions, and immersive studio experiences with your loved ones. Choose between Disneyland Park, where fairy tales come to life across five incredible lands filled with classic attractions, spectacular shows, and lively street parades featuring beloved Disney Characters, OR visit Walt Disney Studios Park, where you’ll be amazed by breathtaking stunt shows, witness behind-the-scenes magic of filmmaking, and explore real-life sets used for blockbuster movies. Later, take a romantic cruise along the Seine River, one of the most scenic waterways in the world. Glide effortlessly past exquisite Parisian landmarks such as Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, while soaking in the city’s historic charm and dazzling skyline. Each bridge you pass under offers a new, mesmerizing view of Paris at its finest. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

Get ready for an unforgettable and magical alpine excursion to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a true highlight of your Swiss adventure, exclusively curated by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Your journey begins as you proceed to Grindelwald Terminal, where you board the state-of-the-art 3S-Bahn Eiger Express, which takes you to Eigergletscher Station in just 15 minutes. From there, embark on a spectacular cogwheel train ride to reach the highest railway station in Europe, standing at 11,333 feet—a world of eternal ice and snow. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, where talented artists sculpt breathtaking masterpieces from solid ice. Continue to the Sphinx Observatory Deck, offering awe-inspiring panoramic views of the Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps, ensuring a truly once-in-a-lifetime experience. After a thrilling day, return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria’s expertise has made your journey seamless and extraordinary.

TITLIS - ENJOY CABLE CAR RIDES ","day_summary":"

Today, get ready for breathtaking scenery and a once-in-a-lifetime experience with an exhilarating journey to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters, exclusively organized by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Ascend the majestic peak using various cable cars, including the Rotair, the world’s first revolving cable car, offering unrestricted 360-degree views of the dazzling snow-capped peaks, deep crevasses, and pristine white snowfields, dotted with massive ice boulders. At the summit, dare to walk across the famous Cliff Walk, the highest suspension bridge in Europe, for an adrenaline-pumping experience with spectacular panoramic views. Sweta © Later, proceed for an orientation tour of Lucerne, one of the most beautiful cities in Switzerland. Visit the historic Lion Monument and stroll across the iconic Kapellbrücke (Chapel Bridge). Enjoy some leisure time shopping for renowned Swiss watches, knives, and chocolates. To conclude the day, relax on a scenic cruise across the stunning Lake Lucerne, surrounded by picturesque alpine landscapes. Return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay.

ENJOY GONDOLA RIDE","day_summary":"

After breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy – a city of magnificent monuments, winding canals, and timeless romance. With the expert guidance of a Travelxploria representative, travel to the pier, where you will board a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Marvel at St. Mark’s Basilica, an architectural masterpiece showcasing stunning Byzantine artistry. Witness the famous Bell Tower and Clock Tower, which displays the signs of the Zodiac and the current phase of the moon. Admire the legendary Bridge of Sighs, a white limestone bridge arching gracefully over the Rio di Palazzo, historically linking the old prisons to the interrogation rooms of the Doge’s Palace. Next, embark on a romantic Gondola ride, gliding through the serpentine canals of Venice. As you drift past ornate baroque buildings, soak in the magical atmosphere of this one-of-a-kind city. This iconic Venetian experience is the perfect way to cherish the enchanting beauty of Venice. After this unforgettable adventure, return to the pier and proceed to your hotel for check-in. Overnight stay at the hotel in Padova, Bologna, or Ferrara.

This morning, check out from your hotel and embark on a scenic drive to Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, with Travelxploria – the best travel agency ensuring a seamless experience. Accompanied by an expert English-speaking guide, take a walking tour through this historic city, immersing yourself in its rich culture and artistic heritage. Marvel at Florence’s most iconic landmark – the Duomo, along with the Campanile and the Baptistery, home to the famed Gates of Paradise. Stroll through the Piazza della Signoria, an open-air museum filled with stunning Renaissance sculptures, surrounded by historic cafés, and dominated by the majestic Palazzo Vecchio. Walk across the renowned Ponte Vecchio, the ancient bridge spanning the Arno River, lined with charming shops and boutiques. Later, continue your journey to Pisa, where you will visit the Square of Miracles, home to the world-famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Admire the awe-inspiring architecture of this stupendous monument, a true marvel of medieval engineering. After an enriching day of history and culture, proceed to your hotel for a relaxing evening. Overnight stay at the hotel in the Tuscany region.

Walk across the renowned Ponte Vecchio, the ancient bridge spanning the Arno River, lined with charming shops and boutiques. Later, continue your journey to Pisa, where you will visit the Square of Miracles, home to the world-famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Admire the awe-inspiring architecture of this stupendous monument, a true marvel of medieval engineering. After an enriching day of history and culture, proceed to your hotel for a relaxing evening. Overnight stay at the hotel in the Tuscany region.

packages.package_name: Thai Island Trilogy: Phuket, Krabi & Koh Samui Escape
packages.overview:
​Travelxploria’s Andaman & Gulf Island Escape sweeps you from Phuket’s vibrant shores to Krabi’s hidden coves and the laid-back charms of Koh Samui—all in one seamless journey. Begin in Phuket, where powder-white sands meet turquoise seas: rise early for a snorkeling excursion to Coral Island’s rainbow reefs, unwind on Patong Beach with a beachside massage, then toast the sunset from a hilltop viewpoint before savoring fresh seafood at a cliff-side restaurant.

Next, drift south to Krabi’s dramatic limestone cliffs: board a traditional longtail boat at dawn to explore the tranquil lagoons of Hong Island, climb the “Tiger Cave” for panoramic views over emerald jungles, and plunge into the cool waters of Railay Beach’s hidden grottoes. As dusk falls, gather around a beach bonfire to admire bioluminescent plankton dancing at your toes.

Finally, hop across the gulf to Koh Samui, where coconut palms sway above secret bays. Spend your mornings kayaking through Ang Thong Marine Park’s karst-strewn islands, indulge in a beachside yoga session as the sun rises, and explore the island’s spiritual side at the Big Buddha Temple. Treat your taste buds to Samui’s famous fresh-pressed coconut curries and mango sticky rice, then dance the night away at a chic beachfront lounge under stars.

From snorkeling and sea-cave adventures to cultural encounters and island-hopping bliss, Travelxploria’s bespoke tour weaves together Thailand’s most iconic beach escapes into an unforgettable island odyssey.

You'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—and set off on an unforgettable journey from Phuket. Your adventure begins with a scenic drive along the stunning Andaman coastline, where your experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region shares fascinating insights about the local landscape and history.

As you cruise towards the iconic James Bond Island, prepare to discover cinematic landscapes where Hollywood glamour meets natural beauty. Marvel at the awe-inspiring limestone formations and sweeping views of the natural landscape, each scene more breathtaking than the last. Along the way, you'll have the opportunity to navigate your own canoe through serene caves that lead to quiet inner seas. For those seeking an extra thrill, an optional sea canoeing tour is available, allowing you to paddle deeper into hidden coves and explore tranquil, secluded spots off the beaten path.

Keep your camera ready as you spot the famous Tapu rock, immortalized in the film \"The Man with the Golden Gun,\" a must-see highlight for any film and nature enthusiast. And to top it all off, you'll take in the stunning sights from the water while enjoying an included buffet on board, where a variety of delicious Thai dishes are served against a backdrop of turquoise waters and dramatic cliffs.

After a day filled with exploration, adventure, and indulgence, you'll be transferred back to your hotel in Phuket, carrying with you unforgettable memories of this spectacular James Bond Island tour.

Leave the vibrant shores of Phuket behind as our Travelxploria representative ensures a smooth and comfortable transfer to the breathtaking paradise of Krabi. As you journey through scenic coastal roads, soak in the picturesque landscapes of limestone cliffs and emerald waters. Upon arrival, check in at your hotel and take a moment to relax.

Immerse yourself in the vibrant essence of Krabi as a friendly Travelxploria representative collects you from your hotel to begin an engaging city tour. Journey through bustling streets adorned with ancient temples, colorful local markets, and scenic riverfronts that showcase the authentic spirit of Krabi. Discover cultural treasures like Wat Kaew Korawaram and witness everyday life unfolding amid charming neighborhoods where traditional crafts and modern touches blend seamlessly. Capture unforgettable moments as you stroll past lively street scenes, sampling local flavors and soaking in the rich heritage of this dynamic city. This immersive tour offers a captivating glimpse into Krabi’s timeless charm and leaves you with cherished memories of its unique cultural tapestry.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as one of the best travel agencies for Thailand—ensuring that your day-long adventure starts off smoothly. You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. The journey continues to the Tup Islets, renowned for their striking rock formations and vibrant marine life, offering an ideal spot for snorkeling and capturing memorable photos—all under the watchful guidance of your experienced tour guide.

Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

Embark on a full-day adventure with Travelxploria to the breathtaking Angthong Marine National Park, a stunning 250-square-kilometer paradise northwest of Koh Samui. Our representative will ensure a seamless experience as you set sail on a shared big boat toward Angthong Island, where nature’s beauty awaits. Explore Mae Koh, home to a picturesque beach and the mesmerizing emerald saltwater lake, Thale Nai. Savor a delightful lunch at Koh Paluay, an island untouched by modern development. Later, indulge in activities like swimming, sunbathing, canoeing, or simply unwinding on pristine white sands, making the most of this unforgettable tropical escape.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Jungle Safari at Koh Samui","day_summary":"

Get ready for an exhilarating jungle safari jeep tour with Travelxploria, taking you through the heart of Koh Samui’s untouched wilderness. Our representative will ensure a seamless adventure as you hop onto a 4x4 off-road ride, navigating through lush jungles and uncovering the island’s hidden gems. Feel the thrill of exploring the rugged outback, where nature thrives in its purest form. Take a refreshing break beneath a cascading waterfall, letting the cool waters rejuvenate you. packages.package_name: Fully Loaded Singapore and Malaysia Tour
packages.overview: Embark on a seamless Southeast Asian odyssey with Travelxploria: land in vibrant Singapore for leisurely exploration, a heritage-rich city and culture tour complete with a scenic river cruise, the National Museum, Gardens by the Bay, Peranakan immersion, and Chinatown discoveries. Journey by car to historic Malacca for an evening of riverside charm and A Famosa’s storied forts, then drive on to Kuala Lumpur to marvel at Merdeka Square, Batu Caves, and the Petronas Twin Towers. Escape to the cool heights of Cameron Highlands—with tea plantations, strawberry farms, and the mystical Mossy Forest—before crossing to Penang for George Town’s UNESCO heritage, Khoo Kongsi’s ornate clan house, and the colorful bustle of Little India. Finally, fly to idyllic Langkawi for two full days of island adventures—think Sky Bridge thrills or beachside bliss—before Travelxploria ensures your smooth transfer home from Langkawi Airport.

Begin your immersive cultural journey with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your day. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, step into the vibrant streets of Chinatown, where heritage meets modern charm. Explore traditional shops, admire intricate architecture, and visit the sacred Buddha Tooth Relic Temple, a site of spiritual significance. Indulge in authentic local flavors before heading to Little India, where a burst of colors and exotic aromas transport you to a different world. Here, visit the historic Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple, a masterpiece of devotion and artistry. Finally, wander through Kampong Glam, the heart of Malay-Arab culture, where the majestic Sultan Mosque stands in grandeur. Shop for unique souvenirs in the lively alleys as our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with seamless pick-up and drop-off. With Travelxploria, every step is enriched with history, culture, and comfort.

Begin your day with a captivating Melaka River Cruise, where our Travelxploria representative ensures a seamless pick-up and comfortable transfer. Glide along the historic river as our experienced Travelxploria tour guide brings Malacca’s colonial past to life, pointing out beautifully preserved Dutch, Portuguese, and British-era buildings along the way. Feel the vibrant energy of the riverside neighborhoods, filled with colorful murals and bustling cafés.

After the cruise, step back in time with visits to A Famosa, the remains of a 16th-century Portuguese fortress, and St. Paul’s Hill, offering panoramic city views from its ancient church ruins. Throughout the day, our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and enriching experience, allowing you to soak in Malacca’s rich heritage without a worry. With Travelxploria handling all the details, all you have to do is immerse yourself in the magic of this historic city.

En route, stop at the iconic Batu Caves, where the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan stands as a gateway to the sacred limestone caves. Explore the vibrant Hindu temple within and marvel at the intricate cave formations before continuing your journey.

As the road winds through lush greenery, feel the air turn refreshingly cool, a welcome change from the city heat. Take in the breathtaking landscapes of rolling tea plantations, misty hills, and scenic valleys before arriving at your hotel in Cameron Highlands. Whether you choose to relax or take a leisurely evening stroll, our Travelxploria representative is always available to ensure your comfort and convenience throughout the journey.

Wake up to the crisp mountain air and get ready for a day of immersive exploration in Cameron Highlands, led by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide and supported by our best on-ground staff. Begin your journey at the lush tea plantations, where rolling green hills stretch as far as the eye can see. Learn about the intricate tea-making process while enjoying a freshly brewed cup with stunning panoramic views.

Next, head to a strawberry farm, where you can handpick fresh, juicy strawberries straight from the vines—a delightful experience for all ages. Continue your adventure into the mystical Mossy Forest, a cloud-kissed wonderland filled with rare flora, moss-covered trees, and fresh, invigorating air.

Throughout the day, our Travelxploria representative ensures seamless pick-up and drop-off, providing comfort and convenience as you soak in the serene beauty of Cameron Highlands.

Bid farewell to the refreshing highlands as our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide escort you on a scenic drive from Cameron Highlands to Penang. Sit back and enjoy the changing landscapes—from misty hilltops to the bustling coastal charm of Malaysia’s \"Pearl of the Orient.\"

Upon arrival in Penang, our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth hotel check-in, allowing you to unwind before stepping out to explore the vibrant streets. Take a leisurely evening walk along Gurney Drive, famous for its stunning sea views and lively food scene. Savor local delicacies like Penang Char Kway Teow and Assam Laksa, indulging in the island’s rich culinary heritage.

Whether you choose to relax by the shore or explore the buzzing city streets, Travelxploria ensures a seamless and memorable experience from start to finish.

Tour","day_summary":"

Start your day with an immersive Penang city tour, guided by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, who will take you through the rich heritage of this UNESCO-listed gem. Wander through the charming streets of George Town, where colonial architecture meets vibrant street art. Discover the grandeur of Khoo Kongsi, an intricate Chinese clan house showcasing elaborate carvings and centuries of history. Step into the Pinang Peranakan Mansion, a beautifully restored heritage home that offers a glimpse into the lavish lifestyle of the Peranakan community.

In the afternoon, let our best on-ground support staff seamlessly lead you to Little India, where the air is filled with the aroma of spices and the sounds of Bollywood music. Stroll past colorful shops, indulge in authentic Indian cuisine, and soak in the cultural vibrancy of this lively district. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance, your Penang experience is nothing short of extraordinary.

Wake up to the serene beauty of Langkawi, where a day of adventure or relaxation awaits. Our representative from Travelxploria will be on hand to assist you, ensuring a smooth and personalized experience.

With guidance from our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, set off to explore the island’s natural wonders. Take in the breathtaking views from the Langkawi Sky Bridge, a marvel suspended high above the rainforest, or unwind on the pristine beaches with the soothing sound of waves.

For those seeking more excitement, our best on-ground support staff can arrange an exhilarating island-hopping tour, taking you to hidden coves and stunning lagoons. Alternatively, visit the Langkawi Wildlife Park, where you can interact with exotic animals.

Spend your day at your own pace, whether it’s basking in nature’s beauty or indulging in thrilling activities, all while enjoying the seamless service of Travelxploria.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Langkawi – Free at Leisure","day_summary":"

Enjoy another carefree day in Langkawi, where you can explore or simply relax at your leisure. Our representative from Travelxploria will be available to assist you, ensuring a hassle-free experience throughout the day.

For nature lovers, embark on a scenic boat trip to Kilim Karst Geoforest Park, where our experienced Travelxploria tour guide will introduce you to the stunning mangroves, limestone formations, and diverse wildlife of this UNESCO-listed site. Spot eagles soaring above and explore hidden caves, all while soaking in the breathtaking surroundings.

If relaxation is your priority, our best on-ground support staff can arrange a perfect beach day for you—whether it’s lounging on Pantai Cenang with a refreshing drink or indulging in a rejuvenating spa session.

No matter how you choose to spend your day, Travelxploria ensures a seamless, comfortable, and unforgettable experience in Langkawi’s tropical paradise.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Langkawi Departure","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, take some time for last-minute shopping at local markets or enjoy a peaceful stroll along Langkawi’s pristine beaches, soaking in the final moments of this tropical paradise.

Our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless and stress-free transfer to Langkawi Airport. Whether you need assistance with luggage or recommendations for souvenirs, our best on-ground support staff is always ready to help.

With the guidance of our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, every part of your journey has been thoughtfully curated, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Singapore and Malaysia. As you board your flight, take with you the warmth of this incredible experience and the promise of more adventures to come with Travelxploria! Safe travels.

packages.overview: Embark on an exhilarating journey with Travelxploria, touching down in Kuala Lumpur where you’ll be whisked to your hotel to unwind before diving into the city’s vibrant street life. Venture up to Genting Highlands for theme-park thrills, boutique shopping, and sweeping mountain vistas, then return to explore Kuala Lumpur’s cultural crown jewels—marvel at the Petronas Twin Towers, ascend the sacred Batu Caves, and stroll through historic neighborhoods. Next, cross into Singapore by air or road and discover the glittering waterfront of Marina Bay before delving into the city’s heart on a guided tour of Merlion Park, Chinatown, and other iconic landmarks. Cap off your adventure with heart-pounding rides and movie-magic attractions at Universal Studios Singapore, then savor final moments of shopping and relaxation before Travelxploria ensures your seamless departure home.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

packages.overview: Embark on a seamless Southeast Asian escape with Travelxploria, beginning in Singapore where you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for a leisurely welcome. Dive into island thrills on Sentosa—with round-trip cable car rides and Siloso Beach lounging—before immersing yourself in the region’s botanical wonders at the National Orchid Garden and Gardens by the Bay. Next, fly to idyllic Langkawi for an exclusive Rainforest & Waterfall Explorer tour, followed by a Wildlife Paradise & Island Discovery adventure showcasing mangrove ecosystems and hidden coves. Finally, savor your last moments of tropical relaxation before Travelxploria ensures your smooth departure home.

Kickstart your day with an exhilarating two-way Sentosa Cable Car ride, where breathtaking panoramic views of the city and coastline unfold before your eyes. Our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless pick-up from your hotel, making your journey effortless. As you glide above the cityscape, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will share fascinating insights about Singapore’s skyline and Sentosa’s vibrant history.

Upon arrival, step into the tropical paradise of Siloso Beach, where sun-kissed sands and gentle waves invite you to unwind. Whether you choose to relax, take a refreshing dip, or stroll along the scenic shore, the experience is pure bliss. Our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will be at your service throughout, ensuring a hassle-free experience. After a rejuvenating day by the beach, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel, leaving you with cherished memories of Sentosa’s charm.

Begin your day with a seamless pick-up by our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a smooth journey to the breathtaking National Orchid Garden. As you step into this floral paradise, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will lead you through a mesmerizing display of over 1,000 orchid species, sharing fascinating stories about these exotic blooms. Stroll through vibrant, meticulously curated gardens at your own pace. After a refreshing experience, our best on-ground support staff will ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Resort 3.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Langkawi Wildlife Paradise – Island Discovery","day_summary":"

Get ready for an exciting wildlife adventure with Travelxploria as we take you to the Langkawi Wildlife Park, a paradise for animal lovers! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a hassle-free journey. Led by our expert guide, explore this award-winning park, home to over 150 species of birds and animals from around the world. Feed friendly deer, marvel at vibrant macaws, and interact with adorable rabbits and exotic reptiles. Witness the fascinating walk-in aviary, where tropical birds fly freely around you. Enjoy engaging animal shows and learn about wildlife conservation in this immersive experience. Whether you're visiting with family or exploring solo, this trip promises unforgettable moments with nature. After a fun-filled and interactive visit, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and memorable wildlife experience in Langkawi!

Set sail on an unforgettable Langkawi Island Hopping Tour with Travelxploria! Your adventure begins as our friendly representative picks you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start. Accompanied by our expert guide, hop on a speedboat and cruise across the sparkling Andaman Sea to explore Langkawi’s most breathtaking islands. Witness the mystical Pregnant Maiden Lake, known for its serene beauty and legendary fertility myths. Marvel at the majestic eagles feeding at Singa Besar Island, an awe-inspiring sight as they swoop down to catch their prey. Finally, relax on the pristine shores of Beras Basah Island, where you can sunbathe, swim, or simply soak in the tropical paradise. Throughout the journey, our guide shares fascinating stories and insights about Langkawi’s hidden gems. After an exhilarating island adventure, sit back and relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable day.

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore | Safari Tour or Bird Paradise
    Arrive in Singapore and visit either the Safari Tour with a tram ride or Bird Paradise for a wildlife experience.
  • Thrilling Universal Studios Adventure
    Spend a fun-filled day at Universal Studios Singapore, enjoying exciting rides and shows.
  • Sentosa Island Exploration
    Visit Sentosa Island with a cable car ride, Madame Tussauds, S.E.A. Aquarium & the Wings of Time show.
  • Singapore City Tour
    Explore top Singapore landmarks, including Marina Bay Sands, Merlion Park, and Gardens by the Bay.
  • Transfer to Kuala Lumpur
    Travel from Singapore to Kuala Lumpur and enjoy leisure time in the city.
  • Kuala Lumpur City Highlights
    Discover the Petronas Twin Towers, Merdeka Square, and vibrant local markets.
  • Batu Caves & Genting Highlands
    Visit Batu Caves and take a scenic cable car ride to Genting Highlands for entertainment and relaxation.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur
    Return to Kuala Lumpur, enjoy last-minute shopping, and depart with wonderful memories.

Arrive in Singapore and get ready for an unforgettable evening as our Travelxploria guide welcomes you with a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Experience the magic of the world’s first nocturnal zoo, the Night Safari, home to over 2,500 animals. Glide through the wilderness on a guided tram ride, passing through diverse habitats under the moonlit sky. Stroll along scenic walking trails for up-close encounters with creatures like tigers, flying squirrels, and more. After your thrilling night of exploration, we ensure a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Or

Join Travelxploria for an enchanting journey to Bird Paradise Singapore, where nature comes alive! Our courteous representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Led by our expert guide, explore this breathtaking aviary teeming with thousands of exotic birds. Witness the vibrant macaws, graceful flamingos, and mighty eagles in beautifully crafted habitats. Engage in interactive feeding sessions and be amazed by spectacular bird shows. After a day filled with nature’s melodies and stunning sights, sit back and unwind as we drop you safely back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and memorable experience.

Universal Studios Singapore is a world-class theme park located on Sentosa Island, offering a thrilling experience with seven uniquely themed zones, including Hollywood, Sci-Fi City, Jurassic Park, and Far Far Away. Visitors can enjoy exciting rides like Transformers: The Ride and Battlestar Galactica, immersive 4D shows, live entertainment, and meet iconic movie characters. Perfect for all ages, it’s a must-visit destination for adventure, fun, and family-friendly attractions. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pickup and drop-off, along with a knowledgeable Travelxploria guide to ensure a smooth and memorable experience throughout your visit.​

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on an exciting visit to Madame Tussauds Singapore with Travelxploria. Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle. Accompanied by our expert guide, step into the world of fame and get up close with life-like wax figures of global celebrities, sports icons, and historical legends. Enjoy interactive experiences like the Spirit of Singapore boat ride and the Marvel Universe 4D adventure. Capture unforgettable moments with your favorite stars! After a fun-filled day, relax as we drop you back at your hotel for a seamless experience.​

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel. Embark on an unforgettable journey to the S.E.A. Aquarium on Sentosa, one of the world’s largest aquariums, housing over 100,000 marine animals across 45 habitats. Explore the mesmerizing marine life and, during the holiday season, enjoy the festive Splashtacular Christmas with thrilling waterslides and a relaxing lazy river experience. After a day of adventure, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.

After a delightful breakfast, a Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel and guide you to the captivating Wings of Time show. Following your exploration of the ocean depths at S.E.A. Aquarium, get ready for a stunning seaside performance filled with lasers, pyrotechnics, water fountains, and 3D mapping. The show weaves an epic tale of a mythical bird and its companions, traveling through time across mesmerizing landscapes. After this unforgettable experience, you’ll be comfortably dropped off at your hotel to end your day seamlessly.

Begin your day with a guided city tour, led by a Travelxploria representative, to explore Singapore's iconic landmarks like the Singapore Flyer, the Civic District, and the Padang. After soaking in the sights, head to Chinatown, where you'll experience the vibrant cultural heart of Singapore, with opportunities to shop for souvenirs and visit the serene Buddha Tooth Relic Temple. Along the way, enjoy a delicious breakfast, carefully selected to energize you for the day ahead. Your Travelxploria guide will ensure you make the most of each stop, sharing insights into Singapore's rich history and traditions. The experience includes hotel pick-up and drop-off, providing a seamless, hassle-free journey throughout your tour.

Travel from Singapore to Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia’s bustling capital city, by either bus or flight. Upon arrival, our representative from Travelxploria will warmly welcome you and ensure a seamless transfer to your hotel. Assisted by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria and the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria, you can relax and settle in. Spend the evening at leisure—explore the lively local markets, indulge in Kuala Lumpur’s vibrant street food scene, or admire the dazzling skyline adorned with modern skyscrapers. Enjoy a hassle-free experience with Travelxploria’s expert team ensuring your comfort at every step.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. Our tour also takes you to the historic Independence Square, a symbol of Malaysia’s journey to freedom, where you can immerse yourself in the city's vibrant energy. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the two-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.package_name: Singapore and Malaysia Heritage Discovery Tour
packages.overview: Discover the best of Singapore and Malaysia with Travelxploria on an unforgettable journey blending modern marvels and rich heritage. Arrive in vibrant Singapore and enjoy a relaxing start, followed by a city tour exploring Chinatown, Little India, and panoramic views from the Singapore Flyer. Marvel at the futuristic beauty of Gardens by the Bay and Marina Bay Sands before flying to Kuala Lumpur and transferring to the historic town of Malacca. Wander through Malacca’s UNESCO-listed landmarks and enjoy a charming river cruise. Continue to Kuala Lumpur to witness the iconic Petronas Twin Towers and the spiritual beauty of Batu Caves. With a perfect mix of sightseeing, cultural immersion, and leisure, Travelxploria ensures a seamless and memorable escape across two incredible countries.

Begin your immersive cultural journey with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your day. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, step into the vibrant streets of Chinatown, where heritage meets modern charm. Explore traditional shops, admire intricate architecture, and visit the sacred Buddha Tooth Relic Temple, a site of spiritual significance. Indulge in authentic local flavors before heading to Little India, where a burst of colors and exotic aromas transport you to a different world. Here, visit the historic Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple, a masterpiece of devotion and artistry. Finally, wander through Kampong Glam, the heart of Malay-Arab culture, where the majestic Sultan Mosque stands in grandeur. Shop for unique souvenirs in the lively alleys as our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with seamless pick-up and drop-off. With Travelxploria, every step is enriched with history, culture, and comfort.

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Your private capsule ride is complemented by a glass of champagne, elevating the experience as you take in the breathtaking urban architecture and cosmopolitan landscape. Enjoy a delectable gourmet breakfast served within your capsule, featuring a selection of fresh, delightful delicacies to start your day. Throughout your journey, a professional guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, providing fascinating insights into Singapore's iconic landmarks. With hotel pick-up and drop-off included, this seamless, indulgent experience is the perfect way to begin your day in Singapore.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before our Travelxploria guide greets you for a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Explore Singapore’s rich heritage at the iconic National Museum of Singapore, where interactive exhibits and cultural artifacts bring history to life. Immerse yourself in captivating stories, from Singapore’s early beginnings to its vibrant modern identity. Our expert guide will ensure you experience every highlight of this cultural gem. After a day of discovery, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Your Singapore adventure begins with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless check-in and comfortable start to your journey. As the sun sets, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide leads you to the stunning Marina Bay, Singapore’s most iconic waterfront. Marvel at the legendary Merlion statue, capturing picture-perfect moments against the shimmering skyline. Stroll along the breathtaking Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, where panoramic city views leave you in awe. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and delightful experience as you soak in the lively atmosphere. As night falls, witness the Spectra Light & Water Show, a mesmerizing fusion of lights, water, and music dancing in perfect harmony. With seamless pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria curates an unforgettable evening where every moment is designed for wonder and comfort. This is just the beginning of your incredible Singapore journey.

Embark on an unforgettable Half Day City Tour of Kuala Lumpur with Travelxploria’s expert representatives ensuring a seamless experience from start to finish. Our experienced tour guide will take you on a journey through the city’s rich cultural heritage and modern marvels, making every stop insightful and engaging. Capture stunning photos at the Petronas Twin Towers, King's Palace, National Monument, and the National Mosque, while learning fascinating stories behind these landmarks. Visit the Cocoa Centre, where you can explore Malaysia’s renowned chocolate industry and sample delicious treats. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, seamless pick-up and drop-off services, and a carefully curated itinerary, this tour guarantees a hassle-free and enriching experience in Malaysia’s dynamic capital.

Embark on a fascinating journey to the Batu Caves with Travelxploria! Our friendly representative will pick you up from your hotel in a comfortable vehicle, ensuring a smooth start to your adventure. Accompanied by an expert guide, explore this iconic Hindu pilgrimage site, home to the majestic 272 rainbow-colored steps leading to limestone caves filled with ancient temples and shrines. Marvel at the towering golden statue of Lord Murugan, witness intricate cave formations, and experience the spiritual aura of the site. After capturing unforgettable moments, relax as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience!

packages.package_name: Singapore and Malaysia A Tale of Two Cities and Timeless Traditions
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore – Transfer to hotel, explore Marina Bay Sands & Merlion Park.
  • City Tour & Singapore Flyer – Visit Chinatown, Little India, Merlion Park & enjoy Singapore Flyer views.
  • Gardens by the Bay & Marina Bay Sands – Explore Gardens by the Bay, National Museum & Marina Bay Sands SkyPark.
  • Fly to Kuala Lumpur – Transfer to Malacca – Explore A Famosa, Jonker Street & historic Malacca.
  • Malacca Tour – Visit Sultanate Palace, Cheng Hoon Teng Temple & enjoy a river cruise.
  • Kuala Lumpur Exploration – Visit Petronas Twin Towers, KLCC Park & Bukit Bintang.
  • City Tour & Batu Caves – Explore Merdeka Square, National Mosque & Batu Caves.
  • Cameron Highlands – Visit tea plantations, Mossy Forest & Strawberry Farms.
  • Cameron Highlands Tour – Explore Butterfly Garden, Lavender Garden & Sam Poh Temple.
  • Transfer to Penang – Georgetown Heritage Tour – Discover colonial sites & street art.
  • Penang Sightseeing – Visit Penang Hill, Kek Lok Si Temple & relax at Gurney Drive.
  • Departure – Free time before airport transfer.

Begin your immersive cultural journey with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your day. Accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, step into the vibrant streets of Chinatown, where heritage meets modern charm. Explore traditional shops, admire intricate architecture, and visit the sacred Buddha Tooth Relic Temple, a site of spiritual significance. Indulge in authentic local flavors before heading to Little India, where a burst of colors and exotic aromas transport you to a different world. Here, visit the historic Sri Veeramakaliamman Temple, a masterpiece of devotion and artistry. Finally, wander through Kampong Glam, the heart of Malay-Arab culture, where the majestic Sultan Mosque stands in grandeur. Shop for unique souvenirs in the lively alleys as our best on-ground support staff ensures a hassle-free experience with seamless pick-up and drop-off. With Travelxploria, every step is enriched with history, culture, and comfort.

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Your private capsule ride is complemented by a glass of champagne, elevating the experience as you take in the breathtaking urban architecture and cosmopolitan landscape. Enjoy a delectable gourmet breakfast served within your capsule, featuring a selection of fresh, delightful delicacies to start your day. Throughout your journey, a professional guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, providing fascinating insights into Singapore's iconic landmarks. With hotel pick-up and drop-off included, this seamless, indulgent experience is the perfect way to begin your day in Singapore.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast before our Travelxploria guide greets you for a convenient pick-up from your hotel. Explore Singapore’s rich heritage at the iconic National Museum of Singapore, where interactive exhibits and cultural artifacts bring history to life. Immerse yourself in captivating stories, from Singapore’s early beginnings to its vibrant modern identity. Our expert guide will ensure you experience every highlight of this cultural gem. After a day of discovery, enjoy a comfortable drop-off back to your hotel.​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.

Your Singapore adventure begins with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless check-in and comfortable start to your journey. As the sun sets, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide leads you to the stunning Marina Bay, Singapore’s most iconic waterfront. Marvel at the legendary Merlion statue, capturing picture-perfect moments against the shimmering skyline. Stroll along the breathtaking Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, where panoramic city views leave you in awe. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and delightful experience as you soak in the lively atmosphere. As night falls, witness the Spectra Light & Water Show, a mesmerizing fusion of lights, water, and music dancing in perfect harmony. With seamless pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria curates an unforgettable evening where every moment is designed for wonder and comfort. This is just the beginning of your incredible Singapore journey.

Start your day with a guided tour led by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, beginning at the Malacca Sultanate Palace, a fascinating replica of the ancient royal residence. Dive into the rich royal history of the region before heading to Cheng Hoon Teng Temple, Malaysia’s oldest Chinese temple, where our guide will share intriguing insights into its spiritual significance. Next, explore the Baba & Nyonya Heritage Museum, where you’ll gain a deeper understanding of Peranakan culture.

Continue your journey to the Stadthuys, an iconic Dutch colonial building, and admire the vibrant Christ Church. As evening approaches, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless experience as you board a Malacca River Cruise. Drift along the river, soaking in picturesque views of illuminated historical buildings and charming bridges. Travelxploria guarantees a hassle-free, enriching experience. Overnight stay in Malacca.

After a delightful breakfast, our representative from Travelxploria will ensure a seamless transfer as you embark on a scenic drive to Cameron Highlands, a serene hill station known for its cool climate and lush tea plantations. Enjoy a comfortable journey in a private vehicle with insights from our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria.

Upon arrival, visit a renowned tea plantation, where you’ll take a guided tour to learn about the fascinating tea-making process while soaking in breathtaking views of rolling green hills. Explore the enchanting Mossy Forest, a mystical ecosystem shrouded in mist, or visit a Strawberry Farm, where you can handpick fresh strawberries.

As the day winds down, unwind at your cozy hotel, or take a leisurely stroll through Cameron Lavender Garden, admiring vibrant blooms in the cool mountain air. With the best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria, enjoy a hassle-free and enriching experience. Overnight stay in Cameron Highlands.

After a refreshing breakfast, embark on a delightful journey through Cameron Highlands with our representative from Travelxploria, ensuring a seamless experience. Start your day at the Butterfly Garden, where vibrant butterflies flutter around lush greenery. Next, take a scenic stroll through Cameron Lavender Garden, where the sight and aroma of blooming lavender create a picture-perfect setting.

Continue your exploration at the Rose Garden, home to a stunning variety of roses in different hues. With our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, visit the Sam Poh Temple, one of Malaysia’s largest Buddhist temples, offering not just spiritual tranquility but also breathtaking panoramic views of the highlands.

As evening approaches, unwind with a delicious dinner at a local restaurant, indulging in fresh local produce from the highlands. Throughout the day, our best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria will ensure a hassle-free and memorable experience. Overnight stay in Cameron Highlands.

After a delightful breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a scenic drive to Penang with seamless transfers arranged by our representative from Travelxploria. Sit back and enjoy the journey as our best on-ground support staff ensures a comfortable ride.

Upon arrival in George Town, the vibrant capital of Penang, get ready to explore its UNESCO World Heritage-listed streets. With our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, stroll through colonial-era buildings, admire striking street art, and immerse yourself in the city's cultural charm. Visit Khoo Kongsi, an elaborate Chinese clan house with intricate architecture, showcasing Penang’s rich history.

As the evening unfolds, take a leisurely walk along Chulia Street, indulging in delicious local street food. Explore the Penang Night Market, buzzing with energy and offering unique souvenirs. End your day with a relaxing overnight stay in Penang, filled with unforgettable memories.

Start your day with a seamless transfer arranged by our representative from Travelxploria, ensuring a hassle-free journey to Penang Hill. With the guidance of our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, take in breathtaking panoramic views of the island and the stunning cityscape below.

Next, visit the majestic Kek Lok Si Temple, one of Southeast Asia’s largest Buddhist temples, adorned with stunning architecture and spiritual significance. Continue to the Penang Peranakan Mansion, where our guide will immerse you in the rich Peranakan culture, showcasing antique furniture, traditional clothing, and unique customs.

Explore the Penang State Museum, where history comes to life through fascinating exhibits. As the sun sets, head to Gurney Drive, a lively seafront promenade offering an array of local and international cuisines. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and comfortable experience throughout the day. Overnight stay in Penang.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Penang Departure","day_summary":"

Start your day with a leisurely breakfast, taking in the final moments of your incredible journey. Enjoy some free time to shop for souvenirs or explore any last-minute attractions in Georgetown, with recommendations from our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. Whether it's a stroll through heritage streets or a quick visit to a local market, make the most of your final hours in Penang.

At the designated time, our representative from Travelxploria and best on-ground support staff will ensure a seamless transfer to Penang International Airport. Bid farewell to the vibrant culture, breathtaking landscapes, and unforgettable experiences of Singapore and Malaysia. Leave with cherished memories and the promise of future adventures. Safe travels.

packages.package_name: Singapore and Malaysia Twin City Adventure Tour
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore – Check-in and explore Marina Bay Sands or Gardens by the Bay.
  • Singapore City Tour & Flyer Experience – Visit Merlion Park, Chinatown, Little India & enjoy panoramic views from the Singapore Flyer.
  • Sentosa Island Excursion – Explore S.E.A. Aquarium, Madame Tussauds & relax at Sentosa’s beaches.
  • Transfer to Kuala Lumpur & Leisure – Travel to KL, visit Petronas Twin Towers & enjoy street food at Jalan Alor.
  • Sunway Lagoon Adventure – Thrill-packed day at Sunway Lagoon Theme Park.
  • Genting Highlands Getaway – Explore Chin Swee Temple, Genting SkyWorlds & shopping at Premium Outlets.
  • Departure from Kuala Lumpur – Last-minute shopping or sightseeing before your flight home.

Begin your day with a guided city tour, led by a Travelxploria representative, to explore Singapore's iconic landmarks like the Singapore Flyer, the Civic District, and the Padang. After soaking in the sights, head to Chinatown, where you'll experience the vibrant cultural heart of Singapore, with opportunities to shop for souvenirs and visit the serene Buddha Tooth Relic Temple. Along the way, enjoy a delicious breakfast, carefully selected to energize you for the day ahead. Your Travelxploria guide will ensure you make the most of each stop, sharing insights into Singapore's rich history and traditions. The experience includes hotel pick-up and drop-off, providing a seamless, hassle-free journey throughout your tour.

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Your private capsule ride is complemented by a glass of champagne, elevating the experience as you take in the breathtaking urban architecture and cosmopolitan landscape. Enjoy a delectable gourmet breakfast served within your capsule, featuring a selection of fresh, delightful delicacies to start your day. Throughout your journey, a professional guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, providing fascinating insights into Singapore's iconic landmarks. With hotel pick-up and drop-off included, this seamless, indulgent experience is the perfect way to begin your day in Singapore.

Get ready for a day filled with thrills and excitement as Travelxploria takes you to Sunway Lagoon, Kuala Lumpur’s premier theme park destination! Your adventure begins with a comfortable hotel pick-up in a private, air-conditioned vehicle, accompanied by our friendly representative. Upon arrival, our expert guide will assist you in exploring six exhilarating parks—from the Water Park’s giant wave pool to the Amusement Park’s thrilling rides, the Wildlife Park’s exotic animals, and the Scream Park’s spooky adventures. For adrenaline lovers, the Extreme Park offers exciting activities like bungee jumping and go-karting. Cool off on exciting water slides, float along the lazy river, or relax on the sandy beach. Capture fun-filled memories with family and friends as you indulge in non-stop entertainment. After an action-packed day, unwind as we drop you back at your hotel, ensuring a smooth and comfortable journey back. Sunway Lagoon guarantees an unforgettable experience.​

Get ready for an exhilarating journey to Genting Highlands, where Travelxploria’s representative ensures a seamless pick-up from your hotel. As you ascend the cool, misty mountains, our experienced tour guide shares fascinating insights into this vibrant hill resort. Feel the thrill as you board the one-way cable car, gliding over lush rainforests with breathtaking panoramic views. Once at the top, immerse yourself in the excitement of the casinos, theme parks, and world-class shopping experiences. Whether you seek adventure or relaxation, Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff is always ready to assist, ensuring a hassle-free experience. On your way back, make a brief stop at the sacred Batu Caves, where you can climb the 272 steps to witness the awe-inspiring golden statue of Lord Murugan. With seamless transfers and a perfectly curated itinerary, this day trip guarantees a magical blend of nature, culture, and entertainment.

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Singapore – Enjoy a hassle-free transfer to your hotel and get ready for an exciting journey ahead.
  • Wildlife & Skyline Wonders – Explore the renowned Singapore Zoo and take in breathtaking views from Marina Bay Sands SkyPark.
  • Panoramic Views & Futuristic Gardens – Soar high on the Singapore Flyer and wander through the mesmerizing Gardens by the Bay.
  • Aerial Thrills & Spectacular Show – Glide across Sentosa on the Singapore Cable Car and witness the stunning Wings of Time show.
  • Departure – Enjoy a smooth transfer to the airport, bringing home unforgettable memories of Singapore.

Experience the enchanting Singapore Zoo with Travelxploria, your trusted travel agency for a seamless Singapore adventure. Begin your day with a delicious morning breakfast before our expert tour guide picks you up from your hotel. The Singapore Zoo, famous for its lush, tropical rainforest environment, is home to over 4,000 animals from around the globe. Explore diverse exhibits featuring lions, elephants, orangutans, kangaroos, and more, while enjoying interactive shows, tours, safaris, and animal feedings. With convenient hotel pickup and drop-off, this is the perfect day out for animal lovers and families.

Your Singapore adventure begins with a warm welcome from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless check-in and comfortable start to your journey. As the sun sets, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide leads you to the stunning Marina Bay, Singapore’s most iconic waterfront. Marvel at the legendary Merlion statue, capturing picture-perfect moments against the shimmering skyline. Stroll along the breathtaking Marina Bay Sands SkyPark, where panoramic city views leave you in awe. Our best on-ground support staff ensures a smooth and delightful experience as you soak in the lively atmosphere. As night falls, witness the Spectra Light & Water Show, a mesmerizing fusion of lights, water, and music dancing in perfect harmony. With seamless pick-up and drop-off, Travelxploria curates an unforgettable evening where every moment is designed for wonder and comfort. This is just the beginning of your incredible Singapore journey.

Embark on a luxurious journey with Travelxploria's exclusive Singapore Flyer experience. Standing at 165 meters, the Singapore Flyer is one of the world’s largest observation wheels, offering stunning panoramic views of Singapore's skyline, along with glimpses of Malaysia and Indonesia. Your private capsule ride is complemented by a glass of champagne, elevating the experience as you take in the breathtaking urban architecture and cosmopolitan landscape. Enjoy a delectable gourmet breakfast served within your capsule, featuring a selection of fresh, delightful delicacies to start your day. Throughout your journey, a professional guide from Travelxploria will accompany you, providing fascinating insights into Singapore's iconic landmarks. With hotel pick-up and drop-off included, this seamless, indulgent experience is the perfect way to begin your day in Singapore.

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast, followed by a comfortable pick-up from your hotel with our Travelxploria guide. Explore the iconic Gardens by the Bay, a futuristic oasis blending nature and technology. Wander through the breathtaking Supertree Grove, marveling at the towering vertical gardens. Step into the climate-controlled wonders of the Flower Dome, showcasing global flora, and the mystical Cloud Forest, with its spectacular indoor waterfall. After an unforgettable experience, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off back to your hotel.
