On your visit to Sentosa Island, join Travelxploria for a thrilling ride on the iconic cable car that connects Faber Peak to the island. Enjoy a 30-minute journey offering 360-degree views of Singapore’s lush forests, impressive skyscrapers, and serene sandy beaches as you travel nearly 5 kilometers. Travelxploria’s representative will be with you throughout the experience, ensuring your comfort and providing fascinating insights along the way. The trip includes convenient pick-up from your hotel, so you can relax and enjoy the seamless start to your adventure. Once you’ve taken in the stunning sights from the cable car, you’ll be dropped off back at your hotel, completing the perfect, hassle-free experience. This journey offers the ideal mix of nature and cityscape, all guided by a Travelxploria expert.

After a delightful breakfast, a Travelxploria representative will pick you up from your hotel and guide you to the captivating Wings of Time show. Following your exploration of the ocean depths at S.E.A. Aquarium, get ready for a stunning seaside performance filled with lasers, pyrotechnics, water fountains, and 3D mapping. The show weaves an epic tale of a mythical bird and its companions, traveling through time across mesmerizing landscapes. After this unforgettable experience, you’ll be comfortably dropped off at your hotel to end your day seamlessly.

packages.package_name: Kerala Unplugged From Highlands to Coastlines
packages.overview: Your romantic journey begins with your arrival in Kochi, followed by a scenic drive to Munnar, where you'll enjoy its breathtaking hill views and lush landscapes. Explore the charming town, surrounded by tea plantations, and experience the serene beauty of the hills. Next, head to Alleppey, where a romantic houseboat cruise awaits, offering stunning backwater views. From there, continue your journey to Varkala, a clifftop paradise where you can unwind by the sea. Enjoy romantic moments by the beach before heading to Kanyakumari, the southern tip of India, for a serene and picturesque sunset experience. Your final day marks the end of this unforgettable journey through the heart of Kerala.

Wake up to the refreshing aroma of tea gardens and begin your romantic Munnar sightseeing with our Travelxploria representative ensuring a seamless experience. Visit the Eravikulam National Park, where you can spot the rare Nilgiri Tahr while admiring breathtaking views of rolling green landscapes. Next, explore Mattupetty Dam, Echo Point, and Kundala Lake, offering perfect backdrops for romantic photography and peaceful boat rides. Continue to Blossom Park and the Tea Museum, where you can immerse yourself in the rich heritage of Kerala’s tea plantations. Return to your resort for a leisurely evening, enjoying the serene ambiance before a cozy overnight stay in Munnar.

packages.overview:
• Kochi (Cochin) – Known as the Queen of the Arabian Sea, Kochi is a cultural melting pot where colonial charm meets coastal vibrance. Tourists are drawn to its historic sites like Fort Kochi, the Chinese Fishing Nets, and the Mattancherry Palace. The Jewish Synagogue and spice markets add to its multicultural appeal. Kochi also serves as the gateway to Kerala’s hill stations and backwaters.
  • Munnar – A dreamy hill station nestled in the Western Ghats, Munnar is famous for its endless tea plantations, cool climate, and misty hills. It's a haven for nature lovers and honeymooners, offering serene spots like Eravikulam National Park, Tea Museum, and Mattupetty Dam. Trekking, wildlife sightings, and scenic drives make Munnar a must-visit destination.
  • Alleppey (Alappuzha) – Often dubbed the Venice of the East, Alleppey is renowned for its tranquil backwaters and iconic houseboat experiences. A cruise through its lush waterways offers a glimpse into rural Kerala life. Tourists also enjoy Alleppey Beach, Ayurvedic wellness, and authentic Kerala cuisine served on board traditional kettuvallams.
  • Kanyakumari – Located at the southernmost tip of India, Kanyakumari is where the Arabian Sea, Bay of Bengal, and Indian Ocean meet. It's a spiritual and scenic destination known for the Vivekananda Rock Memorial, Thiruvalluvar Statue, and stunning sunrise/sunset views. Pilgrims, history buffs, and sea lovers alike are captivated by its unique coastal charm.

The afternoon is free for leisure, where you can explore local markets, savor authentic Kerala cuisine, or opt for a visit to the Kerala Folklore Museum, which showcases Kerala’s rich cultural heritage. Alternatively, enjoy a sunset cruise along Kochi’s scenic coastline for a breathtaking view of the city’s waterfront. Overnight stay in Kochi.

Begin your day with a guided walk through lush tea plantations, followed by a visit to the Tata Tea Museum to understand the fascinating process of tea-making. Later, explore Eravikulam National Park, home to the endangered Nilgiri Tahr, and enjoy breathtaking views of rolling meadows and misty hills. Continue your journey to Mattupetty Dam, where you can go boating, and stop at Echo Point, where your voice reverberates across the hills. As the evening sets in, admire a stunning sunset over the scenic hills of Munnar. Overnight stay in Munnar.

After breakfast, embark on a scenic 4-5 hour drive to Alleppey, Kerala’s backwater capital, famously known as the \"Venice of the East.\" Upon arrival, board a traditional Kerala houseboat for a luxurious cruise through the palm-fringed canals and vibrant villages. Enjoy a freshly prepared Kerala-style lunch on board featuring authentic local delicacies. Spend your afternoon sailing through lush landscapes, spotting local fishermen and traditional Kerala homes, and unwind with a cup of masala chai while watching the golden sunset over the backwaters. Overnight stay on the houseboat.

After breakfast, drive to Kanyakumari (6-hour journey), where the Arabian Sea, Bay of Bengal, and Indian Ocean meet, creating a mesmerizing confluence of waters. Upon arrival, check into your beachside hotel before heading out to explore Kanyakumari’s iconic landmarks, including the Vivekananda Rock Memorial, a serene meditation site, the towering Thiruvalluvar Statue, and the Kanyakumari Temple (Bhagavathy Amman Temple), one of the revered 108 Shakti Peethas. As the day ends, witness the breathtaking sunset at Kanyakumari Beach, a truly magical experience. Overnight stay in Kanyakumari.

packages.overview: Your journey begins with your arrival in Kochi, where you'll take a stroll through time, exploring the city’s rich colonial history and vibrant culture. From Kochi, embark on a scenic journey to Munnar, the enchanting land of tea gardens, where lush hills and picturesque landscapes await. In Munnar, you'll explore its natural wonders, including tea plantations, tranquil lakes, and captivating wildlife. After your time in Munnar, you'll return to Kochi, where you can soak in the final moments of the city before your departure, leaving with lasting memories of Kerala’s charm and beauty.

[{"city":"Cochin","country":"India","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Kochi – A Stroll Through Time","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at Cochin International Airport, our friendly Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless transfer to your hotel, where you can unwind before diving into Kerala’s colonial charm. Begin your journey in Fort Kochi, strolling through its picturesque streets filled with Dutch, Portuguese, and British colonial architecture. Visit St. Francis Church, the oldest European-built church in India, and marvel at the legendary Chinese Fishing Nets silhouetted against the Arabian Sea at sunset. Explore the Mattancherry Palace (Dutch Palace) with its exquisite murals and artifacts, followed by a visit to Jew Town & Paradesi Synagogue, where the spice-scented lanes tell tales of Kerala’s historic Jewish community. As the evening unfolds, immerse yourself in the grandeur of Kathakali, Kerala’s iconic dance-drama, known for its elaborate costumes and expressive storytelling. Witness the intricate makeup process before enjoying a sumptuous seafood dinner at a heritage restaurant. Retire for the night in the comfort of your hotel, gearing up for the adventures ahead.

to Munnar – The Land of Tea Gardens","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, embark on a picturesque journey to Munnar, Kerala’s tea capital, where misty mountains, lush plantations, and cascading waterfalls create a dreamlike setting. En route, take a refreshing stop at the Cheeyappara & Valara Waterfalls, ideal for capturing breathtaking photos amidst nature’s splendor. Continue your journey with a visit to a spice plantation, where you’ll uncover Kerala’s aromatic treasures like cardamom, pepper, and cinnamon through an insightful guided tour. Upon arrival in Munnar, check into your luxurious boutique tea estate resort, offering panoramic views of rolling green hills. Spend your evening unwinding by a bonfire, enjoying the crisp mountain air, or strolling through Munnar’s vibrant town market for local souvenirs. Conclude your day with a delicious dinner before retreating for a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Cochin","to":"Munnar","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"3":[{"h_id":228,"h_name":"Westwood Riverside Munnar","h_country":"India","h_city":"Munnar","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"3","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Munnar/Westwood Riverside Munnar/1739276135879-Westwood Riverside Munnar 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Munnar/Westwood Riverside Munnar/1739276135966-Westwood Riverside Munnar.jpg\"}]"}],"4":[{"h_id":231,"h_name":"Grand Plaza Munnar","h_country":"India","h_city":"Munnar","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Munnar/Grand Plaza Munnar/1739276723295-Grand Plaza Munnar 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Munnar/Grand Plaza Munnar/1739276723388-Grand Plaza Munnar.jpg\"}]"}],"5":[{"h_id":234,"h_name":"Blanket Hotel & Spa","h_country":"India","h_city":"Munnar","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Munnar/Blanket Hotel & Spa/1739277429204-Blanket Hotel & Spa 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Munnar/Blanket Hotel & Spa/1739277429247-Blanket Hotel & Spa.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Exploring Munnar’s Natural Wonders","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, set out for Eravikulam National Park, a UNESCO-listed sanctuary known for its breathtaking landscapes and the rare Nilgiri Tahr. Wander through rolling meadows and misty hills, and if visiting in 2030, witness the mesmerizing bloom of Neelakurinji flowers, which paint the hills in a sea of blue once every 12 years. Later, immerse yourself in Munnar’s tea legacy with a visit to the Tata Tea Gardens & Museum, where you can stroll through lush plantations, learn about the intricate tea-making process, and sip on freshly brewed authentic Kerala chai. As the day winds down, savor a delicious sunset dinner at your scenic hilltop retreat before unwinding for the night. Overnight stay in Munnar.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Return to Kochi & Departure","day_summary":"

After a leisurely breakfast, bid farewell to Munnar’s serene landscapes and embark on a scenic drive back to Kochi. If time allows, indulge in some last-minute shopping at Lulu Mall, India’s largest shopping destination, offering everything from luxury brands to traditional Kerala souvenirs. Finally, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless transfer to Cochin International Airport, leaving you with cherished memories of Kerala’s breathtaking beauty, rich culture, and warm hospitality. Safe travels!

packages.overview: Your adventure begins with a warm welcome to Kochi, the Gateway to Kerala, where you'll explore the city’s vibrant markets, colonial architecture, and rich cultural heritage. From Kochi, journey to Munnar, where you'll be captivated by its scenic waterfalls and bustling local markets. In Munnar, discover the natural wonders of lush tea plantations and explore its wildlife in serene surroundings. Next, drift through the tranquil backwaters of Alleppey on a serene houseboat, immersing yourself in the beauty of Kerala’s waterways. Your journey continues with a visit to Kovalam Beach, where you can experience sunset serenity and unwind by the shore. Enjoy thrilling beach adventures and explore the coastal landscape before bidding farewell to Kerala’s enchanting beauty, taking home unforgettable memories of this tropical paradise.

After a delightful lunch, continue to the Jewish Synagogue in Jew Town, a fascinating glimpse into Kochi’s multicultural past. In the evening, explore local markets, perfect for souvenirs and spices. Return to the hotel for a delicious dinner, then retire for the night.

After a good night’s sleep and a delicious breakfast, set out for an exciting tour of Munnar. Begin by exploring local markets, where you can indulge in window shopping and browse through souvenirs, spices, and handcrafted items. Next, immerse yourself in nature’s beauty with visits to the stunning Attukad, Valara, and Cheeyappara waterfalls, where the cascading waters and lush greenery create a mesmerizing experience. Spend time soaking in the tranquil surroundings before heading back to the hotel. Enjoy a sumptuous dinner, reflecting on the day’s adventures, and retire for the night, preparing for another beautiful day in Kerala.

After a refreshing night’s sleep and a hearty breakfast, set out for another exciting day in Munnar. Begin with a visit to the serene Mattupetty Lake and Dam, followed by a tour of the Tea Museum, where you can learn about Munnar’s rich tea heritage. Next, head to Kundale Lake, a picturesque spot perfect for relaxation. After lunch, explore the Eravikulam Wildlife Sanctuary, the last refuge of the endangered Nilgiri Tahr goat. If time permits, visit the Chinnar Wildlife Sanctuary and admire the grandeur of Anamudi Hill, South India’s highest peak. Return to your hotel, enjoy a delicious dinner, and retire for the night.

After an early Kerala-style breakfast, embark on a scenic journey to Alleppey, often called the Venice of the East, with our Travelxploria representative ensuring a seamless transfer via a hired bus or taxi. Upon arrival, immerse yourself in the tranquil backwaters, where luxurious houseboats equipped with modern amenities glide through the scenic channels. If you choose, stay overnight in a houseboat, witnessing the still-working ancient Chinese fishing nets, lush paddy fields, swaying coconut groves, plantations, and historic temples. Alternatively, opt for a hotel stay, enjoy a relaxing boat ride, and end the day with a delectable Kerala-style dinner before retiring for the night.

Serenity at Kovalam Beach","day_summary":"

After an early Kerala-style breakfast aboard your houseboat, check out and set off for the world-famous Kovalam Beach, with our Travelxploria representative ensuring a comfortable 160 km journey by bus or taxi. Upon arrival, check in at a beachfront hotel and take some time to unwind. After a delightful lunch, relax before heading to Kovalam Beach in the evening to witness a breathtaking sunset over the Arabian Sea. Stroll along the shore, explore the surrounding sights, or simply soak in the tranquil beach vibes. Return to the hotel, enjoy a delicious dinner, and retire for the night, recharging for the adventures ahead.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast before heading to Kovalam Beach for an exciting morning of water sports and fun activities like jet skiing, parasailing, and surfing. After a refreshing time at the beach, enjoy a delicious lunch before either relaxing at your hotel or setting off on an afternoon exploration of nearby coastal gems. Visit Hawah Beach, Lighthouse Beach, Samudra Beach, and the historic Padmanabhapuram Palace. If time permits, explore Veli Tourist Village and the stunning Varkala Beach. After a day filled with adventure and scenic beauty, return to the hotel, enjoy a delightful dinner, and retire for the night.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Bidding Farewell to Kerala’s Beauty","day_summary":"

Rise early and pack up completely before checking out of the hotel. If time permits, take a short 15-minute drive to the magnificent Shri Anantha Padmanabhaswamy Temple in Trivandrum, a revered landmark known for its architectural grandeur and spiritual significance. After seeking blessings and capturing a few final moments of Kerala’s charm, head towards the airport or railway station, with our Travelxploria representative ensuring a smooth transfer. Depart with beautiful memories of this incredible journey, forever cherished in your smartphone or camera, as you head home, reminiscing about Kerala’s enchanting landscapes, cultural wonders, and warm hospitality.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Kovalam","to":"Cochin International Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview: Your journey begins with the awe-inspiring Athirappilly Waterfalls, where you’ll experience the majesty of Kerala’s "Niagara" in all its glory. Continue your adventure with scenic exploration, discovering other beautiful waterfalls and the lush landscapes that surround them. In Munnar, immerse yourself in the region's natural beauty, with its rolling tea plantations, mist-covered hills, and wildlife-rich forests. Finally, bid farewell to Munnar, taking with you unforgettable memories of its serene beauty and tranquil atmosphere.

[{"city":"Cochin","country":"India","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Discovering the Majestic Athirappilly Waterfalls","day_summary":"

Your journey begins with your arrival at Cochin airport or railway station, where you'll be greeted by our Travelxploria representative for a smooth transfer. After a refreshing stop, head straight towards Athirapally, located 66 km away. The scenic drive takes you through Kerala's lush landscapes. Upon arrival, check in at your hotel and unwind. After a delicious lunch, venture out to explore the Athirappilly Waterfalls, also known as the \"Niagara of India.\" Take in the breathtaking beauty of the cascading water and tranquil surroundings. Afterward, return to your hotel to relax, and retire for the day after a sumptuous dinner, ready for more adventures ahead.

After a good night’s sleep and a scrumptious breakfast, head back to the majestic Athirappilly Waterfalls. Take a refreshing bath at the base of the waterfall, keeping safety in mind, and capture beautiful moments with your camera. Next, begin your sightseeing tour by visiting nearby waterfalls like Charpa and Vazhachal. Continue exploring the serene beauty of Vazhachal Forest Gardens and the peaceful Thumpurmuzhi Gardens. After a day filled with nature’s wonders, return to your hotel to relax and enjoy a well-deserved dinner. Retire for the night, preparing for your next adventure to Munnar, located 133 km away.

After a good night’s sleep and a delicious breakfast at the hotel, embark on a day of exploration in Munnar and its picturesque surroundings. Start your journey with a visit to the scenic Mattupetty Dam and Lake, followed by the tranquil Photo Point and Eco Point. Continue your adventure with stops at Kundala Dam and Lake. Then, head to the Eravikulam Wildlife Sanctuary, home to the endangered Nilgiri Tahr goat, or explore the stunning Attukad, Valara, and Cheeyyappara Waterfalls. In the evening, visit the local markets in Munnar for some window shopping and souvenirs. After a day of sightseeing, return to your hotel for a delicious dinner and retire for the night, ready for more discoveries the next day.

packages.overview:
• Arrival at Goa – Transfer to hotel and check-in

  • Full day North Goa sightseeing (Calangute, Baga, Anjuna, Fort Aguada, etc.)

  • Leisure day – Relax, explore beaches, or enjoy water sports

  • Drive from North Goa to South Goa – Hotel transfer and check-in

  • Full day South Goa sightseeing (Miramar Beach, Dona Paula, Old Goa churches, temples)

  • Leisure day – Free for personal activities, spa, beach time

  • Departure from Goa – Check-out and transfer to airport/railway station

[{"city":"Goa","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Goa/1744828729801-AdobeStock_55809309.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Goa/1744828729953-AdobeStock_106207844.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Goa/1744828730022-AdobeStock_110941995.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Goa","day_summary":"

On arrival at Goa, our representative from Travelxploria, along with our experienced tour guide, will greet you warmly and ensure a comfortable transfer to your hotel. Upon arrival, check in and relax as you enjoy the rest of the day at leisure, soaking in the vibrant atmosphere of Goa.

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will take you on an exciting North Goa tour, exploring some of the region's most iconic attractions. Visit the Fort Aguada Lighthouse, stroll along the stunning beaches of Candolim, Calangute, and Baga, and experience the vibrant energy of Anjuna and Vagator. Conclude the day with a visit to the historic Chapora Fort, offering breathtaking panoramic views. After a day filled with adventure, return to your hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Leisure Day","day_summary":"

After breakfast, enjoy the day at your leisure, exploring Goa at your own pace. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will be available to assist with recommendations and activities to make the most of your time. Whether you choose to relax on the beach, indulge in local cuisine, or explore hidden gems, the day is yours to enjoy. Overnight stay at the hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Drive to North Goa to South Goa","day_summary":"

After breakfast, drive to South Goa with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, who will provide insightful information about the region’s rich heritage, serene beaches, and historical landmarks, making your journey even more memorable.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full day South Goa Sightseeing","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will accompany you on an enriching South Goa tour. Explore the historic Old Goa Church, seek blessings at Mangueshi & Mahalaxmi Temples, and take a guided Margao city tour. Enjoy the scenic beauty of Miramar Beach, visit the iconic Dona Paula viewpoint, and admire the architecture of Panjim Church. After a day filled with exploration and insights, return to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Leisure Day","day_summary":"

After breakfast, enjoy a leisure day for your own activities, whether it's relaxing at the beach, exploring local markets, or indulging in water sports. Our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will be available to assist you with recommendations and arrangements to make the most of your day. Overnight stay at the hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure ","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will assist you as we proceed towards Goa Airport for your departure. We at Travelxploria hope to have made your stay memorable and enjoyable, ensuring that you carry back a bundle of happy memories from your wonderful journey. packages.overview:
• ​Goa: India’s beach paradise, known for its golden beaches, nightlife, Portuguese heritage, and adventure activities.
  • ​North Goa Sightseeing: Explore Aguada Fort, Baga Beach, Anjuna Beach, Vagator Beach, and the vibrant nightlife.​
  • South Goa Sightseeing: Visit serene beaches like Colva and Palolem, Basilica of Bom Jesus, Se Cathedral, and spice plantations.
  • ​Dudhsagar Falls: Witness the breathtaking milky cascades surrounded by lush greenery and enjoy a jeep safari.​

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will accompany you on an exciting North Goa tour. Explore the iconic Fort Aguada Lighthouse, followed by visits to the stunning beaches of Candolim, Calangute, Baga, Anjuna, and Vagator. Discover the historic Chapora Fort, offering breathtaking views of the coastline. After a day filled with exploration and scenic beauty, return to the hotel for an overnight stay, with the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria ensuring a seamless experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Full day South Goa Sightseeing","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria will take you on an enriching South Goa tour. Begin with a visit to the Old Goa Church, followed by the revered Mangueshi and Mahalaxmi Temples. Continue to Margao for a sightseeing tour before heading to the picturesque Miramar Beach and the scenic Dona Paula viewpoint. Conclude the day with a visit to the Panjim Church, soaking in the cultural and architectural beauty of the region. After a memorable day, return to the hotel for an overnight stay, with the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria ensuring a seamless experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Dudhsagar Falls","day_summary":"

After breakfast, embark on an exciting journey to Dudhsagar Falls with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. Nestled within the Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park in the Western Ghats, these majestic falls mark a breathtaking point along the Mandovi River as it flows toward Panjim and meets the Arabian Sea. Surrounded by lush deciduous forests teeming with rich biodiversity, the falls offer a mesmerizing spectacle, especially during the monsoon season, when torrential rains transform them into a massive cascading sheet of water. Even during the dry season, the natural beauty of the area remains captivating. With the best on-ground support staff of Travelxploria ensuring a seamless experience, enjoy this unforgettable encounter with nature before returning to your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

After breakfast, our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria and our best on-ground support staff will assist you with a smooth transfer to Goa Airport for your departure. As your memorable journey comes to an end, we at Travelxploria hope that we have made your stay truly worthwhile, ensuring that you leave with a bundle of happy memories to cherish forever. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again on another incredible adventure.

packages.overview:
To travel is to live and appreciate the moment. Who wouldn’t want a quick break from their busy life and spend a good time traveling in India’s Golden Triangle Tour Package? Here, we present our 7-Day Delhi, Agra, Jaipur Tour Package, a jam-packed itinerary featuring awesome destinations that showcase the very best of India.

Travel to India’s most famous circuit and explore the star destinations of the country in an unforgettable experience. The Golden Triangle India Tour is a remarkable amalgamation of architectural wonders, religious hubs, cultural heritage, and vibrant traditions. This widely popular journey has won the hearts of travelers from around the world. As the name suggests, this tour kicks off from Delhi, heads to Agra, and completes the triangle in Jaipur — highlighting world wonders like the Taj Mahal, the royal palaces of Jaipur, and India’s rich history.

Take a sneak peek inside the urban hub of New Delhi, sightseeing, painted with historic hues and monuments like India Gate, Red Fort, and Qutub Minar. Next, head to Agra and witness the grand Taj Mahal, the ivory-marble symbol of love with its Quranic inscriptions and stunning minarets. This Golden Triangle Trip wouldn’t be complete without Jaipur, the Pink City, famous for its blend of Rajasthani and Mughal architecture. Explore Jaipur attractions such as the Hawa Mahal, Amber Fort, and City Palace, each offering unforgettable memories.

Join us on this epic 6 Nights 7 Days Golden Triangle Tour Itinerary and enjoy a memorable journey through Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur — the cultural heart of India. Whether you’re looking for a luxury Golden Triangle tour package or a budget-friendly Golden Triangle trip, this experience will leave you spellbound.

Explore the captivating sights of Delhi on your Golden Triangle Tour

On the second day of your 7-Day Delhi Agra Jaipur Tour Package, enjoy a delicious breakfast before setting out to discover the highlights of Delhi sightseeing. Guided by our expert team, you will visit iconic landmarks such as the India Gate war memorial, Parliament House, President’s House, and the Secretariat Building, along with spiritual sites like Jama Masjid and the Lotus Temple.


No Golden Triangle India Tour is complete without exploring the historic Qutub Minar, Red Fort, Raj Ghat, and Shanti Vana — monuments that showcase Delhi’s rich heritage. After an enriching day of sightseeing in Delhi, return to your hotel for a comfortable overnight stay.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Agra","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Agra/1748096443680-AdobeStock_93053831-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Agra/1748096443722-AdobeStock_304852693-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Agra/1748096443712-AdobeStock_265642486-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Agra/1748096443686-AdobeStock_106687265-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Agra/1748096443695-AdobeStock_222315662-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Agra: Delhi - Agra","day_summary":"

Be mesmerized by the historic wonders of Agra

On the third day of your journey, enjoy a hearty breakfast before checking out from your hotel. You will be transferred from Delhi to the historic city of Agra, a magnificent Mughal-era destination in Uttar Pradesh. Upon arrival, check into your hotel to freshen up before visiting the iconic Taj Mahal—one of the world’s wonders, built by Emperor Shah Jahan in loving memory of his wife, Queen Mumtaz Mahal.

In addition to the Taj Mahal, explore the impressive Agra Fort, the former main residence of the Mughal emperors. This tour offers a rich cultural experience filled with history and stunning architecture. After a memorable day, return to your hotel for an overnight stay.

Agra - Jaipur","day_summary":"

Explore the UNESCO World Heritage Site En Route to Jaipur

After enjoying your morning breakfast, check out from the hotel and begin your journey towards Jaipur, the vibrant capital of Rajasthan. En route, you’ll have the opportunity to explore some fascinating historical landmarks, including Jama Masjid, Diwan-e-Aam, Buland Darwaza, the Tomb of Salim Chisti, and Panch Mahal. A major highlight is Fatehpur Sikri, a UNESCO World Heritage Site built by Emperor Akbar, showcasing the grandeur of Mughal architecture.

After an enriching stopover, continue your journey to Jaipur. Upon arrival, check in at the hotel and relax for an overnight stay.

Discover the Royal Charm of the Pink City

On the fifth day of your journey, start your morning with a delightful breakfast before setting out to explore Jaipur, famously known as the Pink City. Begin your sightseeing with a visit to the iconic Hawa Mahal (Palace of Winds), followed by the Jantar Mantar, a UNESCO World Heritage Site renowned for its ancient astronomical instruments. Continue to the majestic City Palace, a grand architectural marvel that reflects the royal heritage of Jaipur.

As you explore the city, immerse yourself in its vibrant culture—shop for traditional Rajasthani attire, colorful footwear, junk jewelry, and exquisite handicrafts. After a culturally enriching day, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Jaipur: A full day tour to Ajmer","day_summary":"

Explore the Sacred Cities of Pushkar and Ajmer

On the sixth day of your tour, enjoy a delicious breakfast and check out from the hotel as you set off for a day trip to Ajmer and Pushkar. Upon arrival, you will be warmly welcomed and guided by our Travelxploria representative. Begin your visit with the revered Dargah Sharif, the tomb of Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti, a major pilgrimage site attracting devotees from all over the world.

Continue your journey to Pushkar, known for its spiritual aura and scenic charm. Here, you’ll visit the Brahma Temple, one of the few temples dedicated to Lord Brahma. After exploring the spiritual and cultural highlights of these sacred cities, return to Jaipur for an overnight stay at your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Jaipur: Departure","day_summary":"

Cherishing the Final Day of a Memorable Journey

On the final day of your incredible journey, enjoy a hearty breakfast before packing your bags. After check-out from the hotel, our Travelxploria Representative will assist you with a smooth transfer to the Jaipur Airport/Railway Station for your return journey home. Depart with a heart full of unforgettable memories and experiences from this enriching trip.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Jaipur","to":"Jaipur International Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Delhi, check into the hotel, and explore Chandni Chowk’s vibrant local markets.
  • Full-day sightseeing of Old and New Delhi’s iconic landmarks, followed by local market exploration.
  • Travel to Agra and visit the magnificent Agra Fort and Taj Mahal, with evening time at Agra’s bazaars.
  • Journey to Jaipur via a visit to Fatehpur Sikri and explore Jaipur’s evening markets.
  • Full-day tour of Jaipur including Amer Fort with optional elephant or jeep ride, and City Palace; evening at leisure for shopping.
  • After breakfast, transfer to Jaipur Airport or Railway Station for your onward journey.

Delhi/1748069058964-The Grand New Delhi 1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Delhi Sightseeings","day_summary":"

In the morning, your sightseeing tour begins with a visit to the bustling walled city of Old Delhi, rich with history and vibrant street life. Experience the grandeur of the Red Fort, once the seat of Mughal power, and visit Jama Masjid, India’s largest mosque built in the 17th century.

Next, drive through New Delhi to see iconic landmarks such as Raj Ghat, India Gate, Rashtrapati Bhawan (Presidential Palace), the Parliament House, and other impressive colonial-era buildings designed by the renowned British architect Edwin Lutyens.

Conclude the day with visits to the majestic Qutub Minar and the stunning Humayun’s Tomb, a magnificent example of Persian-influenced Mughal architecture.

In the evening, enjoy exploring Delhi’s vibrant local markets. Overnight stay in Delhi.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Agra","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Agra/1748096443722-AdobeStock_304852693-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Agra/1748096443680-AdobeStock_93053831-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Agra/1748096443712-AdobeStock_265642486-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Agra/1748096443686-AdobeStock_106687265-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Agra/1748096443695-AdobeStock_222315662-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Delhi - Agra","day_summary":"

After breakfast, proceed to Agra to explore the architectural marvels of the Mughal golden era. Upon arrival, visit the Agra Fort, an impressive blend of Hindu and Mughal architecture, originally built by the Rajputs and later enhanced by various Mughal emperors using red sandstone, bricks, and exquisite white marble from Makrana.

Next, visit the iconic Taj Mahal, a timeless symbol of eternal love situated on the southern bank of the Yamuna River. This stunning monument was commissioned by the fifth Mughal Emperor, Shah Jahan, in memory of his beloved wife, Mumtaz Mahal, who passed away in the 16th century. The Taj Mahal’s breathtaking symmetry and intricate white marble inlays continue to captivate visitors worldwide.

Important Note: The Taj Mahal is closed on Fridays.

In the evening, explore the bustling local bazaars where the descendants of the artisans who crafted the Taj Mahal still practice their exquisite marble craftsmanship. Overnight stay in Agra.

- Jaipur","day_summary":"

After breakfast, proceed to Jaipur, the vibrant capital of Rajasthan famously known as the \"Pink City.\" En route, visit Fatehpur Sikri, the magnificent and well-preserved deserted Mughal royal city that served as Emperor Akbar’s political capital for 14 years before being abandoned in 1585 due to a severe drought.

Conclude the day by exploring Jaipur’s lively evening markets, renowned for their colorful handicrafts and local artistry. Overnight stay in Jaipur.

This morning, you will drive just outside Jaipur to visit the majestic Amer Fort, the former capital of the Jaipur Empire, where you can enjoy an elephant ride or jeep ride (optional, on your own). On the way to Amer, you will stop to admire the iconic Hawa Mahal.

Later, visit the City Palace and take a stroll to Jantar Mantar, the 17th-century astronomical observatory.

The rest of the evening is at your leisure for shopping and personal activities. Overnight stay at the Jaipur hotel.

packages.overview:
• Sonar Quila – Explore India’s only living fort, a golden-hued marvel where history breathes through its vibrant alleys and ancient Havelis.

  • Patwon ki Haveli – Step into a 500-year-old architectural masterpiece, once home to Jaisalmer’s wealthiest merchants, adorned with intricate carvings.

  • Jain Temples – Discover exquisitely sculpted temples showcasing Jaisalmer’s deep spiritual roots and the grandeur of Jain architecture.

  • Sam Sand Dunes – Embark on a thrilling desert adventure with camel safaris, jeep rides, and breathtaking sunset views.

  • Cultural Night – Experience Rajasthan’s vibrant spirit with mesmerizing folk performances and a lavish traditional dinner under the star-lit sky.

  • Tanot Mata Temple – Witness the legend of a temple that miraculously withstood enemy shelling during the Indo-Pak war.

  • Longewala Post – Relive history at the battleground of the 1971 war, where valor and patriotism echo through every corner.

  • Jaisalmer War Museum – Pay tribute to India’s brave soldiers while exploring war relics, inspiring stories, and battle history.

  • Tazia Tower – Admire this five-story architectural marvel, reflecting a blend of Rajput and Mughal craftsmanship.

As you arrive in Jaipur, the vibrant heart of Rajasthan, a warm welcome awaits you from our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your journey. Whether you land at the airport or step off the train, you’ll be greeted with genuine hospitality and escorted to your accommodation. Take some time to relax and soak in the regal charm of the Pink City. Later, begin your exploration with the majestic City Palace, where Mughal and Rajput architecture blend beautifully. As evening falls, admire the Palace of the Winds (Hawa Mahal) glowing in soft pink lights before returning to your hotel.

Day for Sonar Quila with Desert Safari & Camping","day_summary":"

Explore the Golden Fort of Jaisalmer, India’s only living fort, where over 30,000 people reside within its ancient walls. Stroll through its narrow lanes, visiting Nathmal Ki Haveli, Salim Singh Ki Haveli, and the magnificent Patwon Ki Haveli, a 500-year-old mansion of wealthy merchants. Discover beautifully carved Jain temples, reflecting the city’s spiritual heritage. After lunch, head to Sam Sand Dunes, stopping at the Amar Sagar Jain Temple on the way. Enjoy thrilling activities like camel safari, jeep safari, and quad biking before witnessing a breathtaking sunset. End the day with a cultural folk performance and a delicious buffet dinner at the desert camp.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Jaipur","to":"Jaisalmer","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"3":[{"h_id":1068,"h_name":"Deluxe Tent","h_country":"India","h_city":"Jaisalmer","h_type":"Camp","h_rating":"3","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Jaisalmer/Deluxe Tent/1743836993939-getlstd-property-photo.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Jaisalmer/Deluxe Tent/1743837013035-camp-2.jpg\"}]"}],"4":[{"h_id":1069,"h_name":"Executive Tent","h_country":"India","h_city":"Jaisalmer","h_type":"Camp","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Jaisalmer/Executive Tent/1743837062570-566426845.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Jaisalmer/Executive Tent/1743837062673-gallery-3.jpg\"}]"}],"5":[{"h_id":1070,"h_name":"Premium Tent","h_country":"India","h_city":"Jaisalmer","h_type":"Camp","h_rating":"5","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Jaisalmer/Premium Tent/1743837193189-32.jpeg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Jaisalmer/Premium Tent/1743837193277-lux-tent.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Day tour towards Indo-Pak border","day_summary":"

Today, check out from the desert camp and embark on a journey to Longewala, the historic battlefield of the 1971 Indo-Pak war. The first stop is the revered Tanot Mata Temple, known for its miraculous survival during the war despite multiple bombshells landing nearby, none exploded. After paying respects, continue to the Longewala War Memorial, where you can witness war relics, tanks, and stories of valor. By evening, return to Jaisalmer city, unwind at your hotel, and reflect on the incredible history and culture experienced throughout the day.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

After a delightful stay in Jaisalmer, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with check-out from the hotel. Before heading to the airport or railway station, take some time to explore the vibrant local markets, where you can pick up handcrafted souvenirs, intricate textiles, and exquisite Rajasthani jewelry. If time permits, visit the Jaisalmer War Museum, a tribute to the bravery of Indian soldiers, and the Tazia Tower, an architectural marvel with a fascinating history. As your journey comes to an end, our representative will ensure a smooth transfer, leaving you with unforgettable memories of the Golden City.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Bus","from":"Jaisalmer","to":"Jaipur","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview:
• Hawa Mahal – Witness the grandeur of Jaipur’s iconic "Palace of Winds," a stunning architectural marvel with intricate latticework.

  • Birla Temple – Experience divine serenity at this beautifully crafted white marble temple.

  1. Sisodiya Rani Bagh – Stroll through lush gardens with cascading fountains and intricate murals narrating royal love stories.

  • Jal Mahal – Admire the ethereal beauty of this floating palace on the tranquil waters of Man Sagar Lake.

  • Jantar Mantar – Marvel at the astronomical precision of this UNESCO-listed observatory.

  • Nahargarh Fort – Capture breathtaking panoramic views of Jaipur’s skyline from this historic hilltop fortress.

  • Abhaneri Step Well – Be amazed by the stunning geometric patterns of this ancient water reservoir.

  • Chokhi Dhani – Immerse in Rajasthani culture with vibrant folk performances and a delectable traditional feast.

  • Sambhar Lake – Witness the vast, glistening saltwater expanse, home to mesmerizing flocks of flamingos.

  • Pushkar Lake – Feel the divine aura of this sacred lake, surrounded by 52 picturesque ghats.

  • Brahma Temple – Pay homage at one of the world’s rarest temples dedicated to Lord Brahma.

  • Savitri Mata Temple – Hike up to this serene hilltop temple for mesmerizing panoramic views of Pushkar.

  • Ajmer Dargah – Seek blessings at the revered shrine of Sufi saint Khwaja Moinuddin Chisti.

  • Ranthambore National Park – Embark on a thrilling safari to spot majestic tigers in their natural habitat.

  • Ranthambore Fort – Step into history as you explore this ancient fort amidst the wilderness.

  • Khandar Fort – Discover the rustic charm of this lesser-known yet fascinating fort.

[{"city":"Jaipur","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Jaipur/1744987151116-AdobeStock_67328778.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Jaipur/1744987151915-AdobeStock_216442121.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Jaipur/1744987318147-AdobeStock_190327104.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Jaipur/1744987319013-AdobeStock_451245409.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Welcome to Jaipur","day_summary":"

Your journey begins with an early morning arrival at Jaipur’s airport or railway station. Upon reaching the historic Pink City, our friendly Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth check-in at your hotel, where you can unwind and refresh. In the afternoon, visit the world-renowned Hawa Mahal, followed by the peaceful Birla Temple. As the day winds down, explore the beautiful Sisodia Rani Bagh, before heading to the sparkling Jal Mahal in the middle of Man Sagar Lake. Your day ends with a relaxing dinner at the hotel, and our representative will be there to assist you every step of the way.

Start your day early, enjoying the renowned Rajasthani hospitality with a hearty and traditional breakfast. After you’re fueled up, embark on a fascinating tour of Jaipur, beginning with the awe-inspiring Jantar Mantar observatory. Next, head to the majestic Nahargarh Fort, where you can take in the stunning views of the Pink City. In the afternoon, venture out to the historic Abhaneri Step Well, an architectural marvel. Return to the city for some souvenir hunting at the bustling local markets. As evening falls, indulge in a delicious Rajasthani dinner at Chokhi Dhani village resort, accompanied by vibrant live performances. Return to your hotel to relax and retire for the night.

From Jaipur to Pushkar is a scenic 3-hour drive (around 150 km) through Rajasthan’s rustic landscapes. Once in Pushkar, a spiritual and cultural gem, you can explore the sacred Pushkar Lake, visit the rare Brahma Temple, and stroll through the vibrant Pushkar Bazaar. Don’t miss the Savitri Temple perched on a hilltop, offering panoramic views, and if you're lucky, catch the Pushkar Camel Fair if it's that time of year. The town’s serene vibe, ghats, and cafes make it perfect for a peaceful day trip or short getaway.

As part of Project Tiger, this sanctuary has been home to numerous majestic tigers, including the legendary ‘Machli.’ Upon arrival, check into a charming jungle resort and freshen up. After a delightful lunch, spend a leisurely afternoon with your newlywed wife, soaking in the tranquility of the forest from your resort. As evening falls, witness the breathtaking sunset behind the dense jungle canopy. Enjoy a hearty dinner before retiring for the night.

Sanctuary","day_summary":"

Rise early, freshen up, and set off for an exhilarating adventure into the heart of Ranthambore Wildlife Sanctuary after a quick breakfast. Embark on a thrilling 3-hour jeep safari, accompanied by expert forest guides, as you traverse the vast 282 sq. km sanctuary. If luck is on your side, you may catch a glimpse of the majestic tigers in their natural habitat, along with leopards, deer, and other wildlife. The sanctuary is also a paradise for bird lovers, home to peacocks, eagles, and kites. Explore the ancient Ranthambore Fort and Khandar Fort before unwinding in the evening, watching the golden sunset. Relive the day’s adventure over a hearty dinner before retiring for the night.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

After a hearty breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with check-out and ensure a smooth transfer to the airport or railway station based on your departure schedule. With your bags packed and heart full of memories, take one last look at the vibrant landscapes, the majestic forts, and the cultural wonders you've explored.

packages.overview:
1. Rajasthan: India’s royal state, known for its grand palaces, desert landscapes, and rich cultural heritage.

  2. Jaipur: The Pink City, famous for Amer Fort, City Palace, Hawa Mahal, and vibrant bazaars.

  3. Udaipur: The City of Lakes, featuring the stunning Lake Pichola, City Palace, and Jag Mandir, ideal for romantic getaways.

  4. Mount Abu: Rajasthan’s only hill station, offering cool weather, the serene Nakki Lake, and the intricate Dilwara Temples.

As evening falls, indulge in an authentic Rajasthani dinner at Choki Dhani Village Resort, complete with traditional performances. After a memorable day, return to your hotel for a peaceful night’s rest.

Get up early, have a hearty breakfast, and check out to bid adieu to Udaipur as you head towards Mount Abu. Known as the only hill station in Rajasthan, Mount Abu offers a refreshing escape, with temperatures sometimes dropping to zero degrees during winter. Upon arrival, check into the hotel and relax. After lunch, begin your exploration with a visit to Guru Shikhar, the highest point. Continue to Trevor's Tank and the Achaleshwar Mahadev Temple. Later, enjoy a peaceful visit to Nakki Lake. In the evening, watch the sunset at Sunset Point. Explore the local markets before returning to the hotel for a restful night after dinner.

packages.overview:
• Birla Temple: Marvel at the serene architecture of this stunning temple, dedicated to Lord Vishnu and Lakshmi.

  • Jaigarh Fort: Explore the grandeur of this historic fort, offering panoramic views of Jaipur and its surroundings.

  • Sisodia Rani Ka Bagh: Stroll through the lush gardens with intricate frescoes, providing a peaceful retreat from city life.

  • Choki Dhani: Immerse yourself in authentic Rajasthani culture with traditional performances and a delightful Rajasthani feast.

  • Jantar Mantar: Discover the fascinating astronomical instruments at this UNESCO World Heritage Site, offering insight into ancient science.

  • Nahargarh Fort: Enjoy breathtaking views of Jaipur from this majestic hilltop fort, blending history and scenic beauty.

  • Amer Fort: Explore the regal charm of this grand fort, showcasing rich Rajasthani architecture and history.

  • Hawa Mahal: Admire the iconic pink façade and intricate lattice work of this palace, a symbol of Jaipur's royal heritage.

  • Johri Bazaar: Wander through the bustling market, perfect for souvenir hunting, especially for traditional jewelry.

  • Shri Laxminath Temple: Visit this tranquil and historic temple, dedicated to Lord Vishnu and Lakshmi.

  • Karni Mata Temple: Experience the unique and sacred site, famous for its thousands of holy rats.

  • Jaisalmer Fort (Sonar Kella): Explore the golden grandeur of Jaisalmer’s fort, a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

  • Patwon-Ki-Haveli: Step into this architectural marvel, showcasing intricate carvings and ancient grandeur.

  • Sam Sand Dunes: Feel the thrill of a camel safari across the vast golden desert, where the beauty of Rajasthan unfolds.

  • Desert National Park: Explore the unique ecosystem of the desert, home to rare wildlife and stunning landscapes.

  • Mehrangarh Fort: Discover the historical richness of Jodhpur’s imposing fort, offering spectacular views of the “Blue City.”

  • Umaid Bhavan Palace: Visit this majestic palace, a blend of royal history and luxurious heritage.

  • Jodhpur Markets: Shop for authentic Jodhpuri footwear, a perfect souvenir to remember your journey.

[{"city":"Jaipur","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Jaipur/1744987151116-AdobeStock_67328778.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Jaipur/1744987151915-AdobeStock_216442121.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Jaipur/1744987318147-AdobeStock_190327104.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Jaipur/1744987319013-AdobeStock_451245409.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Welcome to Jaipur","day_summary":"

Your journey begins with an early morning arrival at Jaipur, the vibrant Pink City. Upon arrival, you’ll be greeted by a representative from Travelxploria who will guide you to your hotel for a relaxing check-in. After lunch, immerse yourself in the city’s history with visits to the peaceful Birla Temple, the majestic Jaigarh Fort, and the charming Sisodia Rani Ka Bagh. As evening falls, explore the bustling markets of the old city, perfect for window shopping. For a unique experience, head to Choki Dhani, where you’ll enjoy a traditional Rajasthani dinner with live performances and cultural reenactments before retiring to your hotel for the night.

Start your day early with a delightful Rajasthani breakfast before heading out to explore Jaipur. Begin your tour with a visit to Jantar Mantar, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Next, explore the historic Nahargarh Fort complex and the majestic Amer Fort. After spending ample time there, continue your journey to Hawa Mahal, City Palace, and the Albert Hall Museum. In the afternoon, immerse yourself in the vibrant city markets, including the famous Johri Bazaar, perfect for souvenir hunting. After a busy day of sightseeing, return to your hotel and unwind with a delicious dinner before calling it a day.

Start your day early and check out of your hotel in Jaipur after a hearty breakfast, then embark on your journey to Bikaner. Upon arrival, check into your hotel and unwind with some relaxation after lunch. In the late afternoon, visit the beautiful Shri Laxminath Temple, the stunning Gajner Palace, and the magnificent Lalgarh Palace. Explore the Ganga Singh Museum, then continue to the famous Karni Mata Temple, Rampuria Haveli, Bhanwar Niwas Haveli, and the serene Chatri of Devi Kund Sagar. In the evening, sample Bikaner’s renowned snacks from the local market. Return to the hotel after dinner and rest for the night.

to Jaisalmer, the Golden City","day_summary":"

Start your day early, bid adieu to Bikaner, and check out of your hotel after a hearty breakfast for your journey to Jaisalmer, the Golden City. Upon arrival, check into your hotel and unwind after a relaxing lunch. In the late afternoon, head out to explore the majestic Jaisalmer Fort, also known as 'Sonar Kella,' and marvel at its grandeur. Later, visit the Patwon-Ki-Haveli and the fascinating Thar Heritage Museum. As the evening sets in, explore the vibrant local markets and indulge in some exquisite handicraft shopping. Return to the hotel after dinner and call it a day.

Rise early and start your day with a hearty breakfast before heading straight to the tranquil Gadisar Lake, followed by a visit to the intricately designed Nathmal Ki Haveli. After immersing yourself in the local culture, embark on a thrilling desert safari around Jaisalmer, either on camelback or by jeep, with your newlywed wife by your side. A visit to the Sam and Khuri Sand Dunes is a must to experience the vast desert landscape. For the adventurous, try paragliding with expert guidance. After lunch, explore the Desert National Park. In the evening, enjoy the famed Rajasthani hospitality at a desert camp, where folk artists perform, and conclude the day with a traditional Rajasthani thali dinner in the tents, before retiring for the night.

Get up early, bid farewell to the Golden City, and check out of the hotel after a delicious breakfast for your journey to the ‘Blue City’ Jodhpur. Upon arrival, check into your hotel, freshen up, and unwind until lunch. Afterward, head out to explore the mighty Mehrangarh Fort, with a visit to the stunning Rao Jodha Desert Rock Park and Jaswant Thada along the way. Continue your tour with a visit to the Sachiya Mata Temple, followed by the grandeur of Umaid Bhavan Palace. In the evening, wander through the local markets to shop for the iconic Jodhpuri shoes and sandals. Late at night, return to the hotel and retire for the day after a fulfilling dinner.

packages.overview:
1. Arrive Srinagar Airport – Begin your journey amidst the lush valleys of Kashmir.

  2. Srinagar – Sonamarg – Kargil (250 km / 7–8 hrs) – Scenic drive via Zoji La to reach Kargil.

  3. Kargil – Leh (6–7 hrs) – Drive through Lamayuru and Fotu La to reach Leh.

  4. Leh – Hemis – Thiksey – Shey – 3 Idiots School – Sindhu Darshan – Explore monasteries, heritage sites, and cultural landmarks.

  5. Leh – Khardung La – Nubra Valley – Hunder Sand Dunes (120 km / 4–5 hrs) – Cross the world’s highest motorable road into desert terrain.

  6. Visit Diskit Monastery – Explore the 515-year-old monastery and giant Maitreya Buddha.

  7. Nubra – Pangong Lake (155 km) – Drive via Shayok to the mesmerizing high-altitude lake.

  8. Pangong – Leh + Leh Palace & Shanti Stupa – Return via Chang La and enjoy panoramic views in Leh.

  9. Depart Leh – Transfer to airport for your onward journey.

Sonamarg Kargil 7/8 Hrs drive 250 Kms","day_summary":"

Depart from Srinagar as per road opening timings, accompanied by our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide. The drive to Sonamarg unveils the spectacular countryside of Kashmir in the Sindh Valley. The Sindhu Valley, the largest tributary of the Kashmir Valley, offers breathtaking views. Continue the journey towards Sonamarg (2740 Mtrs), with a scenic drive through panoramic villages. From Sonamarg, the road becomes rougher, passing through the wet Zojila Pass (3527 Mtrs), known as the Gateway to Ladakh. Continue towards Drass, the second coldest inhabited place in the world. After another two-and-a-half-hour drive, we will arrive in Kargil (2710 Mtrs), a town that gained prominence after Ladakh opened to tourism in 1974.

Overnight stay at the hotel. (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner)

to Leh 6/7 Hrs drive","day_summary":"

Depart from Kargil after an early breakfast, accompanied by our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide. En route, visit the Mulbekh Monastery and Lamayuru Monastery, famous for its Moonlandscape, passing through Namkila and Fatula Passes, the highest points on the Srinagar-Leh road. Continue the drive towards Leh, stopping at the 1000-year-old Alchi Monastery, the only Gompa in the Ladakh region situated on flat ground. Proceed to Likir Monastery, where you’ll be awestruck by the splendid three-storey Dharma Wheel Gompa and the massive Buddha statues.

Next, visit the Indus & Zanskar River Sangam, and continue driving along the Indus River to visit Pathar Sahib Gurdwara and Magnetic Hill, where the cars defy gravity. Further on, stop at the Leh Hall of Fame, which houses a museum dedicated to the Kargil War memorabilia.

Overnight stay at the hotel. (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner)

Tree/1742544194347-332813104.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Tour of Hemis, Thiksey Shey monastery 3 Idiots School Campus Sindhu Darshan","day_summary":"

After a leisurely breakfast, our Travelxploria representative, along with our experienced tour guide, will accompany you for a visit to Hemis Monastery, located 45 km west of Leh. Hemis is the largest and wealthiest monastery in Ladakh. After exploring Hemis, you will drive back on the same route to visit Thiksey Monastery, perched on a hillock with stunning views of the Indus Valley. Thiksey is renowned for its massive seated statue of Maitreya Buddha and its Dukhang assembly hall, which houses hundreds of prayer books, stacked between wooden covers and bound in silk.

Next, continue your journey through a series of chortens to visit Shey Palace, the former summer palace of the Kings of Ladakh. Later, you will visit the 3 Idiots School Campus and Sindhu Darshan.

Overnight stay at the hotel. (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner)

After breakfast, your Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide will accompany you on a scenic drive to Nubra Valley via Khardungla, the highest motorable road in the world at 18,380 ft. You will arrive at Hundur by the afternoon. After lunch, you’ll have free time to explore the Deskit and Hunder Villages. Enjoy a memorable camel safari on the sand dunes between Deskit and Hunder Village, guided by the best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria.

Overnight stay at the camp (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner).

of Pangong Lake- It is the highest land locked lake (155 Kms One way)","day_summary":"

After an early breakfast, your Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide will accompany you as you leave for Pangong Lake (14,500 ft), passing through Changla Pass (17,350 ft), the third highest motorable road in the world. Upon arrival at Pangong Lake, the highest saltwater lake in the world, shared by both India and China, you will be mesmerized by the breathtaking beauty of the lake. Take in the changing colors and appreciate the fascinating high-altitude surroundings. Our best on-ground support staff will be there to assist you throughout the journey.

Overnight stay at the hotel (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner).

After breakfast, your Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide will accompany you to visit Pangong Lake at sunrise to witness its mesmerizing beauty at the break of dawn. Afterward, you will drive back to Leh. In the late afternoon, visit the iconic Leh Palace and Shanti Stupa, with stunning panoramic views of the town and its surroundings. Later, enjoy a leisurely walk around the local market, where you can explore local crafts and souvenirs. Our best on-ground support staff will ensure that your day is seamless and enjoyable.

Overnight stay at the hotel (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner).

packages.overview:
Dal Lake Houseboat Stay – Experience luxury on Srinagar’s tranquil waters, surrounded by enchanting mountain reflections and floating gardens.
Sonamarg Excursion – Marvel at golden meadows, glacial streams, and snow-capped peaks in this breathtaking valley.
Thajiwas Glacier Adventure – Explore a pristine wonderland of snow and ice, with panoramic views of majestic mountains.
Manasbal Lake Retreat – Discover Kashmir’s deepest lake, a hidden gem reflecting the serene beauty of the surrounding landscapes.
Verinag Spring – Admire the octagonal marvel with crystal-clear waters, embraced by lush pine forests and vibrant flowers.
Gulmarg Gondola Ride – Ascend into the clouds for mesmerizing views of verdant meadows and towering Himalayan peaks.
Yousmarg Meadows – Wander through lush green pastures, surrounded by dense pine forests and awe-inspiring snow-capped peaks.
Mughal Gardens Tour – Stroll through Nishat and Shalimar Bagh, where cascading fountains and symmetrical terraces create timeless beauty.
Pahalgam Valley – Embrace nature’s charm at the confluence of Lidder River, amid rolling meadows and pine-covered slopes.
Baisaren Village – A peaceful retreat nestled in towering fir and pine forests, offering untouched tranquility and rustic charm.

Enjoy an overnight stay at hotel.

Srinagar","day_summary":"

After breakfast, head to Manasbal Lake. Known as the deepest lake in Kashmir, it is often referred to as a \"gem\" among the region's lakes. The serene waters and picturesque surroundings offer a peaceful retreat, especially during summer when the lake forms secure ice layers. Explore the beauty of this tranquil spot before returning to Srinagar in the evening for a comfortable overnight stay at your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Day trip to Verinag & Stay at Srinagar","day_summary":"

After breakfast, proceed to Verinag, home to the serene Verinag Spring. The spring's octagonal shape is surrounded by tall pine trees and vibrant flowers. The sparkling clear waters reflect the calm beauty of the area, creating a peaceful atmosphere. After exploring this natural wonder, return to Srinagar in the evening for an overnight stay at your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Day trip to Gulmarg & Stay at Srinagar","day_summary":"

Early in the morning, drive through willow trees, fast-flowing streams, and lush meadows towards Gulmarg, the \"Meadow of Flowers.\" Surrounded by towering snow-capped peaks and dense coniferous forests, it offers stunning views at every turn. Stroll or take a pony ride to the world’s highest golf course, and experience the thrill of the Gondola lift. After a day filled with natural beauty and adventure, return to Srinagar in the evening for a overnight stay at your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Day trip to Yousmarg & Stay at Srinagar","day_summary":"

After breakfast, drive to Yousmarg, located 50 km from Srinagar in the Badgam district. The two-hour drive is a treat, passing through lush green meadows, dense pine forests, and breathtaking snow-capped mountains. Yousmarg, with its peaceful ambiance, is perfect for picnics and long walks amidst nature’s beauty. In the evening, return to Srinagar for an overnight stay at your hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Srinagar Local Sightseeing & Stay at Srinagar","day_summary":"

After breakfast, set off to explore the Mughal gardens of Srinagar Nishat Bagh and Shalimar Bagh, both nestled on the banks of Dal Lake. Nishat Bagh, the larger garden, boasts a beautiful terrace lined with Chinar trees. These gardens are masterpieces of symmetrical design, with central waterways and fountains dividing the lush terraces. Return to your hotel in Srinagar for the night.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Pahalgam","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Pahalgam/1744974414878-AdobeStock_140167140.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Pahalgam/1744974416427-AdobeStock_438044540.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Pahalgam/1744974416615-AdobeStock_443171270.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Transfer to Pahalgam & Stay","day_summary":"

After checking out from your hotel, depart early for Pahalgam, the \"Valley of Shepherds,\" located at the confluence of the Lidder River and Sheeshnag Lake. En route, visit the ancient Awantipura ruins, a temple dedicated to Lord Vishnu, built by King Awantivarman. Upon arrival in Pahalgam, take a leisurely walk to Baisaren, a charming village nestled in pine and fir forests. Enjoy a peaceful overnight stay at hotel in Pahalgam.

Enjoy a full day excursion in Pahalgam, a haven for nature lovers and adventure seekers. With its breath-taking landscapes and tranquil atmosphere. In Pahalgam you can explore the lush meadows, fish in the clear waters, or simply relax, the day will be filled with serenity and adventure. Return to your hotel for an overnight stay, with the evening free for leisure.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Pahalgam to Srinagar & Departure","day_summary":"

After breakfast at the hotel, it's time to bid farewell to the breathtaking beauty of Kashmir. You will be transferred to Srinagar for your onward journey or return home, marking the end of this unforgettable tour.

packages.package_name: Kashmir Chronicles: A Perfect Blend of Tranquility and Adventure
packages.overview:
Vaishno Devi Temple – Embark on a soul-stirring pilgrimage through scenic trails, embracing divine energy and spiritual serenity.
Aru Valley – Wander through a tranquil paradise of lush meadows, snow-kissed peaks, and enchanting natural beauty.
Betaab Valley – Immerse in a cinematic dreamland of vibrant greenery, crystal-clear streams, and majestic mountains.
Gulmarg Gondola Ride – Ascend to breathtaking heights, revealing panoramic snow-covered landscapes and thrilling adventures.
Dal Lake Shikara Ride – Glide across still waters, surrounded by floating gardens and timeless Kashmiri charm.
Thajiwas Glacier – Experience eternal snow, where adventure and mesmerizing alpine beauty unite.
Mughal Gardens – Stroll through regal terraces, vibrant blooms, and cascading fountains, reflecting timeless elegance.
Shankaracharya Temple – Bask in divine peace atop a hill, offering stunning city and lake views.

Embark on a spiritual journey to the sacred Mata Vaishno Devi cave shrine. The walk is a deeply moving pilgrimage, but for convenience, a helicopter ride offers an 8-minute ascent. Alternatively, ponies, palkis, or battery cars are available for a more comfortable experience. After darshan, return to Katra. If time allows, visit the Bhairo Temple. Enjoy a restful evening and overnight stay at your hotel.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Pahalgam","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Pahalgam/1744974414878-AdobeStock_140167140.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Pahalgam/1744974416427-AdobeStock_438044540.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Pahalgam/1744974416615-AdobeStock_443171270.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Transfer to Pahalgam","day_summary":"

Take a journey to Pahalgam, the picturesque \"Valley of the Shepherds.\" Travel through the Chenani-Nashri Tunnel, Ramban, Batote, and Banihal Tunnels, taking in the stunning scenery along the way. Pahalgam, located on the banks of the Lidder and Sheshnag rivers, is a calm resort famed for its peaceful atmosphere and magnificent natural beauty. It's an excellent place to relax and unwind, as well as the starting point for hikes and the Amarnath pilgrimage. Overnight stay at Pahalgam.

Morning after Breakfast, and moving towards visit: Aru valley. The environment it offers for tourists is peaceful tranquillity, while all of the exhibited beauty in the valley reveals a captivating spectacle. Further, one can visit Betab valley. The valley is surrounded with lush green meadows, snow clad mountain and dense forest. Then to Chandanwari-the base camp for Amarnath yatra. Later back to Pahalgam drive. Afternoon one can visit Basaran valley by pony it is in fact a very attractive meadow and also a good camping site for trekker looking to move further to Tulian lake, overnight stay at Pahalgam.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Visit to Gulmarg ","day_summary":"

After breakfast, take a drive to Gulmarg, where you'll pass by the Mattan Temple, Pampore's saffron fields, a cricket bat factory, and lush apple orchards, also known as the \"Meadow of Flowers,\" features charming old British-era hotels. It's renowned for having the world's highest 18-hole golf course and a popular ski resort, providing breath-taking views and plenty of adventure. After lunch, you can enjoy a Gondola ride over the snow-covered slopes, or choose to go skiing, take pony rides, or try ice skating. Spend some leisure time before settling in for the night. Overnight stay at Pahalgam.

After breakfast, drive to Srinagar, where you'll settle into a hotel or houseboat. In the afternoon, indulge in a peaceful Shikara ride on the famous Dal Lake, as you glide through calm canals, floating gardens, and blooming lotuses. Discover the lake’s backwaters and visit local craft centres to see wood carvings. In evening return to hotel & overnight stay at Srinagar.

After breakfast, take a scenic drive to Sonamarg. Often referred to as the \"Meadow of Gold,\" Sonamarg showcases stunning views of the Sind Valley, featuring its lush meadows and majestic snow-capped peaks. Make sure to stop by the Thajiwas Glacier, where snow can be found year-round. This area serves as a starting point for many trekking routes and is encircled by thick forests and towering mountains. In the late afternoon, head back to Srinagar and overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Srinagar Sightseeing","day_summary":"

After breakfast, explore Srinagar’s iconic landmarks, starting with the Shankaracharya Temple, offering panoramic views of the city. Visit the Mughal Gardens Nishat, Shalimar, and Cheshma Shahi each with stunning flower beds, fountains, and views of snow-capped peaks. If time permits, visit the Hazratbal Shrine. The day concludes with leisure time for personal activities and shopping, allowing you to take in the charm of Srinagar at your own pace. Overnight stay at Srinagar.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

On the final day, savour a leisurely morning before your transfer to the airport. Take a moment to reflect on the unforgettable experiences you had in Srinagar, from its tranquil lakes to the stunning gardens and rich culture. As you say goodbye to the breath-taking landscapes of Kashmir.

packages.overview:
Vaishno Devi Temple – Embark on a divine trek through breathtaking mountain trails, embracing serenity and unwavering devotion.
Shankaracharya Temple – Witness panoramic cityscapes from this ancient hilltop shrine, radiating spiritual charm and tranquility.
Mughal Gardens – Stroll through lush terraced gardens, where fountains and vibrant blooms create a timeless Persian paradise.
Dal Lake Shikara Ride – Glide across crystal-clear waters, surrounded by floating gardens and enchanting houseboats.
Pahalgam’s Lidder River – Relax by the pristine riverbanks, enveloped by lush meadows and majestic peaks.
Gulmarg Gondola Ride – Soar above snow-laden slopes, unveiling breathtaking Himalayan panoramas.
Sonamarg’s Thajiwas Glacier – Step into a winter wonderland, where shimmering ice and snowy trails mesmerize the soul.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Srinagar to Pahalgam","day_summary":"

Upon arrival in Pahalgam, explore its charming streets, relax by the river, and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere, making it an ideal retreat to rejuvenate and soak in the tranquil surroundings. In the evening return to Srinagar & overnight stay at hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Srinagar to Gulmarg","day_summary":"

Upon reaching Gulmarg, take a Gondola ride for panoramic views of the surrounding mountains and landscapes. Afterward, return to Srinagar for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Srinagar to Sonamarg","day_summary":"

After breakfast, head out for a scenic drive from Srinagar to Sonamarg. En route, pass through picturesque towns like Ganderbal and Kangan, with stunning views of rivers, valleys, and snow-covered peaks. In Sonamarg, enjoy the beautiful Sindh River and visit Thajiwas Glacier. After exploring, return to Srinagar in the evening for a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

After breakfast, check out from your hotel and head to Srinagar Airport for your onward journey. From the tranquil Dal Lake to the majestic mountains and vibrant gardens, Srinagar has surely left lasting memories. Depart with a heart full of gratitude for the magical landscapes and cultural richness of Kashmir.

packages.overview:
Dal Lake – Stroll along its serene shores, where golden sunsets paint the sky and waters in a mesmerizing symphony of colors.
Mughal Gardens – Wander through lush terraces, cascading fountains, and historic charm, where nature and artistry blend in perfect harmony.
Gulmarg Gondola – Ascend to snowy heights on one of the world’s highest cable cars, unveiling breathtaking Himalayan vistas.
Betaab Valley – Embrace the tranquil beauty of this picturesque paradise, where lush meadows meet crystal-clear streams.
Thajiwas Glacier – Experience the thrill of snowball fights and pony rides in this majestic alpine wonderland.
Drung Waterfall – Hike through lush forests to discover a cascading marvel, where nature’s music fills the air.
Lal Chowk Market – Immerse in Kashmir’s vibrant culture, browsing handwoven Pashminas, aromatic spices, and exquisite handicrafts.
Hazratbal Shrine – Find peace at this sacred lakeside shrine, offering spiritual serenity and breathtaking views of Dal Lake.
Aru Valley – Unwind in its quiet ambiance, surrounded by pristine landscapes and towering peaks.

With a sense of serenity, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay in Srinagar.

packages.overview:
​Dal Lake – Glide on a peaceful shikara ride, surrounded by snow-capped peaks and traditional houseboats in Srinagar’s serene waters.
Awantipura Ruins – Discover the ancient stone carvings of this 9th-century temple, whispering tales of Kashmir’s rich heritage.
Betaab Valley – Wander through lush meadows and crystal-clear streams, where Bollywood’s romance meets breathtaking landscapes.
Gulmarg Gondola – Soar above snow-laden slopes on one of the world’s highest cable cars, unveiling majestic mountain views.
Mughal Gardens – Stroll through terraced gardens, where cascading fountains and vibrant flowers frame Dal Lake’s stunning beauty.
Tulip Garden – If in season, witness a riot of colors, as thousands of tulips bloom against the backdrop of Kashmir’s hills.
Thajiwas Glacier – Embark on an adventurous pony ride to this snowy paradise, embraced by towering Himalayan peaks.
Lal Chowk Market – Immerse yourself in Kashmir’s bustling culture, shopping for handwoven shawls, saffron, and exquisite handicrafts.
Shankaracharya Temple – Climb to this sacred hilltop shrine, where panoramic city views and a spiritual aura await.

Upon reaching Gulmarg, a winter wonderland, check into your hotel and explore the area’s pristine beauty. You can take a ride on the Gulmarg Gondola, one of the highest cable cars in the world, offering panoramic views. You can also consider a short trek up to Khilanmarg from Gulmarg. This easy-to-moderate trek offers stunning views of the surrounding mountains, lush meadows, and, a breathtaking view of Nanga Parbat. At evening return to your hotel at proceed for your overnight stay.

After breakfast, transfer to Srinagar and explore its renowned Mughal Gardens. Begin with Cheshmashahi, the Royal Spring, known for its clear water and stunning terraces. Then, visit Nishat Bagh, the Garden of Pleasure, with panoramic views of Dal Lake. Continue to Shalimar Bagh, the Abode of Love, famous for its fountains and lush greenery. Conclude with a visit to the Shankaracharya Temple, offering breathtaking views of Srinagar. Overnight stay at hotel in Srinagar.

Explore the beauty of Srinagar with visits to its famous attractions. Start with the stunning Tulip Garden (if in season), where vibrant blooms create a mesmerizing landscape. Next, visit the Mughal Mosque, showcasing exquisite architecture and peaceful surroundings. Take in the cultural richness of the city, with its mix of gardens, history, and local charm. In the evening, check into Srinagar hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Visit to Sonmarg","day_summary":"

After breakfast, depart for Sonmarg, known as \"The Meadow of Gold,\" located 84 km from Srinagar at an altitude of 9,000 feet. Surrounded by majestic mountains and vibrant flowers, Sonmarg is a paradise for nature lovers. You can hire ponies to visit the Thajiwas Glacier, a popular attraction during the summer months. After a day of scenic exploration, return to Srinagar for a relaxing evening and an overnight stay at Srinagar hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Depature Day ","day_summary":"

On the final day of your journey, wake up to the tranquil beauty of Dal Lake and enjoy a leisurely breakfast, savoring the last flavors of Kashmir. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with a seamless departure. If time allows, take a quiet stroll by the lake or explore a local market for some last-minute souvenirs perhaps a handwoven Kashmiri shawl or aromatic saffron. As you bid farewell to the snow-capped peaks, lush valleys, and peaceful houseboats, cherish the unforgettable memories. With a heart full of warmth and nostalgia, depart Srinagar.
