packages.overview: With Travelxploria, your Kashmir odyssey unfolds in a tapestry of emerald lakes, snow-draped vistas, and verdant valleys. Begin by gliding across Dal Lake’s mirror-like waters in a traditional shikara, framed by the lofty Pir Panjal Range and dotted with floating gardens. Next, ascend to new heights on the Gulmarg Gondola—Asia’s highest cable car—where panoramic views of snow-clad peaks give way to exhilarating snow activities at every turn. Journey onward to the Pahalgam Valleys, wandering through the lush meadows of Aru, the cinematic landscapes of Betaab, and the fairy-tale groves of Baisaran. Then, step into a living poem at the Mughal Gardens, where terraced lawns, tinkling fountains, and vibrant flowerbeds whisper stories of royal retreat. Venture off the beaten path to the hidden haven of Doodhpathri Meadows, a serene expanse of rolling green carpeted with pine and birch. Finally, let Travelxploria guide you to Sonmarg’s Thajiwas Glacier, where sparkling ice fields beckon for scenic treks beneath the grandeur of the Himalayas—leaving you with heart-stirring memories of Kashmir’s timeless splendor.

Next, venture to Chandanwari, the starting point for the Amarnath Yatra, or discover the untouched splendor of Baisaran Valley. As the day winds down, relax in the Pahalgam, for an overnight stay.

Embark on a scenic adventure to the serene Doodhpatri, a tranquil meadow tucked away in the heart of Kashmir’s mountains. Surrounded by snow-capped peaks and lush pine forests, the area exudes peace and beauty, perfect for a day of exploration. Stroll through the pristine landscapes, breathe in the fresh mountain air, and enjoy the peaceful solitude. After a day of bliss, return to Srinagar for a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Visit to Sonmarg","day_summary":"

Set out for a full-day exploration of Sonmarg, where towering peaks and lush meadows create a mesmerizing backdrop. Visit the magnificent Thajiwas Glacier, embark on a short trek, or simply immerse yourself in the tranquil landscapes of this alpine paradise. After soaking in the breath-taking beauty of Sonmarg, return to Srinagar, where the calm ambiance of the city awaits. Unwind and rest during your overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

As your unforgettable journey through Srinagar comes to a close, our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with a seamless departure. Take in the last glimpses of the enchanting landscapes, the serene Dal Lake, and the majestic snow-capped peaks that have made this trip so special. The rich culture, warm hospitality, and breathtaking beauty of Kashmir will forever hold a place in your heart. With cherished memories and a soul refreshed by nature’s wonders, you’ll be transferred to the airport.

packages.overview:
Dal Lake – Glide on a serene Shikara ride, surrounded by floating gardens and majestic snow-capped mountains.
Mughal Gardens – Wander through lush terraced lawns, vibrant flowers, and historic fountains, reflecting Mughal grandeur.
Shankaracharya Temple – Admire panoramic city views from this sacred hilltop temple, a place of spiritual tranquillity.
Gulmarg Gondola – Ascend on one of the world’s highest cable cars, witnessing breathtaking snowy landscapes.
Sonmarg – Experience pristine valleys, crystal-clear rivers, and majestic peaks, a peaceful retreat in nature’s lap.
Vaishno Devi – Embark on a divine pilgrimage, feeling sacred energy amidst the Trikuta Mountains.
Jammu Markets – Explore bustling streets filled with colorful handicrafts, aromatic spices, and cultural souvenirs.

packages.overview:
1. Journey from NJP/Bagdogra to Kalimpong: Begin your tour with a comfortable transfer.

  2. Kalimpong Sightseeing: Discover the vibrant attractions of Kalimpong.

  3. Excursion to Lava and Loleygaon: Enjoy a scenic venture to these picturesque locations.

  4. Transfer from Kalimpong to Darjeeling: Move to your next destination, Darjeeling.

  5. Darjeeling Sightseeing: Explore the cultural and natural marvels of Darjeeling.

  6. Departure to NJP: End your journey with a smooth return transfer.

Himalayan Spa Resort 1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Kalimpong sightseeing","day_summary":"

Start your day with a scrumptious breakfast, and get ready for an exciting sightseeing tour of Kalimpong with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. Your journey will take you through the enchanting landscapes of Kalimpong, starting with Durpin Hill, offering breathtaking panoramic views. Next, visit Pine View Point and Jelapla View Point, where you can admire the stunning Kanchenjunga Range.

Our expert guide will provide fascinating insights into Tibetan architecture, allowing you to witness ancient scriptures and murals at the renowned Buddhist monasteries. Later, explore the vibrant local markets, where you can shop for exquisite Tibetan art and handicrafts. After an eventful day, return to your hotel for a peaceful overnight stay, reminiscing about the beauty of Kalimpong.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Lava and Loleygaon excursion","day_summary":"

Start your morning with a lip-smacking breakfast and get ready for an exciting day of exploration with our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. Your journey begins with a visit to a charming village surrounded by pristine pine forests, offering a peaceful retreat into nature.

If you are planning to visit Lava, our expert guide will ensure you don't miss the Neora Interpretation Centre, where you can learn about the region’s rich biodiversity, and the Ratnarishi Bihar Buddhist Gumpha, a serene monastery reflecting deep spiritual essence.

Next, witness the breathtaking Chhengey Waterfalls, located just 14 km from Lava, where the cascading waters create a mesmerizing sight. From there, embark on a picturesque journey to Loleygaon, a scenic hamlet known for its lush greenery and panoramic Himalayan views. Immerse yourself in the tranquility of nature, and admire the vibrant orchids before returning to Kalimpong for a comfortable overnight stay.

Take in the panoramic views, capture some stunning photographs, and soak in the serene ambiance before continuing your journey to the Queen of Hills, Darjeeling for an unforgettable experience.

The \"Queen of Hills,\" Darjeeling eagerly awaits your arrival, offering you the chance to witness the breathtaking dawn beauty of the Kanchenjunga range at Tiger Hill. With our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, embark on a journey through the must-visit attractions of this charming hill station. Explore the Padma Naidu Himalayan Zoological Park, get insights into conservation at the Snow Leopard Breeding Center, and admire the engineering marvel of Batasia Loop and War Memorial. Visit the sacred Ghoom Monastery, gain knowledge at the Himalayan Mountaineering Institute, and take a thrilling ride on the Darjeeling Ropeway for breathtaking aerial views.

Our guide will also take you to Tenzing Rock, the lush Tea Gardens, and the historic Lebong Race Course, while you learn about local culture at the Tibetan Refugee Self-Help Centre. As evening sets in, stroll through Darjeeling’s charming streets, illuminated like a sky full of stars, and soak in the serene ambiance. If you are a food enthusiast, let our guide recommend local delicacies like steaming momos and comforting thukpa, ensuring you savor the authentic flavors of Darjeeling.

4o


","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure to NJP","day_summary":"

Enjoy the final breakfast of your memorable trip, and then our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, along with our representative, will accompany you on your journey back. As you travel towards NJP Railway Station or Bagdogra Airport via Kurseong, our guide will ensure you soak in the last glimpses of the stunning landscapes. If time permits, you can make a brief stop to admire the lush tea gardens and colonial-era charm of Kurseong. After this scenic drive, our team will assist you with a smooth departure, ensuring you leave with cherished memories of your trip before continuing your journey back home.

packages.package_name: The Queen of Hills - Sikkim & Darjeeling
packages.overview:
1. Gangtok: Welcome to the cleanest state in India: Begin your journey in Gangtok with a warm welcome, setting the tone for an eco-friendly experience.

  2. Gangtok: Full day of sightseeing: Dive into a comprehensive exploration of Gangtok’s top attractions throughout the day.

  3. Lachen: Off the ‘Big Pass: Journey towards Lachen, traversing the famed “Big Pass” en route.

  4. Lachung: Lakes and some leisure: Arrive in Lachung and enjoy some leisure time, including visits to picturesque lakes.

  5. Gangtok: Sightseeing and then back to the capital city: Return to Gangtok for additional sightseeing before settling back in the capital.

  6. Pelling: Experience nature’s bliss: Head to Pelling and immerse yourself in the region’s natural beauty and tranquility.

  7. Darjeeling: Pelling city tour & more: Discover Darjeeling with an enriching city tour that includes facets of the nearby Pelling experience.

  8. Darjeeling: An experience to remember: Enjoy a day filled with memorable attractions and cultural highlights in Darjeeling.

  9. Darjeeling: an excursion to Mirik: Take a scenic excursion to Mirik, a charming destination known for its serene landscapes.

  10. Darjeeling: Time to say ‘Goodbye': Conclude your memorable tour with a heartfelt farewell from Darjeeling.

This is the day when your real adventure begins as you set out to explore the most iconic attractions of Gangtok, guided by our experienced Travelxploria tour expert.

Your first stop will be the serene Tsomgo Lake, a glacial marvel situated at an altitude of 12,310 ft. Surrounded by towering mountains and lush landscapes, this breathtaking lake changes its hues with the seasons, offering a mesmerizing view. Here, you can enjoy adventurous yak rides or simply soak in the tranquility of nature.

Next, proceed to the sacred Baba Harbhajan Singh Mandir, a temple dedicated to the revered Indian Army soldier Baba Harbhajan Singh. Feel the spiritual energy

After enjoying a delicious breakfast, get ready as our experienced Travelxploria tour guide accompanies you to your next breathtaking destination—Lachen. This serene mountain village, nestled in the Himalayan landscapes of North Sikkim, will offer you a perfect escape from the fast-paced world, filling your heart with peace and tranquility.

En route, take in the majestic beauty of the Seven Sisters Waterfall, where cascading streams create a mesmerizing view. Then, witness the stunning Naga Waterfall, where the rushing waters and serene surroundings provide the ultimate relaxation.

After an exhilarating day of sightseeing, check in at your comfortable hotel in Lachen. Relish a scrumptious dinner and unwind in the cozy ambiance, preparing yourself for more adventures ahead with Travelxploria.

Experience nature’s bliss","day_summary":"

After enjoying a delicious breakfast, get ready for a fascinating day of exploration, guided by our experienced Travelxploria tour expert.

Begin your tour with a visit to the Museums and Technology Institute, where you can gain insights into Sikkim’s rich heritage and technological advancements. Next, proceed to one of the highlights of the North Sikkim tour itinerary—the Directorate of Handicraft and Handloom. Here, you will witness artisans at work and have the chance to purchase authentic Sikkimese handicrafts, including Thangka paintings, intricately woven carpets, and handloom textiles.

A perfect way to conclude the day is a visit to the Gangtok Flower Exhibition, where you will be mesmerized by a vibrant display of exotic orchids and seasonal blooms.

After this memorable sightseeing experience, return to your hotel to relax and enjoy a delightful dinner with your companions, preparing for the adventures that lie ahead.

After enjoying a wholesome breakfast, embark on a mesmerizing journey to Pelling, accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, who will ensure a seamless and enriching experience.

Your first stop is Darap Village, a hidden gem known for its traditional Lepcha culture and serene landscapes—a place you simply cannot miss for an authentic local experience. Next, visit the sacred Khecheopalri Lake, a revered pilgrimage site believed to fulfill wishes. Continue to the magnificent Kanchenjunga Waterfalls and Rimbi Waterfalls, where you can soak in the natural beauty and enjoy the tranquil sound of cascading waters.

As part of the exclusive Sikkim and Darjeeling tour package, this day is designed to provide incredible experiences and deep cultural insights. After an eventful day of exploration, return to your comfortable hotel, where you can unwind and enjoy a delightful dinner before a peaceful night’s rest.

Wake up early in the morning and enjoy a delicious breakfast before setting off on a breathtaking journey with our experienced Travelxploria tour guide.

Begin your day with a visit to the famous Tiger Hill, where you will witness a spectacular sunrise over the majestic Kanchenjunga range—a sight that will leave you spellbound. Capture unforgettable memories with stunning selfies against the golden hues of the morning sky.

After soaking in nature’s beauty, continue your exploration with visits to Ghoom Monastery, a serene and sacred place reflecting Tibetan Buddhist culture; the Batasia Loop War Memorial, a picturesque railway loop built in honor of Indian soldiers; and the Padmaja Naidu Himalayan Zoological Park, home to rare Himalayan wildlife, including the red panda and snow leopard.

As you delve into the rich beauty and history of Sikkim tourism, our Travelxploria guide will enhance your experience with engaging stories and insights. After a day of adventure, return to your comfortable hotel, where you can relax and unwind for the evening.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Darjeeling: an excursion to Mirik","day_summary":"

After having a delightful breakfast at the hotel, get ready for an exciting tour of Mirik, the picturesque town of valleys, accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide.

This charming hill station, known for its breathtaking landscapes, is a must-visit destination in the Sikkim-Darjeeling tour package. Explore the serene Sumendu Lake, where you can enjoy a peaceful boat ride or take a stroll along the arched footbridge while admiring the reflection of lush green hills in the crystal-clear waters.

Next, visit the vast tea gardens, where our expert guide will give you fascinating insights into the tea-making process and the significance of Darjeeling tea. Take in the refreshing aroma of tea leaves as you walk through the endless plantations.

After a memorable day in Mirik, return to your comfortable hotel in Darjeeling. Enjoy a scrumptious dinner and unwind for the night, cherishing the wonderful experiences of the day.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Darjeeling: Time to say ‘Goodbye.'","day_summary":"

As your incredible Sikkim tour comes to an end, start your day with a healthy breakfast at the hotel. After enjoying your meal, pack your luggage filled with beautiful memories and complete the check-out formalities.

Our experienced Travelxploria tour guide and representative will be there to assist you throughout and ensure a smooth departure. You will be comfortably transferred to the Bagdogra Airport or NJP Railway Station, as per your travel plans.

Bid farewell to the majestic hills of Sikkim, carrying unforgettable moments with you. We look forward to welcoming you again for another remarkable journey with Travelxploria.

packages.overview:
1: Arrival – NJP to Darjeeling
Transfer from NJP to Darjeeling. Check-in & overnight stay.

2: Darjeeling Sightseeing
Visit Tiger Hill, Ghoom Monastery, Batasia Loop (sunrise tour). Post breakfast, explore Rock Garden, Zoological Park, Ropeway, Tea Estate & Peace Pagoda.

3: Mirik Excursion
Full-day visit to Mirik Lake & Pashupati Market (Nepal Border). Return to Darjeeling.

4: Departure
Transfer to NJP Railway Station after breakfast.

Early morning at 3:45 AM, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide will accompany you on a drive to Tiger Hill to witness the breathtaking sunrise over Kanchendzonga Peak (subject to clear weather). On the way back, visit the serene Ghoom Monastery, Batasia Loop, and Rock Garden. Return to the hotel for a delightful breakfast.

Post breakfast, embark on a half-day city tour with our guide, covering Padmaja Naidu Zoological Park, Ropeway, Tenzing Gumpo Rock, Tea Estate, and Peace Pagoda. Return to the hotel for an evening at leisure.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Mirik Excursion","day_summary":"

After breakfast, embark on a scenic drive to Mirik (approximately 60 km / 1.5 - 2 hours), accompanied by our experienced Travelxploria tour guide. Enjoy a full-day excursion to the picturesque Mirik Lake, where you can indulge in horse riding and boating amidst the serene surroundings.

Later, explore the vibrant Pashupati Market in Nepal (subject to border regulations) for some unique shopping experiences. In the evening, return to Darjeeling for a relaxing overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide will assist you with a seamless transfer to New Jalpaiguri Railway Station (NJP), ensuring a comfortable and hassle-free journey. Depart with cherished memories of your trip.

packages.overview:
​1: Arrival at NJP/IXB, transfer to Gangtok.
​2: Gangtok sightseeing – Tashi View Point, Hanuman Tok, Banjakhri Falls & more.
​3: Excursion to Tsomgo Lake & Baba Mandir.
​4: Transfer to Pelling via Namchi Chardham & Temi Tea Garden.
​5: Pelling sightseeing – Rimbi Falls, Khecheopalri Lake, Rabdantse Ruins & more.
​6: Transfer to Darjeeling via Singla Checkpost.
​7: Darjeeling sightseeing – Tiger Hill, Ghoom Monastery, HMI, Tea Garden & more.
​8: Departure to NJP/IXB for onward journey.​

Our guide will be available to offer recommendations for exploring nearby attractions or indulging in local cuisine. Overnight stay at Gangtok.

Sightseeing","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, embark on a full-day city tour with our experienced Travelxploria tour guide, who will take you through Gangtok's most captivating attractions. Visit Tashi View Point, Ganesh Tok, and Hanuman Tok, offering breathtaking panoramic views of the Himalayan ranges. Explore the vibrant Flower Show, witness traditional craftsmanship at the Cottage Industry and Handicraft Centre, and delve into Tibetan culture at the Institute of Tibetology. Seek spiritual solace at Dro-dul Chorten and Enchey Monastery, and conclude the tour with a refreshing visit to the Banjakhri Falls. Enjoy a well-guided experience with insights into the city's rich history and traditions. Overnight stay at Gangtok.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Excursion to Tsomgo Lake & Baba Mandir","day_summary":"

After a hearty breakfast, embark on an unforgettable excursion to Tsomgo Lake (12,400 ft.) and Baba Mandir (13,200 ft.) with our experienced Travelxploria tour guide. Located 55 km from Gangtok, the serene Tsomgo Lake is surrounded by towering mountains and offers mesmerizing reflections of the sky. Enjoy the tranquil beauty and, if lucky, witness the lake partially frozen in winter. Next, visit the sacred Baba Mandir, dedicated to Baba Harbhajan Singh, an Indian Army soldier revered as a guardian spirit of the region.

Our Travelxploria guide will provide insights into the significance of these landmarks, making your journey more enriching. In case of landslides or roadblocks, alternate sightseeing arrangements will be provided. Return to Gangtok in the evening for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Pelling","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Pelling/1744985530633-AdobeStock_105094837.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Pelling/1744985530768-AdobeStock_431298484.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Pelling/1744985530875-AdobeStock_759789601.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Pelling/1744985530470-AdobeStock_377749435.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Gangtok – Pelling (150 kms / 5 hrs) via Chardham","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, embark on a scenic drive to Pelling (6,300 ft.) with our experienced Travelxploria tour guide. En route, visit the breathtaking Temi Tea Garden, the only tea estate in Sikkim, offering stunning views of rolling tea plantations. Next, explore Samdruptse Hill, home to the towering Guru Padmasambhava statue, a revered site offering panoramic views. Continue your journey to Siddheshwar Dham (Chardham) in Namchi, a significant pilgrimage destination featuring replicas of the four sacred Hindu dhams and a majestic Lord Shiva statue.

Upon arrival in Pelling, check in to your hotel and unwind. Enjoy the rest of the day at leisure, soaking in the serene ambiance of the Himalayan town. Overnight stay at Pelling.

Gantavya Resort & Spa/1743603106182-47bd3301011cc858590ab685e333f962.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Pelling Sightseeing","day_summary":"

After a delicious breakfast, get ready for a full-day sightseeing tour of Pelling with our experienced Travelxploria tour guide.

1st Half Tour: Begin your journey with a visit to the charming Darap Village, where you can experience the rich culture of the local Limboo community. Next, witness the cascading beauty of Rimbi Waterfalls, followed by a peaceful visit to the sacred Khecheopalri Lake, also known as the Wish-Fulfilling Lake. Conclude the first half of your tour with a stop at the spectacular Khangchendzongha Waterfalls, a mesmerizing natural wonder.

2nd Half Tour: In the afternoon, explore the Pemayangtse Monastery, one of the oldest and most significant monasteries in Sikkim, offering a spiritual retreat. Continue to the Rabdantse Ruins, an ancient capital of Sikkim, where history blends with breathtaking mountain views. Finally, visit the New Helipad Ground, which provides panoramic views of the surrounding snow-capped peaks.

After an eventful day, return to the hotel and relax. Overnight stay at Pelling.

At 4:00 AM, embark on an unforgettable journey with our experienced Travelxploria tour guide to Tiger Hill (8,400 ft.), where you'll witness the breathtaking sunrise over Mt. Khangchendzongha (28,208 ft.), the world's third-highest peak. As the golden hues light up the sky, capture this magical moment for a lifetime.

On your way back, our guide will take you to Ghoom Monastery, one of the oldest in Darjeeling, and the Batasia Loop, a magnificent spiral railway track offering panoramic views.

After a hearty breakfast, continue your sightseeing tour with visits to the Himalayan Mountaineering Institute, P.N. Zoological Park (closed on Thursdays), Tenzing Rock, Tibetan Refugee Self-Help Centre (closed on Sundays), an outer view of a Tea Garden, the Ropeway, and the Japanese Temple.

Spend your evening exploring the bustling Mall Road, shopping for souvenirs, or simply relaxing in the fresh mountain air. Overnight stay at Darjeeling.

4o

Carry back unforgettable memories of your trip, curated by Travelxploria. Safe travels.

packages.overview:
1. NJP/Bagdogra to Darjeeling: Arrive and embark on a scenic drive to Darjeeling.

  2. Darjeeling Sightseeing: Discover Darjeeling’s iconic landmarks and cultural treasures.

  3. Darjeeling to Kalimpong: Transition to Kalimpong and embrace its serene charm.

  4. Kalimpong to Gangtok: Journey onward to Gangtok, Sikkim’s bustling capital.

  5. Tsomgo Lake Visit: Experience the breathtaking beauty of the high-altitude Tsomgo Lake.

  6. Departure to NJP: Conclude the tour with a return trip to NJP.

The drive from Bagdogra Airport or NJP Railway Station to Darjeeling takes approximately 3 hours, during which our expert guide will share interesting stories and insights about the region.

Upon arrival, complete the hotel check-in formalities and relax in the serene ambiance of your stay. Take the evening to unwind and rejuvenate, as the next day awaits with an exciting local sightseeing tour curated by Travelxploria’s experienced guide. Get ready for an unforgettable journey filled with breathtaking views, cultural experiences, and cherished memories.

/1742886685917-MAYFAIR Hill Resort Darjeeling 1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Darjeeling Sightseeing","day_summary":"

Darjeeling is a tourist paradise that captivates visitors with its breathtaking landscapes and rich heritage. With Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide by your side, embark on a memorable day of sightseeing in this enchanting hill station.

Start your day early to witness the spectacular sunrise at Tiger Hill, where the golden rays illuminate the majestic Kanchenjunga range—a sight that will leave you in awe. Capture this magical moment and create cherished memories with stunning photographs.

After this mesmerizing experience, continue your local sightseeing tour, expertly guided by Travelxploria’s knowledgeable representative. Explore some of the most iconic attractions of Darjeeling:

  • Padma Naidu Himalayan Zoological Park – Home to rare species like the red panda and snow leopard.
  • Snow Leopard Breeding Center – A conservation initiative preserving these magnificent creatures.
  • Batasia Loop and War Memorial – A picturesque railway loop offering panoramic views of the hills.
  • Ghoom Monastery – One of the oldest Tibetan monasteries in Darjeeling.
  • Himalayan Mountaineering Institute – A tribute to Tenzing Norgay, offering insights into mountaineering.
  • Darjeeling Ropeway – Enjoy a scenic cable car ride with mesmerizing views of tea gardens and valleys.
  • Tenzing Rock – A must-visit for adventure lovers and rock-climbing enthusiasts.
  • Tea Gardens – Walk through lush tea plantations and savor the aroma of world-famous Darjeeling tea.
  • Lebong Race Course – One of the highest racetracks in the world with a rich history.
  • Tibetan Refugee Self-Help Centre – A place to witness Tibetan craftsmanship and culture.

Wrap up your eventful day with an evening visit to Mall Road, the heart of Darjeeling’s shopping and food scene. Stroll through the bustling market, shop for souvenirs, and indulge in local delicacies like steaming hot momos, flavorful thukpa, and traditional Darjeeling tea.

With Travelxploria’s expert guidance, experience Darjeeling like never before—a journey filled with adventure, history, and culture.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Kalimpong","country":"India","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Darjeeling to Kalimpong","day_summary":"

On the 3rd day, your journey continues to Kalimpong, a charming hill town known for its stunning views and serene ambiance. With Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, you will embark on a scenic 2-hour drive to Kalimpong, passing through picturesque landscapes and rolling hills.

Upon arrival, take a short break at the hotel and refresh yourself before setting out for an exciting sightseeing tour, guided by our expert representative.

Your first stop will be Dr. Graham’s Home, a historic educational institution nestled amidst lush greenery, offering a glimpse into the town’s rich colonial past. Next, visit Delo View Point, the highest point in Kalimpong, where you can enjoy breathtaking panoramic views of the Kanchenjunga range, Teesta River, and surrounding valleys.

Continue your exploration with a visit to the Pine View Orchid Nursery, which boasts a stunning collection of rare and exotic orchids. Here, our guide will help you discover the vibrant flora of the region, making it a paradise for nature lovers and photographers.

In the evening, enjoy a leisurely stroll along Rinkingpong Road, soaking in the charming ambiance of Kalimpong’s local market. Browse through handcrafted souvenirs, woolen items, and traditional artifacts, or simply relax with a cup of freshly brewed Darjeeling tea at a quaint café.

After an eventful day, return to your hotel for a comfortable overnight stay in Kalimpong, where you can unwind and prepare for another day of exploration with Travelxploria.

After a delightful breakfast at the hotel, get ready for a scenic drive to Gangtok with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide. The journey from Kalimpong to Gangtok covers approximately 80 km and takes around 2 hours, offering mesmerizing views of lush valleys, winding roads, and the serene Teesta River.

While the drive can be a bit tiring, our tour guide will ensure a comfortable and enjoyable journey, sharing fascinating insights about the region and making short stops at picturesque viewpoints along the way.

Upon arrival in Gangtok, check in at your pre-booked hotel and take some much-needed rest and relaxation after the journey. Feel free to explore the local surroundings at your own pace or simply unwind at the hotel, preparing for the exciting sightseeing adventures awaiting you in this vibrant capital city of Sikkim.

With Travelxploria, your journey is always seamless, comfortable, and filled with unforgettable moments!

Lake visit","day_summary":"

On the 5th day of your journey, get ready for an exciting excursion with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide to the stunning Tsomgo Lake. After a hearty breakfast, embark on a 2-hour drive through the winding mountain roads, surrounded by breathtaking landscapes.

Tsomgo Lake, nestled at an altitude of 12,310 ft, is a true gem of Sikkim, captivating visitors with its crystal-clear waters and towering snow-capped mountains. This sacred glacial lake changes colors with the seasons, offering a surreal view that is perfect for photography. Take your time to soak in the serene beauty and capture the mesmerizing scenery with your camera.

Next, our expert guide will accompany you to the famous Baba Harbhajan Singh Mandir, a revered shrine dedicated to a martyred Indian Army soldier known as the \"Hero of Nathula\". Feel the spiritual aura and listen to the fascinating stories associated with this sacred place.

If you wish to experience the majestic Nathula Pass, Travelxploria can arrange the necessary permits and transportation for this high-altitude adventure.

After a memorable day trip, return to Gangtok, where you can relax and unwind at your hotel, reminiscing about the extraordinary sights and experiences of the day.

With Travelxploria, every journey is filled with unforgettable moments and seamless travel experiences!

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure to NJP","day_summary":"

On the concluding day, after enjoying a leisurely breakfast, our experienced Travelxploria tour guide will assist you in packing your bags and ensuring a smooth check-out from the hotel. You will then be comfortably transferred to NJP Railway Station or Bagdogra Airport, cherishing the unforgettable memories of your incredible journey.

Travelxploria’s team thanks you for choosing us and looks forward to welcoming you again for another delightful travel experience! Safe travels!

packages.overview: Experience the charm of Shillong with Travelxploria – where nature meets nostalgia in the heart of Meghalaya. Often called the “Scotland of the East,” Shillong enchants visitors with its rolling hills, colonial-era architecture, and cool mountain air. Explore the cascading beauty of Elephant Falls, soak in panoramic views from Shillong Peak, and unwind by the serene waters of Ward’s Lake. The city’s vibrant culture, infused with music, local handicrafts, and warm hospitality, creates a truly immersive escape. With Travelxploria, every moment in Shillong becomes a memory waiting to be made.

Start your Shillong exploration with the enchanting Elephant Falls, where cascading waters create a serene symphony in the lush greenery. Next, dive into the rich culture of the Northeast at the Don Bosco Centre, discovering vibrant traditions through captivating exhibits. Finally, ascend to Shillong Peak, the city’s highest point, for panoramic views of misty hills and winding valleys

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Mystic Meghalaya","day_summary":"

Discover the enchanting wonders of Meghalaya on a day trip to Cherrapunji. Feel the thunderous roar of Nohkalikai Falls, a stunning cascade steeped in legend. Wander through the fascinating limestone chambers of Mawsmai Cave.End your adventure at Dawki, where the glassy Umngot River offers a boat ride above water so clear, you’ll feel like you’re floating on air.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell with a View: Umiam to Guwahati","day_summary":"

Last day of your journey back to Guwahati, pausing at the serene Umiam Lake capture the tranquil beauty of this vast reservoir, a perfect spot to reflect on your memorable trip. With your heart full of stories and your camera filled with snapshots, continue to Guwahati for departure, carrying the spirit of Meghalaya’s hills and Assam’s warmth with you.

packages.overview:
Assam & Meghalaya: A perfect blend of cultural heritage, lush greenery, and wildlife in Northeast India.

Guwahati: The gateway to Assam, known for the revered Kamakhya Temple, scenic Brahmaputra River cruises, and vibrant markets.

Shillong: The “Scotland of the East,” featuring scenic attractions like Shillong Peak, Elephant Falls, and Ward’s Lake.

packages.package_name: The Best of Seven Sister Tour
packages.overview:
Assam & Meghalaya: A mesmerizing mix of wildlife, spirituality, natural beauty, and cultural heritage in Northeast India.

Guwahati: The largest city in Assam, home to the sacred Kamakhya Temple, scenic Brahmaputra River cruises, and Assam State Museum.

Shillong: The "Scotland of the East," offering attractions like Shillong Peak, Elephant Falls, Ward’s Lake, and a vibrant café culture.

Cherrapunji: One of the wettest places on Earth, known for living root bridges, Nohkalikai Falls, Mawsmai Caves, and misty landscapes.

Kaziranga: A UNESCO World Heritage site, famous for the one-horned rhinoceros, thrilling jungle safaris, and diverse wildlife.

Soon, the majestic Seven Sisters Falls greets you with its dramatic, seven-tiered cascade—a symphony of nature's power and grace. Watch the mist rise from the plunging waters and let the cool breeze carry your worries away. 

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Cherrapunji’s Hidden Marvels","day_summary":"

Embark on an unforgettable trek through dense forests to witness the iconic Double Decker Living Root Bridge—a masterpiece woven by nature and time. Feel the magic of the ancient roots beneath your feet. After your adventure, wander through Cherrapunji’s vibrant local markets, brimming with handmade crafts, fresh produce, and local treats. Engage with friendly locals and savor the flavors of Meghalaya, capturing the true spirit of this rain-kissed paradise.

Towering over the grasslands, spot the iconic one-horned rhinoceros, wild buffalo, and vibrant birdlife up close. ","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell to the Journey","day_summary":"

Though your adventure ends here, the spirit of the Northeast lingers—whispering promises of new horizons and future returns.

packages.overview: With Travelxploria, your Northeast adventure unfurls in a vibrant tapestry of culture and wilderness. Touch down in Guwahati, Assam’s bustling gateway, where you’ll seek blessings at the sacred Kamakhya Temple, drift along the mighty Brahmaputra on a scenic river cruise, and haggle for silken treasures in lively local markets. From there, ascend to Shillong—the “Scotland of the East”—to savor panoramic vistas from Shillong Peak, chase the cascading waters of Elephant Falls, and wander the colonial-era pathways around Ward’s Lake. Next, feel the mist kiss your skin in Cherrapunji, one of the wettest places on Earth, as you traverse ancient living root bridges, stand in awe beneath Nohkalikai Falls, and explore the mysterious depths of Mawsmai Caves. Finally, journey with Travelxploria into the wild heart of Kaziranga National Park, where thrilling jungle safaris bring you face-to-face with the legendary one-horned rhinoceros and a kaleidoscope of exotic wildlife—an unforgettable finale to your odyssey through India’s hidden northeast.

packages.overview:
Assam & Meghalaya: A perfect destination for nature, spirituality, and adventure in Northeast India.

Guwahati: Assam’s vibrant city, known for the Kamakhya Temple, peaceful Brahmaputra River cruises, and bustling markets like Fancy Bazaar.

Shillong: The capital of Meghalaya, also called the "Scotland of the East," featuring Shillong Peak, Elephant Falls, Ward’s Lake, and lively cafes.

Cherrapunji: One of the wettest places on Earth, home to living root bridges, Nohkalikai Falls, Mawsmai Caves, and lush green valleys.

Embark on a delightful journey as you stay in Shillong, the \"Scotland of the East,\" surrounded by misty hills and vibrant culture. Explore the enchanting landscapes of Cherrapunji, known for its stunning waterfalls and the fascinating Living Root Bridges. Wander through Mawlynnong Village, Asia's cleanest, before returning to Shillong for a restful stay. This blend of natural beauty, culture, and adventure promises an unforgettable experience.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Day of Shillong’s Best","day_summary":"

Begin your day with exploring Shillong’s captivating beauty at the Shillong Viewpoint for panoramic views of the hills and valley. Discover the serene Ward's Lake, wander through the vibrant streets of Police Bazaar, and marvel at the stunning Elephant Falls. Dive into local heritage at the Don Bosco Centre for Indigenous Cultures. After a day of exploration, enjoy a peaceful stay in the heart of Shillong with the charm of the hill station.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

On the final day of your journey, enjoy a relaxing morning before checking out from your hotel. You will head back to Guwahati for your airport drop. You’ll be dropped off in time for your departure, marking the end of a memorable journey filled with stunning landscapes and rich culture.

packages.overview: Discover the best of Himachal Pradesh with Travelxploria’s enchanting Manali & Dalhousie retreat. Begin your journey in Manali’s Kullu Valley, where snow-tipped peaks and whispering pine forests set the stage for heart-pounding adventures—soar over Solang Valley by paraglider, carve fresh tracks in the powder at Rohtang Pass, or ride the rapids of the Beas River. Then, drift into the colonial elegance of Dalhousie, where Travelxploria guides you through historic cantonment-style streets, lush meadows, and the “Mini Switzerland” of Khajjiar, dotted with crimson rhododendrons and serene lakes. Whether you’re chasing thrills in the mountains, strolling through British-era charm, or simply sipping chai as dusk paints the hills rose-gold, Travelxploria weaves every detail into a seamless, unforgettable Himalayan escape.

packages.overview: Discover the thrill and tranquility of the Himalayas with Travelxploria’s Manali & Kasol escape. Begin in Manali, where snow-dusted peaks and verdant pine forests set the stage for heart-pounding adventures—soar above Solang Valley on a paraglider, carve fresh tracks in winter at Rohtang Pass, or paddle through foaming rapids on the Beas River. Then we whisk you into the mystical Parvati Valley, centering in laid-back Kasol: wander riverside trails lined with cedar and apricot trees, sample Israeli-inspired cafés, and soak in the healing steam of the Manikaran hot springs. Throughout, Travelxploria handles every detail—from cozy mountain lodges to knowledgeable local guides—so you can lose yourself in Himalayan wonder, culture, and camaraderie.

Overnight stay at the hotel in Manali.

After breakfast local sightseeing of Manali - “Hadimba Temple” built in 1553 with a superbly crafted pagoda roof, it is famous for its exquisitely carved doorway. “Club House” with comprehensive facilities that include roller skating, an auditorium, a billiards room, a library, a bar, and a restaurant makes a wonderful outing for the day. The excursionists can visit–Tibetian Monastery, Van Vihar, Manu Temple, Jogani Water Fall, and “Vashist Temple” are well known for their hot springs. There are old temples dedicated to the Saga Vashist and Lord Rama. Evening visits famous “Mall Road”. Overnight stay at a hotel in Manali.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Day excursion to Solang valley and Atal Tunnel","day_summary":"

Today we proceed for a full day sightseeing of – \"Atal Tunnel\", Solang-Valley, Nehru Kund, Gulaba, Kothi Village, Him Valley. Overnight stay at the hotel in Manali. While visiting Solang Valley one should also try hands-on adventure activities as it is one of the best places for adventures near Manali. You can enjoy activities like:- Paragliding, Cable Car Ropeway, Zorbing, Snow Scooter, Skiing, Horse Riding, and also can enjoy a short Trek to “Anjani Mahadev”.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Kasol","country":"India","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Moving towards Kasol ","day_summary":"

This morning after breakfast, check out from hotel, proceed to Kasol, after reaching there, check-in hotel and have some rest after that head out for some sightseeing in Kasol, visit – “KULLU”, “Kasol Market”, Parvati Valley, “Manikaran Sahib Gurdwara” -(Natural Hot Spring Water), Buddha place, Flea market, enjoy Camping in Kasol and that back to the hotel in time, have dinner and stay overnight.

packages.overview:
​Sightseeing Tour of Shimla & Kufri:
Explore Shimla’s colonial charm with visits to the Ridge, Mall Road, and Jakhoo Temple. Later, head to Kufri, known for its snow-capped slopes, adventure park, and stunning views.​Sightseeing Tour of Jibhi and Transfer to Manali:

Visit local gems like Jibhi Waterfall, Chehni Kothi, and ancient temples. Post exploration, head towards Manali, a favorite Himalayan escape.

Manali Sightseeing Tour:
Discover the charm of Hadimba Devi Temple, Old Manali, Vashisht Hot Springs, and enjoy a relaxing walk on Mall Road.

Excursion to Solang Valley:
Spend the day in Solang Valley, indulging in thrilling adventures like paragliding, ziplining, or skiing, depending on the season, or simply enjoy the majestic mountain views.

Then, get driven to Kufri and explore the Himalayan Nature Park known for diverse wildlife like leopards and Himalayan monals. Later, get driven to Shimla and stroll along Mall Road while soaking in its bustling atmosphere. Also, explore other attractions before getting transferred to your hotel for an overnight stay.

En route, pass through the stunning Jalori Pass, offering amazing views of the mountains and lush greenery. Upon arrival in Jibhi, check in at your hotel and relax for a while. Then, spend the rest of the day at leisure, where you can explore local landmarks like Serolsar Lake, a serene high-altitude lake. Later, return to your hotel on your own for a comfortable overnight stay.

packages.overview:
Manali Sightseeing:
Explore local attractions like Hadimba Temple, Manu Temple, and the charming streets of Old Manali. Stroll along the Mall Road for shopping and local food.

Solang Valley:
Head to Solang Valley for thrilling activities like paragliding, skiing (in season), and ATV rides, or just soak in the breathtaking views of snow-covered peaks and lush greenery.

​Tosh Exploration:
Wander through the village, enjoy panoramic views of the Parvati Valley, visit local cafés, and experience the tranquility and beauty of untouched nature.​

The journey from Manali to Kasol spans around 75 km and takes approximately 2.5 to 3 hours by road. The drive is incredibly scenic, following the Beas and Parvati Rivers, winding through lush valleys and charming Himachali villages. As you descend from Manali, the vibe shifts from a bustling hill station to the peaceful, hippie charm of Kasol, nestled in the Parvati Valley. It’s a great spot to relax, explore riverside cafés, and connect with nature. Perfect for backpackers and peace seekers alike!

packages.package_name: Himalayan Horizons: A Journey Through Himachal
packages.overview:
• Arrival in Manali – check-in and relax amidst the serene Himalayan surroundings.
  • Enjoy local sightseeing in Manali, including temples, Tibetan monasteries, and bustling markets.
  • Day trip from Manali to Kullu and Naggar – explore scenic beauty, cultural spots, and the famous Naggar Castle.
  • Travel from Manali to Dharamshala, soaking in the changing landscapes and mountain views.
  • Explore Dharamshala, visiting the Dalai Lama Temple, Bhagsunag Waterfall, and McLeod Ganj.
  • Departure from Dharamshala, carrying beautiful memories of the hills and culture.

packages.package_name: Breathtaking Uttarakhand: A Tour of Beauty & Adventure
packages.overview:
1. Uttarakhand: A beautiful blend of scenic hill stations, spiritual sites, and rich wildlife nestled in the Himalayas.

  2. Mussoorie: Known as the “Queen of Hills,” offering stunning mountain views, Mall Road strolls, Kempty Falls, and peaceful walks along Camel’s Back Road.

  3. Haridwar: One of India’s holiest cities, famous for Ganga Aarti at Har Ki Pauri, ancient temples, and spiritual ambiance.

  4. Jim Corbett National Park: India’s oldest national park, perfect for wildlife safaris, spotting tigers, elephants, and nature trails.

  5. Nainital: A charming lake town with boating on Naini Lake, shopping on Mall Road, and panoramic views from Snow View Point.

Enjoy the scenic drive through the lush hills and winding roads as you make your way to the ‘Queen of Hills’. Upon arrival, complete the check-in formalities at your hotel and unwind at your leisure. If you wish, take a leisurely stroll along Mall Road or explore nearby attractions to soak in the charm of Mussoorie. As the day ends, retreat to your cozy room for a relaxing overnight stay, preparing for the adventures ahead.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast before embarking on a scenic excursion to Dhanaulti, a hidden gem nestled amid lush pine and deodar forests. Enjoy the breathtaking landscapes as you travel to this serene retreat. Visit the ancient Sukhdevi Temple, marvel at the cascading Kempty Falls, and take a leisurely stroll along Mall Road, soaking in the tranquil ambiance. As the sun sets, return to your comfortable hotel in Mussoorie, where you can unwind and reflect on the day’s adventures before a peaceful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Haridwar","country":"India","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Journey from Mussoorie with a Spiritual Stop in Rishikesh","day_summary":"

Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before bidding farewell to the enchanting hills of Mussoorie. Embark on a scenic drive towards Haridwar, making a stopover in Rishikesh, the spiritual hub nestled along the banks of the holy Ganges. Explore the iconic Ram Jhula and Lakshman Jhula, two architectural marvels that offer panoramic views of the river and surrounding temples. Absorb the peaceful energy of this sacred town before continuing your journey. Upon arrival in Haridwar, check in to your hotel and enjoy a relaxing evening, preparing for an overnight stay in this divine city.

After a hearty breakfast, set off on a picturesque journey from Jim Corbett to Nainital, making a delightful stop in Almora. This charming hill town, known for its breathtaking landscapes and rich cultural heritage, offers a perfect mid-journey retreat. Continue your drive to Nainital and arrive by afternoon or evening. Upon check-in at your hotel, take some time to relax before heading out to explore the tranquil Naini Lake, the lively Mall Road, the revered Naina Devi Temple, and the vibrant Tibetan Market. End your day with a delicious dinner and a restful overnight stay in Nainital.

Begin your day with a delightful breakfast before embarking on a mesmerizing lake tour to the serene waters of Bhimtal, Sattal, and Naukuchiatal. Each lake offers a unique charm, surrounded by lush greenery and a tranquil atmosphere, making for a rejuvenating experience. Spend time admiring the scenic beauty, indulging in leisure activities, or simply soaking in the peaceful vibes of these natural wonders. After a fulfilling day, return to your hotel in Nainital to relish a delicious dinner and unwind with an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell to the Hills","day_summary":"

Enjoy a hearty breakfast before bidding farewell to the serene hills of Nainital. After checking out from your hotel, embark on a picturesque road trip back to Delhi, reminiscing about the unforgettable experiences of your 7-day Uttarakhand tour. As you descend from the misty mountains to the bustling city, carry with you the cherished memories of nature's beauty, thrilling adventures, and peaceful moments. Arrive in Delhi after a scenic 6 to 7-hour journey, marking the conclusion of your wonderful Uttarakhand getaway.

packages.package_name: Enchanting Uttarakhand With Jim Corbett Safari
packages.overview:
1. Uttarakhand – A breathtaking Himalayan state known for its scenic beauty, adventure, and spirituality.

  2. Nainital – A charming hill station famous for Naini Lake, Mall Road, Naina Devi Temple, and Snow View Point.

  3. Jim Corbett National Park – India’s oldest national park, renowned for Bengal tigers, jungle safaris, and rich biodiversity.

  4. Rishikesh – The "Yoga Capital of the World," offering spiritual retreats, river rafting, Ganga Aarti, and the iconic Lakshman Jhula.

  5. Mussoorie – The "Queen of Hills," featuring Kempty Falls, Camel’s Back Road, Gun Hill, and scenic landscapes.

Experience","day_summary":"

After a hearty breakfast, embark on a memorable sightseeing tour of Nainital, a paradise for nature lovers known for its lush greenery and diverse fauna. Adventure seekers can enjoy trekking, horse riding, and boating (on own). Witness the breathtaking views from Snow Point, accessible via cable car or ropeway (on own). Visit the famous Lovers Point, admire the tranquil beauty of Kilbury and Sariyatal, and explore the renowned Nainital Zoo. You can also visit Khurpatal Lake, a hidden gem of serenity. Conclude your day with a delicious dinner and a comfortable overnight stay at the hotel.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Jim Corbett National Park","country":"India","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Journey from Nainital to Jim Corbett ","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, embark on a scenic drive to Jim Corbett (approximately 3 hours). Upon arrival by noon, check in to your resort and unwind amidst nature. Begin your exploration with a visit to the Jim Corbett Museum, a tribute to the legendary hunter-turned-conservationist Jim Corbett. Witness the historic Heritage Suspension Bridge, a symbol of architectural brilliance. Later, marvel at the serene beauty of Corbett Falls, a perfect spot for nature lovers. As the day ends, relish a sumptuous dinner at the resort and enjoy a peaceful overnight stay in the heart of the wilderness.

After a hearty breakfast, check out and embark on a picturesque drive to Mussoorie, the “Queen of Hills” (approx. 3-hour journey). Enjoy the breathtaking views of lush green valleys and misty mountains along the way.

Arrive by afternoon and check in to your hotel for some relaxation. Later, take a leisurely stroll along the famous Mall Road, soaking in the vibrant atmosphere, shopping for souvenirs, and admiring the colonial charm of this hill station.

Wrap up your day with a delicious dinner and enjoy a peaceful overnight stay at the hotel.

After a delightful breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless experience as you embark on a mesmerizing exploration of Mussoorie, the \"Queen of Hills.\" Begin your journey at Kempty Falls, where you can soak in the refreshing cascades, followed by a visit to Lal Tibba, the highest point offering breathtaking Himalayan views. Enjoy the scenic Gun Hill, accessible by ropeway, and capture panoramic sights. For adventure seekers, a trek to George Everest Peak promises an unforgettable experience. After a fulfilling day, return to your hotel for a delicious dinner and unwind in comfort, ensuring a hassle-free and memorable stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Mussoorie to Delhi Departure","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth and comfortable journey as you bid farewell to the serene beauty of Mussoorie. Relax and enjoy the scenic drive back to Delhi (7.5 hours), reminiscing about the unforgettable experiences from the trip. Whether you are heading to the airport or railway station, our team will provide seamless drop-off assistance, ensuring a hassle-free end to your adventure. Depart with cherished memories of the majestic hills, thrilling adventures, and soulful moments, making this journey an experience to treasure forever. Safe travels!

packages.overview:
1. Naini Lake – Experience the tranquil waters with a romantic boat ride, surrounded by the breathtaking Himalayan landscape.

  2. Sattal, Bhimtal & Naukuchiatal – Feel the cool mountain breeze while exploring these pristine, interconnected lakes filled with natural beauty.

  3. Hanuman Garhi – Seek divine blessings at this serene temple, offering a mesmerizing view of the sunrise and sunset.

  4. Naina Devi Temple – Witness the spiritual aura of this sacred temple, nestled in the heart of Nainital.

  5. Ranikhet – Stroll through the Queen’s Meadow, a town soaked in colonial charm and Himalayan beauty.

  6. Chaubatia Garden – Walk amidst the lush orchards, indulging in the fragrance of fresh apples and peaches.

  7. Golf Course – Admire the lush green fairways, set against the majestic Himalayan backdrop.

  8. Kausani – Experience the enchanting sunrise over the snow-capped peaks of Trishul and Nanda Devi.

  9. Gandhi Ji Ashram – Step into history at this peaceful retreat, where Mahatma Gandhi found inspiration for his writings.

  10. Army Museum – Discover the valiant history of the Kumaon Regiment, showcasing war memorabilia and heroic tales.

  11. Cave Garden – Wander through the mystical caves, feeling the thrill of adventure amid rock formations.

  12. Lover’s Point & Suicide Point – Marvel at the dramatic cliffs offering breathtaking panoramic views of the valley.

  13. Almora – Explore the cultural hub of Uttarakhand, known for its scenic beauty and heritage temples.

  14. Nainital Bazaar – Stroll through the vibrant markets, picking up handmade souvenirs and local crafts.

  15. Naini Lake Picnic – Enjoy a leisurely lakeside picnic, surrounded by the serene mountains and shimmering waters.

  16. Kainchi Dham – Find peace and spirituality at this famous ashram, a retreat for seekers and saints.

Visit the mesmerizing lakes of Sattal, Bhimtal, and Naukuchiatal, each offering a unique charm and serenity. Seek blessings at the Hanuman Garhi Temple, known for its spiritual aura and breathtaking views. Discover more of Nainital’s treasures, including the revered Naina Devi Temple, Suicide Point, Lover’s Point, Cave Garden, and a cascading waterfall that adds to the town’s natural beauty. As the sun sets, return to your hotel for a peaceful and relaxing night.

packages.overview:
1. Uttarakhand: A picturesque Himalayan state offering a perfect mix of scenic beauty, peace, and charm.

  2. Nainital: Famous for its shimmering Naini Lake, colonial charm, ropeway rides, and bustling Mall Road, it’s a favorite for families and honeymooners alike.

  3. Ranikhet: A quiet hill town surrounded by pine forests and colonial-era buildings, known for peaceful landscapes, temples, and views of snow-clad peaks.

  4. Kausani: A scenic gem offering breathtaking sunrise views over the Himalayas, peaceful tea estates, and serene vibes perfect for unwinding.

Step into the lush tea estates of Kausani, where the refreshing aroma of tea plantations and the breathtaking landscapes will rejuvenate your senses. Stroll through the serene environment, capturing the beauty of rolling green hills and misty horizons. Visit the Annashakti Ashram, a peaceful retreat where Mahatma Gandhi once stayed, and experience the tranquil ambiance that reflects his simple yet profound lifestyle. After a soulful exploration, return to your hotel and enjoy a delicious lunch, savoring the flavors of the region. Spend the rest of the day at leisure, embracing the calm and scenic beauty of Kausani.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell to the Hills","day_summary":"

On the final morning of your journey, pack your bags with beautiful memories of the serene hills. After a delightful breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless and comfortable transfer back to Delhi. Relax and enjoy the scenic drive, reminiscing about the breathtaking landscapes and unforgettable experiences. Upon arrival, you will be dropped off at the Delhi railway station or airport, where you can proceed with your onward journey. As you bid farewell to this enchanting trip, take with you the cherished moments of nature, romance, and tranquility, making it a perfectly curated travel experience.

packages.overview:
1. Naini Lake – Glide across the serene waters, soaking in the breathtaking beauty of the surrounding hills.

  2. Hanumangarhi Temple – Seek divine blessings at this peaceful hilltop temple with mesmerizing sunset views.

  3. Bhimtal, Sattal & Naukuchiatal – Explore three picturesque lakes, each offering a unique charm and tranquility.

  4. Corbett National Park – Embark on an adventurous safari through dense forests, spotting majestic tigers and diverse wildlife.

  5. Jungle Safari – Experience the thrill of spotting elephants, leopards, and deer in their natural habitat.

Seek blessings at the Hanumangarhi Temple, a serene hilltop shrine offering breathtaking views. This historic sanctuary, home to a diverse range of flora and fauna, offers an unparalleled opportunity to witness nature at its finest. After a scenic four-hour drive, arrive at your destination and prepare for an exhilarating evening safari, where you might catch a glimpse of the majestic Royal Bengal Tiger, playful elephants, and vibrant birdlife. As the day ends, unwind at your hotel, savor a delicious dinner, and enjoy a restful night.

As the golden rays of the sun embrace the wilderness, a thrilling morning awaits you at Corbett National Park. Accompanied by Travelxploria’s dedicated representative, set off on an exciting jungle safari, where nature unfolds its wonders before your eyes. Spot majestic Royal Bengal Tigers, elusive leopards, playful elephants, and graceful deer roaming freely in their habitat. After this unforgettable adventure, return to your hotel, pack your bags, and cherish the memories of this enchanting journey. Our representative will ensure a smooth transfer to Delhi’s airport or railway station, where you will bid farewell to Uttarakhand, carrying home a heart full of treasured experiences.

packages.overview:
• Uttarakhand: A serene Himalayan state known for its scenic beauty, lush hills, and spiritual charm.

  • Nainital: A popular hill station centered around the beautiful Naini Lake, offering boating, the Naina Devi Temple, Snow View Point, and Mall Road shopping.

  • Ranikhet: A peaceful retreat with pine-covered hills, lush meadows, Jhula Devi Temple, and panoramic Himalayan views, perfect for nature walks and relaxation.

  • Kausani: Known as the "Switzerland of India", this tranquil destination offers stunning views of Nanda Devi, tea gardens, and the Anasakti Ashram.

Your journey begins as you arrive at Kathgodam Railway Station, where our Travelxploria representative will be eagerly waiting to ensure a seamless pick-up and transfer to your next destination. Enjoy a scenic drive through winding mountain roads, taking in the fresh air and lush greenery. Upon arrival at your luxurious hotel, complete the check-in formalities and take some time to relax and refresh.

In the afternoon, embark on an enchanting sightseeing tour, visiting Cave Garden, Lover’s Point, Waterfall, Land’s End, Himalaya View Point, and Lake View Point—each offering breathtaking vistas. As the evening sets in, explore the vibrant Tibetan Market, perfect for shopping and experiencing the local culture. Unwind at your hotel for a peaceful overnight stay.

As the morning sun illuminates the pristine beauty of Nainital, set out to explore its mesmerizing lakes. Visit the serene Sattal, picturesque Bhimtal, and the tranquil Naukuchiatal, each offering breathtaking views and a peaceful ambiance. Enjoy a relaxing boat ride or simply soak in the natural charm of these enchanting water bodies. Later, seek blessings at Hanuman Garhi, a revered temple known for its spiritual aura and panoramic sunset views. After a day filled with nature’s wonders, return to your comfortable hotel, where you can unwind, relax, and rejuvenate for the adventures ahead. Overnight stay in Nainital.

Begin your day with a picturesque drive to Ranikhet, a charming hill station known for its lush greenery and tranquil ambiance. Along the way, visit the sacred Kainchi Dham, a spiritual retreat nestled in the hills, followed by a serene stroll through Chaubatia Garden, famous for its fruit orchards and panoramic Himalayan views. Next, head to the renowned Golf Course, one of the highest in Asia, offering a perfect spot for photography and leisure. After a day of exploration, savor a delicious meal and retire to your cozy hotel for a peaceful overnight stay in Ranikhet.

to Kausani & Sightseeing","day_summary":"

Embark on a scenic drive to Kausani, a picturesque hill station often referred to as the “Switzerland of India,” nestled in the Kumaon region of Uttarakhand. As you ascend through winding mountain roads, enjoy breathtaking views of lush pine forests, terraced fields, and the majestic Himalayan peaks. Upon arrival, begin your exploration with a visit to the Anasakti Ashram, where Mahatma Gandhi once stayed and admired the tranquil surroundings. Next, witness the panoramic beauty of the snow-clad peaks like Nanda Devi and Trishul from the Kausani View Point. Visit the ancient Baijnath Temple, located by the Gomti River, known for its intricate stone carvings and spiritual significance. Take a peaceful stroll through tea gardens that blanket the slopes, offering a refreshing aroma and a chance to learn about tea processing. Kausani’s serene environment, fresh mountain air, and mesmerizing views promise a rejuvenating experience amidst nature’s purest form.

packages.overview:
• Uttarakhand: A scenic North Indian state known for its Himalayan landscapes, spiritual sites, and adventure opportunities.

  • Nainital: A charming hill station famous for Naini Lake, scenic viewpoints like Snow View Point, and the bustling Mall Road.

  • Jim Corbett National Park: India's oldest national park, home to Bengal tigers, elephants, and diverse wildlife, offering jeep safaris and nature trails.

  • Kausani: A serene hill station known for its breathtaking Himalayan views, lush tea gardens, and the peaceful Gandhi Ashram.

After a hearty breakfast, bid farewell to the serene landscapes of Kausani and embark on a scenic drive to Jim Corbett National Park, India's oldest and most renowned wildlife sanctuary. En route, witness the changing landscapes as you move from majestic mountains to dense forests and riverbanks. Upon arrival, check in to your luxurious wildlife resort, where you can relax and soak in the tranquil ambiance of the jungle. Spend your evening at leisure, exploring the surroundings or enjoying a bonfire under the starlit sky. Get ready for an exciting wildlife experience ahead. Overnight stay at Jim Corbett.

Start your day with an exhilarating early morning Jeep Safari (bookable through your hotel), where you can spot majestic tigers, elephants, deer, and a variety of exotic birds in their natural habitat. Experience the raw beauty of the jungle as the morning mist unfolds over the wilderness. After this thrilling adventure, return to your resort for a delicious breakfast, re-energizing for the day ahead. Later, visit the sacred Garjiya Devi Temple, perched on a rock amidst the Kosi River, offering a serene spiritual experience. Spend the evening at leisure, unwinding in the tranquil surroundings. Overnight stay in Jim Corbett.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Farewell & Return to Delhi","day_summary":"

On the final day of your journey, enjoy a relaxing breakfast at your resort, cherishing the memorable experiences of your trip. After checking out, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless and comfortable transfer back to Delhi. Sit back and enjoy the scenic drive as you reminisce about the adventurous safari in Jim Corbett, the tranquil beauty of Kausani, and the charming hill stations of Nainital and Almora. Upon arrival in Delhi, you will be dropped off at your preferred location—your home or hotel, marking the end of a remarkable journey filled with nature, adventure, and spiritual bliss.

packages.overview:
• Arrive at Hasimara, drive to Phuentsholing, complete permit formalities, and continue to Thimphu.
  • Full-day sightseeing in Thimphu, including Buddha Dordenma, National Memorial Chorten, Folk Heritage Museum, and Motithang Takin Preserve.
  • ​Drive to Phobjikha, visit Dochula Pass, Gangtey Monastery, Phobjikha Valley, and Black-Necked Crane Information Centre.
  • Drive to Bumthang via Trongsa, visit Pele La Pass, Chendebji Chorten, and Trongsa Dzong.
  • Full-day sightseeing in Bumthang, including Jakar Dzong, Kurje Lhakhang, Tamshing Lhakhang, Jambay Lhakhang, Mebar Tsho, Swiss Farm, and Red Panda Brewery.
  • Drive back to Punakha, passing through Trongsa and Pele La Pass.
  • Explore Punakha, including Punakha Dzong, Suspension Bridge, and Chimi Lhakhang, then drive to Paro.
  • Hike to Tiger's Nest Monastery, enjoy a hot stone bath, and relax in Paro.​
  • Explore Paro, visit the National Museum, and depart for Hasimara.​

[{"city":"Thimphu","country":"Bhutan","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Thimphu/1744618074051-AdobeStock_178486151.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Thimphu/1744618074433-AdobeStock_359113866.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Thimphu/1744618074881-AdobeStock_483696574.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Bhutan/Thimphu/1744618075034-AdobeStock_797771545.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Hasimara to Phuentsholing to Thimphu","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at Hasimara Station, our company representative will greet you and drive you to Phuentsholing. After completing the permit formalities, you'll continue your journey to Thimphu. On the way, visit Kharbandi Gompa (Rinchending Monastery), located just outside Phuentsholing, which offers panoramic views of the town and the surrounding plains of India. It's a peaceful spot to begin your Bhutan journey. Afterward, check into your hotel, relax, and prepare for the upcoming journey.

After breakfast, embark on a full day of sightseeing in Thimphu, beginning with a visit to Buddha Dordenma, a massive statue overlooking the city and offering stunning panoramic views. Next, explore the National Memorial Chorten, a revered stupa built in honor of the third king where locals gather to pray and spin prayer wheels. Continue to the Folk Heritage Museum, which showcases traditional Bhutanese rural life through exhibits of farming tools, household objects, and a replica of a traditional farmhouse. In the afternoon, visit the Motithang Takin Preserve, home to Bhutan’s unique national animal, the takin. Then head to Changangkha Lhakhang, a popular temple where locals seek blessings for newborns, and conclude the day with a stroll around the iconic Clock Tower. Overnight stay will be in Thimphu.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Phobjikha","country":"Bhutan","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Thimphu to Phobjikha sightseeing & Stay Phobjikha.","day_summary":"

After breakfast, drive to the serene Phobjikha Valley with your first stop at Dochula Pass, located at an altitude of 3,100 meters and offering breathtaking views just 35 minutes from Thimphu. En route, visit the renowned Gangtey Monastery (Gangtey Goenpa), one of the oldest and most significant Nyingma monasteries in Bhutan, which overlooks the Phobjikha Valley and provides a tranquil atmosphere to explore traditional architecture and observe monks in prayer. Upon arrival in Phobjikha, enjoy the beauty of the glacial valley, known for its scenic landscapes, rich wildlife, and as a winter home for the endangered black-necked cranes migrating from Tibet between October and February. Conclude the day with a visit to the Black-Necked Crane Information Centre, which offers educational exhibits and spotting scopes to view the cranes during migration season, enhancing your understanding of the valley’s ecological importance. Overnight stay will be in Phobjikha.

Resort.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Bumthang","country":"Bhutan","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Phobjikha to Bumthang Via Trongsa","day_summary":"

Early in the morning, after breakfast, embark on a scenic drive to Bumthang via Trongsa, one of the most culturally rich and picturesque routes in Bhutan, typically taking 7 to 9 hours depending on stops and road conditions. Along the way, enjoy several key attractions including Pele La Pass at 3,420 meters, which separates western and central Bhutan and offers views of distant snow-capped peaks adorned with fluttering prayer flags. Stop at Chendebji Chorten, a serene Buddhist stupa modeled after Kathmandu’s Swayambhunath, perfect for a peaceful rest. Continue to Trongsa, where you’ll visit the majestic Trongsa Dzong, the largest fortress in Bhutan, historically significant and offering stunning views over the Mangde River. This route offers a captivating mix of culture, heritage, and natural beauty, culminating in an overnight stay at Bumthang.

Bumthang/1745929432159-Amankora, Bumthang.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Bumthang Sightseeing full day.","day_summary":"

After a healthy breakfast, begin a full day of sightseeing in Bumthang, the spiritual heartland of Bhutan, rich in history and culture. Start with a visit to Jakar Dzong, also known as the \"Castle of the White Bird,\" which offers panoramic views of the Bumthang Valley and serves as the administrative center of the region. Continue to Kurje Lhakhang, one of Bhutan’s most sacred monasteries where Guru Rinpoche meditated, followed by Tamshing Lhakhang, renowned for its ancient wall paintings and religious importance. Visit Jambay Lhakhang, a 7th-century temple built by Tibetan King Songtsen Gampo, making it one of the oldest and most significant temples in the country. Explore Mebar Tsho, or the Burning Lake, a revered holy site where Terton Pema Lingpa discovered hidden treasures. Conclude the day with a visit to the Swiss Farm to witness local cheese and cider production, and then enjoy a tasting at the Red Panda Brewery, Bhutan’s first brewery. Return to the hotel for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Punakha","country":"Bhutan","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Bumthang to Punakha Night stay","day_summary":"

Early in the morning, after a healthy breakfast, begin the long drive back to Punakha, which takes approximately 7 to 9 hours. The journey passes through Trongsa and crosses the scenic Pele La Pass, a high-altitude route that marks the division between central and western Bhutan. Continuing the drive through Wangdue Phodrang without any sightseeing stops, you will reach Punakha by late afternoon or early evening, depending on road conditions and travel pace. Upon arrival, check into the hotel, relax, and prepare for the journey ahead, followed by an overnight stay in Punakha.

Local and Night Stay at Paro","day_summary":"

After breakfast, begin your exploration of Punakha with a visit to the majestic Punakha Dzong (Pungtang Dechen Phodrang Dzong), renowned for its stunning architecture, rich historical significance, and scenic location at the confluence of two rivers. Continue to the Punakha Suspension Bridge, one of the longest in Bhutan, offering a thrilling experience and breathtaking views of the Punakha Valley. Next, visit Chimi Lhakhang, also known as the Fertility Temple, dedicated to the Divine Madman and famed for its unique blessings and legends. In the afternoon, drive to Paro, check in to the hotel, relax, and prepare for the journey ahead, with an overnight stay in Paro.

Paro Taktsang, also known as the Tiger’s Nest Monastery, is one of the most sacred Vajrayana Buddhist sites in the Himalayas, dramatically perched on a cliffside in the upper Paro Valley of Bhutan. It is one of the thirteen legendary “Tiger’s Nest” caves across historical Tibet where Guru Padmasambhava is believed to have meditated and taught Vajrayana Buddhism.

The present-day monastery complex was constructed in 1692 around the Taktsang Senge Samdup cave, where Guru Padmasambhava, along with his disciples including Yeshe Tsogyal, engaged in deep spiritual practice before leaving Tibet in the early 9th century. Revered as the founder of Vajrayana Buddhism in Bhutan, Padmasambhava is also regarded as the country's spiritual protector.

Today, Paro Taktsang stands as the most iconic of these sacred caves, drawing pilgrims and travelers alike. After visiting this revered site, enjoy an overnight stay at your hotel in Paro.

packages.overview:
• Arrive at Bagdogra, complete immigration at Phuentsholing, and enjoy a scenic drive to Thimphu with enroute sightseeing including Milarepa Tower and Tashi Choedzong.
  • ​Excursion to Punakha with visits to Dochula Pass, 108 Chortens, Punakha Dzong, Suspension Bridge, and Chimi Lhakhang, then return to Thimphu.
  • ​Thimphu sightseeing including Buddha Viewpoint, Simply Bhutan, Wangdi Tse Hike, then transfer to Paro with a stop at Tachog Monastery.
  • Hike to the iconic Tiger’s Nest Monastery, visit a local beer factory, and enjoy the Paro Airport viewpoint.
  • ​Explore Kyichu Lhakhang and Rinpung Dzong, then drive to Phuentsholing for exit formalities and departure from Jaigaon.​

Upon arrival at Bagdogra, our representative will warmly welcome you and assist with the immigration formalities (depending on the arrival timing). Afterward, you'll drive to Phuentsholing, then continue the scenic journey to Thimphu via Kharbandi, with a stop at Milarepa Tower. Along the way, enjoy the picturesque towns of Gedu, Chukha, and Chuzom. Once in Thimphu, check into your hotel and take in the view of Tashi Choedzong before spending the evening at leisure. Your overnight stay will be in Thimphu.

After enjoying breakfast at the hotel, begin your scenic drive to Punakha. En route, stop at the stunning Dochula Pass, located at an altitude of 3,150 meters, to take in panoramic Himalayan views and visit the iconic 108 Druk Wangyel Chortens. Continue onward to explore the majestic Punakha Dzong, a masterpiece of Bhutanese architecture nestled between two rivers. Take a walk across Bhutan’s longest suspension bridge, offering breathtaking valley views, followed by a short hike to Chimi Lhakhang, also known as the Temple of Fertility. Later, drive back to Thimphu where you can enjoy a leisurely evening exploring the town. Overnight stay will be in Thimphu.

Heritage Hotel/1739868803498-Zhiwaling Heritage Hotel.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Full Day Paro Sifghtseeing","day_summary":"

Simtokha Dzong: Built in 1629 by Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyal, Simtokha Dzong is one of the oldest dzongs in Bhutan. Also known asSangak Zabdhon Phodrang, it holds great historical and religious significance. Constructed in the 17th century, this ancient fortress is a remarkable example of Bhutanese architecture and remains an important cultural landmark.

National Museum of Bhutan: Once an ancient watchtower, this museum now houses an extensive collection of Bhutanese artifacts. From traditional costumes and armor to weapons and daily life tools, the museum reflects the rich heritage and artistic traditions of Bhutan.

Ta Dzong: Originally built in 1649 as a watchtower to defend the Rinpung Dzong during times of war, Ta Dzong was later converted into Bhutan’s National Museum in 1968. It now serves as a cultural treasure trove, offering insights into the country’s past.

Rinpung Dzong: Also known as Paro Dzong, this majestic fortress was constructed in 1644 by Zhabdrung Ngawang Namgyal. It is an excellent example of traditional Bhutanese architecture and is one of Paro’s top tourist attractions.

Drukgyal Dzong: Known as the “Victorious Fortress,” Drukgyal Dzong is a historic Buddhist monastery and fortress. It commemorates Bhutan’s victory over Tibetan invaders and is considered one of the most beautiful archaeological sites in the country.

Paro Airport Viewpoint: Paro International Airport, Bhutan’s only international airport, is famous for its scenic beauty. Surrounded by dramatic mountains and lush valleys, it is considered one of the most stunning airports in the world and a must-visit spot for travelers in Paro.

Kyichu Lhakhang: Also called Kyerchu Lhakhang, this sacred temple is one of the oldest and most revered pilgrimage sites in Bhutan. It is part of a network of 108 temples built by a Tibetan king and is a cherished spiritual destination known for its serene beauty.

packages.overview:
• ​Arrival at Paro Airport, transfer to Thimphu with evening leisure and overnight stay.
  • ​Full-day sightseeing in Thimphu including Buddha Point, National Memorial Chorten, and Clock Tower Square.
  • Excursion to Phobjikha Valley and Gangtey Monastery, then overnight in Punakha.
  • ​Drive to Paro and visit the iconic Taktsang (Tiger’s Nest) Monastery.
  • Day trip to Chele La Pass and scenic Haa Valley, then return to Paro.
  • ​Full-day Paro sightseeing including Simtokha Dzong, National Museum, Rinpung Dzong, and Kyichu Lhakhang.
  • Departure from Paro with cherished Bhutan holiday memories.​
